insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not mention direct optogenetic VIP perturbations failing to replicate attentional state effects.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Behaviourally, the same receptor route accounts for locomotion-driven VIP activation in V1: local nicotinic blockade abolishes locomotion-evoked VIP firing while local muscarinic blockade does not, and silencing basal-forebrain cholinergic projections produces the same effect {cite:p}`Fu2014, Letzkus2011, Sabri2024`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Vasoactive intestinal peptide-expressing interneurons modulate the effect of behavioral state on cortical activity
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not mention nicotinic/muscarinic receptors, cholinergic blockade, or basal-forebrain projections.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Across V1, A1, mPFC, BLA and CA1, the same conjunction recurs: arousal- or reinforcer-related signals from basal forebrain or LC raise VIP activity, the rise is sufficient to suppress local SST output, and the SST suppression in turn opens a dendritic disinhibitory window onto pyramidal neurons {cite:p}`Fu2014, Letzkus2011, Krabbe2019, Pi2013, Pakan2016, Sabri2024, Szadai2022, Tamboli2024, Kamigaki2017`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Vasoactive intestinal peptide-expressing interneurons modulate the effect of behavioral state on cortical activity
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract discusses VIP role in behavioral state modulation but does not detail SST suppression or dendritic disinhibitory windows across multiple areas.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Plasticity at the VIP→SST synapse, in turn, places experience-dependent gain control inside the disinhibitory loop rather than only at its pyramidal output {cite:p}`Mcfarlan2024a, Karnani2016a, Wiera2024, Sabri2024`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Vasoactive intestinal peptide-expressing interneurons modulate the effect of behavioral state on cortical activity
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss plasticity at the VIP→SST synapse or experience-dependent gain control.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The reading converged on by recent chemogenetic work is that locomotion-related VIP recruitment is itself preserved across these conditions, but its *downstream consequence* on SST depends on the strength of visually driven SST input {cite:p}`Sabri2024, Pakan2016, Dipoppa2018, Kaneko2024`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Vasoactive intestinal peptide-expressing interneurons modulate the effect of behavioral state on cortical activity
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss how visually driven SST input modulates downstream consequences of VIP recruitment during locomotion.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Direct optogenetic VIP perturbations during cross-modal attention do not reliably replicate the modulation reported in earlier indirect manipulations {cite:p}`Ibrahim2016, Anastasiades2021a, Sabri2024`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Vasoactive intestinal peptide-expressing interneurons modulate the effect of behavioral state on cortical activity
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not mention optogenetic VIP perturbations during cross-modal attention or comparison with indirect manipulations.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The synaptic-connectivity picture that emerges from 467 papers is a structured composite. **On the input side**, VIP interneurons are a preferential target of long-range cortical and higher-order thalamic glutamatergic input, of basal-forebrain cholinergic input via slow nicotinic receptors, of raphe serotonergic input via 5-HT3 receptors, and of mixed-sign noradrenergic input — while local pyramidal drive is comparable to that onto SST and PV cells {cite:p}`Wall2016, Lee2013, Zhang2014, Williams2019, Anastasiades2021a, Cruikshank2012, Audette2018, Stachniak2023, Bilash2023, Porter1999, Kawaguchi1997b, Kawaguchi1998, Vonengelhardt2007, Arroyo2012, Fu2014, Ferezou2002, Vucurovic2010, Frazer2017, Letzkus2011`. **On the output side**, VIP cells preferentially inhibit SST interneurons, but they also inhibit PV cells in deeper layers, NDNF/L1 interneurons, pyramidal cells in deep cortex and OLM cells in CA1, with substantial cell-to-cell heterogeneity that the canonical schematic flattens {cite:p}`Pfeffer2013, Pi2013, Lee2013, Karnani2016a, Karnani2016b, Walker2016, Yu2019, Zhou2017, Anastasiades2021a, Schuman2019, Hafner2021, Tyan2014, Turi2019, Francavilla2018a, Booker2018`. **On the behavioural side**, the consequence of this wiring is a deployable disinhibitory operation that is recruited by arousal and reinforcement signals across V1, A1, mPFC, BLA and CA1, but which is sign-dependent on visual context, source-area-specific in cross-modal attention, and layer-dependent in its non-SST outputs {cite:p}`Fu2014, Pi2013, Letzkus2011, Krabbe2019, Pakan2016, Dipoppa2018, Sabri2024, Kamigaki2017, Pinto2015, Szadai2022, Tamboli2024, Ibrahim2016, Kaneko2024, Anastasiades2021a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Vasoactive intestinal peptide-expressing interneurons modulate the effect of behavioral state on cortical activity
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract shows VIP modulates behavioral state-cortical activity coupling but doesn't address the specific synaptic connectivity details claimed.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Second, the *minimum sufficient circuit model* needed to explain disease-relevant phenotypes (autism, schizophrenia, anxiety, neonatal injury) cannot rely on canonical disinhibition alone; it must accommodate the layer-dependent direct VIP→Pyr/PV path, the area-tuned long-range asymmetries and the modulator-recruited gain control reviewed here {cite:p}`Yu2019, Zhou2017, Anastasiades2021a, Letzkus2011, Sabri2024, Krabbe2019`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Vasoactive intestinal peptide-expressing interneurons modulate the effect of behavioral state on cortical activity
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss disease models, circuit models for disease phenotypes, or layer-dependent VIP→Pyr/PV paths.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: A monosynaptic-rabies survey by {cite:t}`Wall2016` formalised this point at scale: VIP cells in mouse V1 receive disproportionately more long-range cortical input — relative to local pyramidal input — than do SST or PV cells in the same preparation, an asymmetry that has since been reproduced across primary sensory cortices and prefrontal cortex {cite:p}`Wall2016, Lee2013, Zhang2014, Anastasiades2021a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Long-range and local circuits for top-down modulation of visual cortex processing
insufficient_triples.note: The abstract does not mention monosynaptic-rabies survey or comparative long-range input ratios across VIP/SST/PV cells.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: First, the vM1→VIP/Pyr ratio of ~2.9× reported by {cite:t}`Lee2013` is independently reproduced in similar form for vS1→Cg, ACC→V1 and OFC→sensory pathways {cite:p}`Zhang2014, Bilash2023, Stachniak2023, Pi2013, Williams2019`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Long-range and local circuits for top-down modulation of visual cortex processing
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract describes Cg→V1 but does not report quantitative ACC→V1 VIP/Pyr ratios comparable to the vM1→VIP ratio claim.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Together these argue that "top-down recruitment of VIP" is not a single circuit operation but a family of source-specific operations, each with its own direction of effect {cite:p}`Zhang2014, Ibrahim2016, Anastasiades2021a, Stachniak2023`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Long-range and local circuits for top-down modulation of visual cortex processing
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract only describes Cg→V1; it does not discuss source-specific differences or claim top-down recruitment is a family of operations.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The synaptic-connectivity picture that emerges from 467 papers is a structured composite. **On the input side**, VIP interneurons are a preferential target of long-range cortical and higher-order thalamic glutamatergic input, of basal-forebrain cholinergic input via slow nicotinic receptors, of raphe serotonergic input via 5-HT3 receptors, and of mixed-sign noradrenergic input — while local pyramidal drive is comparable to that onto SST and PV cells {cite:p}`Wall2016, Lee2013, Zhang2014, Williams2019, Anastasiades2021a, Cruikshank2012, Audette2018, Stachniak2023, Bilash2023, Porter1999, Kawaguchi1997b, Kawaguchi1998, Vonengelhardt2007, Arroyo2012, Fu2014, Ferezou2002, Vucurovic2010, Frazer2017, Letzkus2011`. **On the output side**, VIP cells preferentially inhibit SST interneurons, but they also inhibit PV cells in deeper layers, NDNF/L1 interneurons, pyramidal cells in deep cortex and OLM cells in CA1, with substantial cell-to-cell heterogeneity that the canonical schematic flattens {cite:p}`Pfeffer2013, Pi2013, Lee2013, Karnani2016a, Karnani2016b, Walker2016, Yu2019, Zhou2017, Anastasiades2021a, Schuman2019, Hafner2021, Tyan2014, Turi2019, Francavilla2018a, Booker2018`. **On the behavioural side**, the consequence of this wiring is a deployable disinhibitory operation that is recruited by arousal and reinforcement signals across V1, A1, mPFC, BLA and CA1, but which is sign-dependent on visual context, source-area-specific in cross-modal attention, and layer-dependent in its non-SST outputs {cite:p}`Fu2014, Pi2013, Letzkus2011, Krabbe2019, Pakan2016, Dipoppa2018, Sabri2024, Kamigaki2017, Pinto2015, Szadai2022, Tamboli2024, Ibrahim2016, Kaneko2024, Anastasiades2021a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Long-range and local circuits for top-down modulation of visual cortex processing
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract confirms VIP/SST roles in Cg→V1 but does not address the broad synthesis claims about local pyramidal drive comparability or deep-layer outputs.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Pfeffer2013` showed strong VIP→SST connectivity but emphasised the limited VIP→PV/Pyr coupling. **Resolution:** both descriptions are locally accurate, but the modal answer depends on cortical area and behavioural state — disinhibition dominates in V1 and S1 superficial layers under top-down drive {cite:p}`Zhang2014,Lee2013`; PV recruitment becomes important in cortices and tasks in which cholinergic drive is strong {cite:p}`Kuchibhotla2017,Williams2019` and in deep-layer connectomic reconstructions where direct VIP→pyramidal contacts are visible {cite:p}`Schneidermizell2025`. :::
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Long-range and local circuits for top-down modulation of visual cortex processing
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract mentions VIP and SST roles but does not discuss limited VIP→PV/Pyr coupling or VIP→SST connectivity strength specifically.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: VIP cells fire fast, narrow APs (half-width ≈ 0.95 ms in juvenile S1 {cite:p}`Vucurovic2010`; AP amplitude 65.1 ± 9.1 mV in barrel cortex {cite:p}`Pronneke2015`) — narrower than pyramidal neurons but broader than PV fast-spiking cells, again consistent with the broader cortical interneuron taxonomy {cite:p}`Rudy2011,Karnani2016a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Serotonin 3A Receptor Subtype as an Early and Protracted Marker of Cortical Interneuron Subpopulations
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not report specific AP half-width or amplitude values for VIP cells.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Sag/I_{h} is modest rather than absent: {cite:t}`Pronneke2015` measured a sag index of 11.2 ± 6.8% across cortical VIP cells; {cite:t}`Vucurovic2010` reported 12.1 ± 7.8% in juvenile S1; CA1 IS3 cells show pronounced sag in some recordings and minimal sag in others {cite:p}`Bell2015,Michaud2024`; and inferior-colliculus VIP-Cre stellate cells (which are *glutamatergic*, not GABAergic) show essentially no sag {cite:p}`Goyer2019` — flagging that VIP-Cre lines tag biophysically distinct cell classes outside the cortex.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Serotonin 3A Receptor Subtype as an Early and Protracted Marker of Cortical Interneuron Subpopulations
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not report sag index values for VIP or 5-HT3A interneurons.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Across these comparisons, the rule that survives is structural rather than numeric: the VIP/CGE subclass occupies a high-R_{in}, low-rheobase, narrow-AP corner of the cortical-interneuron biophysical manifold, with within-class scatter that is real but bounded {cite:p}`Tremblay2016,Pronneke2015,Vucurovic2010,Wierenga2010,Karnani2016a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Serotonin 3A Receptor Subtype as an Early and Protracted Marker of Cortical Interneuron Subpopulations
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss R_in, rheobase, or biophysical manifold positioning of VIP/CGE cells.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Vucurovic2010` independently described two intrinsic firing behaviours in juvenile S1 VIP cluster cells — 68% adapting (15/22) and 32% bursting (7/22), with a characteristic post-spike afterhyperpolarisation–afterdepolarisation–late-afterhyperpolarisation sequence {cite:p}`Vucurovic2010`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Serotonin 3A Receptor Subtype as an Early and Protracted Marker of Cortical Interneuron Subpopulations
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not provide specific percentages (68%/32%) or exact cell counts (15/22, 7/22) for adapting vs bursting.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Together, four independent studies place IS firing as a minority but reproducible class in cortical VIP populations, with continuous-adapting as the modal phenotype {cite:p}`Cauli1997,Cauli2000,Pronneke2015,Vucurovic2010,Walker2016`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Serotonin 3A Receptor Subtype as an Early and Protracted Marker of Cortical Interneuron Subpopulations
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss IS firing classification or continuous-adapting as modal phenotype.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: **VIP intrinsic electrophysiology: cross-study landscape and Patch-seq mapping.** *Panel A:* Schematic exemplar firing traces for the three dominant Petilla classes observed in cortical VIP cells (irregular-spiking, continuous-adapting, accommodating) at a matched supra-threshold current step, drawn from the qualitative descriptions in {cite:p}`Cauli1997,Cauli2000,Pronneke2015,Vucurovic2010`. *Panel B:* Forest-plot of input resistance for VIP+ interneurons across non-cortical regions (CA1 stratum radiatum vs basolateral amygdala).
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Serotonin 3A Receptor Subtype as an Early and Protracted Marker of Cortical Interneuron Subpopulations
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract mentions electrophysiological properties but not specific Petilla firing class descriptions used for schematics.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: **Candidate ion-channel substrates of irregular-spiking firing in VIP cells.** *Panel A:* Cartoon VIP-cell membrane with annotated channel complement (Na_{V}, Kv1, Kv4, HCN/I_{h}, KCNQ/M, SK) and qualitative voltage-clamp traces; channel inventory is consistent with the cortical VIP intrinsic-property literature {cite:p}`Tremblay2016,Pronneke2015,Vucurovic2010`. *Panel B:* Two competing mechanism schematics for irregular-spiking — *(i)* Kv1-dominant repolarisation kinetics (block by 4-AP / dendrotoxin converts to sustained firing) {cite:p}`Porter1998`; *(ii)* KCNQ-mediated M-current (block by linopirdine selectively converts IS to tonic in IS VIP cells) {cite:p}`Goff2019,Guetmccreight2020b` — with predicted current-clamp signatures. *Panel C:* Decision flow mapping intrinsic-feature combinations (high R_{in} + IS + low sag → cluster A; high R_{in} + adapting + moderate sag → cluster B) onto Patch-seq Vip-MET types {cite:p}`Gouwens2020a` and *Vip* t-type axes {cite:p}`Scala2021`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Serotonin 3A Receptor Subtype as an Early and Protracted Marker of Cortical Interneuron Subpopulations
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss ion channels (Kv1, KCNQ, HCN) or irregular-spiking mechanisms.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Sources include {cite:t}`Karnani2016a`, {cite:t}`Walker2016`, {cite:t}`Karnani2016a`, {cite:t}`Wall2016`, {cite:t}`Lee2013`, {cite:t}`Zhang2014`, {cite:t}`Williams2019`, {cite:t}`Cruikshank2012`, {cite:t}`Anastasiades2021a`, {cite:t}`Audette2018`, {cite:t}`Porter1999`, {cite:t}`Fu2014`, {cite:t}`Arroyo2012`, {cite:t}`Ferezou2002`, {cite:t}`Vucurovic2010`, {cite:t}`Kawaguchi1998`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Serotonin 3A Receptor Subtype as an Early and Protracted Marker of Cortical Interneuron Subpopulations
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss afferent synaptic drive or connectivity matrices for VIP/SST/PV.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Cortical 5-HT3AR-expressing GABAergic interneurons — the molecular umbrella that contains nearly all VIP cells {cite:p}`Rudy2011, Lee2010, Vucurovic2010, Frazer2017` — are excited by serotonin via 5-HT3 receptors that produce a fast inward current absent from PV and SST cells {cite:p}`Ferezou2002, Vucurovic2010, Frazer2017`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Serotonin 3A Receptor Subtype as an Early and Protracted Marker of Cortical Interneuron Subpopulations
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract identifies 5-HT3A interneurons but does not report fast inward current or absence from PV/SST cells.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The synaptic-connectivity picture that emerges from 467 papers is a structured composite. **On the input side**, VIP interneurons are a preferential target of long-range cortical and higher-order thalamic glutamatergic input, of basal-forebrain cholinergic input via slow nicotinic receptors, of raphe serotonergic input via 5-HT3 receptors, and of mixed-sign noradrenergic input — while local pyramidal drive is comparable to that onto SST and PV cells {cite:p}`Wall2016, Lee2013, Zhang2014, Williams2019, Anastasiades2021a, Cruikshank2012, Audette2018, Stachniak2023, Bilash2023, Porter1999, Kawaguchi1997b, Kawaguchi1998, Vonengelhardt2007, Arroyo2012, Fu2014, Ferezou2002, Vucurovic2010, Frazer2017, Letzkus2011`. **On the output side**, VIP cells preferentially inhibit SST interneurons, but they also inhibit PV cells in deeper layers, NDNF/L1 interneurons, pyramidal cells in deep cortex and OLM cells in CA1, with substantial cell-to-cell heterogeneity that the canonical schematic flattens {cite:p}`Pfeffer2013, Pi2013, Lee2013, Karnani2016a, Karnani2016b, Walker2016, Yu2019, Zhou2017, Anastasiades2021a, Schuman2019, Hafner2021, Tyan2014, Turi2019, Francavilla2018a, Booker2018`. **On the behavioural side**, the consequence of this wiring is a deployable disinhibitory operation that is recruited by arousal and reinforcement signals across V1, A1, mPFC, BLA and CA1, but which is sign-dependent on visual context, source-area-specific in cross-modal attention, and layer-dependent in its non-SST outputs {cite:p}`Fu2014, Pi2013, Letzkus2011, Krabbe2019, Pakan2016, Dipoppa2018, Sabri2024, Kamigaki2017, Pinto2015, Szadai2022, Tamboli2024, Ibrahim2016, Kaneko2024, Anastasiades2021a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Serotonin 3A Receptor Subtype as an Early and Protracted Marker of Cortical Interneuron Subpopulations
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss synaptic connectivity, disinhibition, or modulatory input patterns to VIP cells.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: A useful operational summary is the following. *Treat the VIP→SST→Pyr disinhibitory motif as a layer- and area-specific computation that a cortical microcircuit can perform when modulator-targeted afferents are active, not as a fixed wiring rule that all VIP cells obey under all conditions*. This formulation accommodates the canonical landmark results {cite:p}`Pfeffer2013, Pi2013, Lee2013, Fu2014, Karnani2016a, Karnani2016b`, the long-range and thalamic asymmetries {cite:p}`Wall2016, Williams2019, Anastasiades2021a, Audette2018, Stachniak2023, Bilash2023, Cruikshank2012`, the modulator pharmacology {cite:p}`Porter1999, Kawaguchi1997b, Arroyo2012, Vonengelhardt2007, Granger2020, Obermayer2019, Letzkus2011, Ferezou2002, Vucurovic2010, Frazer2017`, the layer- and area-specific exceptions to canonical disinhibition {cite:p}`Yu2019, Zhou2017, Anastasiades2021a, Walker2016`, the developmental and comparative qualifications {cite:p}`Favuzzi2019, Batistabrito2017, Qiu2020, Simacek2025a, Vormsteinschneider2020, Defelipe1999`, and the hippocampal divergence {cite:p}`Tyan2014, Turi2019, Francavilla2018a, Booker2018, Bilash2023, Tamboli2024, Toth1993` within a single coherent picture.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Serotonin 3A Receptor Subtype as an Early and Protracted Marker of Cortical Interneuron Subpopulations
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss disinhibitory motifs, modulator pharmacology, or developmental qualifications in this context.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Guetmccreight2020b` made the orthogonality explicit: in cortex, IS firing does not co-segregate cleanly with calretinin or CCK co-expression, nor with bipolar versus multipolar morphology, so IS is best treated as an electrophysiological category orthogonal to the marker axes {cite:p}`Guetmccreight2020b`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Common Principles in Functional Organization of VIP/Calretinin Cell-Driven Disinhibitory Circuits Across Cortical Areas
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract discusses VIP/CR disinhibitory circuits but doesn't explicitly state IS firing is orthogonal to marker axes.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Guetmccreight2020b` made the orthogonality explicit: in cortex, IS firing does not co-segregate cleanly with calretinin or CCK co-expression, nor with bipolar versus multipolar morphology, so IS is best treated as an electrophysiological category orthogonal to the marker axes {cite:p}`Guetmccreight2020b`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Common Principles in Functional Organization of VIP/Calretinin Cell-Driven Disinhibitory Circuits Across Cortical Areas
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract discusses VIP/CR disinhibitory circuits but doesn't explicitly state IS firing is orthogonal to marker axes.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The same paper organised hippocampal IS interneurons into I-S1, I-S2, and I-S3 subtypes — with I-S3 (VIP+/CR−, high R_{in}) showing irregular firing and theta-rhythm-locked spiking {cite:p}`Guetmccreight2020b` — and recorded a strong laminar bias in CR/VIP overlap (71% of CR+ cells are VIP+ in L2/3 but 94% in L5/6, with 43% VIP-only and 29% CR-only cells) that further severs the IS↔CR identity {cite:p}`Guetmccreight2020b`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Common Principles in Functional Organization of VIP/Calretinin Cell-Driven Disinhibitory Circuits Across Cortical Areas
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract doesn't mention I-S1/I-S2/I-S3 subtypes or specific laminar CR/VIP overlap percentages.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The same paper organised hippocampal IS interneurons into I-S1, I-S2, and I-S3 subtypes — with I-S3 (VIP+/CR−, high R_{in}) showing irregular firing and theta-rhythm-locked spiking {cite:p}`Guetmccreight2020b` — and recorded a strong laminar bias in CR/VIP overlap (71% of CR+ cells are VIP+ in L2/3 but 94% in L5/6, with 43% VIP-only and 29% CR-only cells) that further severs the IS↔CR identity {cite:p}`Guetmccreight2020b`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Common Principles in Functional Organization of VIP/Calretinin Cell-Driven Disinhibitory Circuits Across Cortical Areas
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract doesn't mention I-S1/I-S2/I-S3 subtypes or specific laminar CR/VIP overlap percentages.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The irregularity of IS firing is mechanistically interesting because it is a *positive* phenotype — a specific spiking pattern that selectively converts under pharmacological perturbation — and therefore a place where ion-channel substrates can be cleanly tested {cite:p}`Porter1998,Goff2019,Guetmccreight2020b,Tremblay2016`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Common Principles in Functional Organization of VIP/Calretinin Cell-Driven Disinhibitory Circuits Across Cortical Areas
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract doesn't discuss IS firing mechanisms, ion channels, or pharmacological conversion of firing patterns.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Guetmccreight2020b` independently reproduced the M-current finding in a Scn1a⁺/⁻ mouse model: linopirdine eliminated IS firing only in IS VIP+ cells, with selective firing-rate-gain reductions in the same subset {cite:p}`Guetmccreight2020b`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Common Principles in Functional Organization of VIP/Calretinin Cell-Driven Disinhibitory Circuits Across Cortical Areas
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract doesn't mention Scn1a+/- model, linopirdine, M-current, or KCNQ5 findings.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Guetmccreight2020b` independently reproduced the M-current finding in a Scn1a⁺/⁻ mouse model: linopirdine eliminated IS firing only in IS VIP+ cells, with selective firing-rate-gain reductions in the same subset {cite:p}`Guetmccreight2020b`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Common Principles in Functional Organization of VIP/Calretinin Cell-Driven Disinhibitory Circuits Across Cortical Areas
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract doesn't mention Scn1a+/- model, linopirdine, M-current, or KCNQ5 findings.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: **Candidate ion-channel substrates of irregular-spiking firing in VIP cells.** *Panel A:* Cartoon VIP-cell membrane with annotated channel complement (Na_{V}, Kv1, Kv4, HCN/I_{h}, KCNQ/M, SK) and qualitative voltage-clamp traces; channel inventory is consistent with the cortical VIP intrinsic-property literature {cite:p}`Tremblay2016,Pronneke2015,Vucurovic2010`. *Panel B:* Two competing mechanism schematics for irregular-spiking — *(i)* Kv1-dominant repolarisation kinetics (block by 4-AP / dendrotoxin converts to sustained firing) {cite:p}`Porter1998`; *(ii)* KCNQ-mediated M-current (block by linopirdine selectively converts IS to tonic in IS VIP cells) {cite:p}`Goff2019,Guetmccreight2020b` — with predicted current-clamp signatures. *Panel C:* Decision flow mapping intrinsic-feature combinations (high R_{in} + IS + low sag → cluster A; high R_{in} + adapting + moderate sag → cluster B) onto Patch-seq Vip-MET types {cite:p}`Gouwens2020a` and *Vip* t-type axes {cite:p}`Scala2021`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Common Principles in Functional Organization of VIP/Calretinin Cell-Driven Disinhibitory Circuits Across Cortical Areas
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract doesn't detail specific ion channels, Kv1 vs KCNQ mechanisms, or intrinsic-feature clustering.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The neuromodulator-coupled excitability is functionally consequential: in cortex, VIP cells are nonspecifically active across behavioural states {cite:p}`Jackson2016`, are recruited by reinforcement signals (both punishment and reward) in awake auditory cortex and mPFC {cite:p}`Pi2013`, are bidirectionally modulated by locomotion in V1 {cite:p}`Guetmccreight2020b`, and exhibit complementary contrast tuning to SST cells in V1 {cite:p}`Millman2020`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Common Principles in Functional Organization of VIP/Calretinin Cell-Driven Disinhibitory Circuits Across Cortical Areas
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract mentions behavioral task enhancement but not specific details about locomotion, contrast tuning, or reinforcement signals.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Within VIP, however, individual properties (resting V_{m}, IS-firing fraction, IS mechanism) vary substantially across studies — sometimes for biological reasons (layer-specific subtypes {cite:p}`Pronneke2015,Gouwens2020a`, species expansion {cite:p}`Bakken2021a,Chartrand2023`, region-specific I-S3 vs cortical IS biology {cite:p}`Guetmccreight2020b,Michaud2024`), sometimes for methodological ones (denominator definitions {cite:p}`Cauli1997,Cauli2000,Anastasiades2021a`, recording vintage {cite:p}`Bell2015,Michaud2024`).
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Common Principles in Functional Organization of VIP/Calretinin Cell-Driven Disinhibitory Circuits Across Cortical Areas
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract discusses diversity across cortical areas but not specific IS-firing variability or I-S3 biology details.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: In mouse barrel cortex, vibrissa motor cortex (vM1) projects more strongly onto VIP cells than onto neighbouring pyramidal neurons, with input ratios of roughly threefold {cite:p}`Lee2013, Williams2019, Audette2018`; analogous over-targeting of VIP by long-range cortical fibres has been most cleanly demonstrated for the cingulate→V1 projection {cite:p}`Zhang2014`, with related VIP-preferential top-down recruitment reported in mPFC and frontal-feedback contexts {cite:p}`Anastasiades2021a, Wall2016`; orbital→sensory and other higher-order routes are not yet independently mapped at the same resolution and we treat them here as extrapolations from the cingulate→V1 result.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Brain-Wide Maps of Synaptic Input to Cortical Interneurons
insufficient_triples.note: The abstract reports somatosensory (S1) cortex, not barrel cortex vM1→VIP ratio of ~3×. No specific vM1→VIP/Pyr ratio mentioned.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Two-photon photostimulation by {cite:t}`Karnani2016b`, paired-recording with multi-target post-synaptic sampling by {cite:t}`Walker2016` and rabies-based output mapping by {cite:t}`Wall2016` all converge on the conclusion that individual VIP cells are not uniformly biased to a single target type — there is substantial cell-to-cell variability in the relative weight of VIP→SST, VIP→PV and VIP→Pyr outputs, and the population mean is dominated by a subset of strongly-connected cells {cite:p}`Karnani2016b, Walker2016, Wall2016, Pronneke2019`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Brain-Wide Maps of Synaptic Input to Cortical Interneurons
insufficient_triples.note: Wall et al. mapped inputs to interneurons, not single-cell output heterogeneity of VIP→SST/PV/Pyr connections.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Two-photon photostimulation by {cite:t}`Karnani2016b`, paired-recording with multi-target post-synaptic sampling by {cite:t}`Walker2016` and rabies-based output mapping by {cite:t}`Wall2016` all converge on the conclusion that individual VIP cells are not uniformly biased to a single target type — there is substantial cell-to-cell variability in the relative weight of VIP→SST, VIP→PV and VIP→Pyr outputs, and the population mean is dominated by a subset of strongly-connected cells {cite:p}`Karnani2016b, Walker2016, Wall2016, Pronneke2019`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Brain-Wide Maps of Synaptic Input to Cortical Interneurons
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract describes inputs to interneurons, not cell-to-cell variability in VIP output weights.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Once one accepts that VIP outputs include direct PV and pyramidal inhibition in some layers and areas, that long-range afferents are a structured asymmetry rather than a uniform "top-down→VIP" rule, and that neuromodulator pharmacology is mostly but not entirely excitatory, the apparent disagreements collapse to a smaller set of well-characterised quantitative gradients along axis variables (layer, area, source nucleus, behavioural state) that future work could in principle saturate {cite:p}`Wall2016, Pfeffer2013, Yu2019, Pi2013, Lee2013, Karnani2016a, Sabri2024, Anastasiades2021a, Pronneke2019, Tasic2018`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Brain-Wide Maps of Synaptic Input to Cortical Interneurons
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract doesn't address VIP direct PV/pyramidal inhibition, neuromodulator pharmacology, or quantitative gradients along axes.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The integrated multimodal Patch-seq atlas of {cite:t}`Gouwens2020a` placed these e-types into a 28-MET-type taxonomy of >4,200 mouse VISp GABAergic interneurons, with ~78% MET-type prediction accuracy from electrophysiology + morphology and a Patch-seq subthreshold-2 PC correlated with input resistance at r = 0.90 {cite:p}`Gouwens2020a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Integrated Morphoelectric and Transcriptomic Classification of Cortical GABAergic Cells
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract confirms 28 met-types and >4,200 neurons but does not mention ~78% prediction accuracy or r=0.90 correlation.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The integrated multimodal Patch-seq atlas of {cite:t}`Gouwens2020a` placed these e-types into a 28-MET-type taxonomy of >4,200 mouse VISp GABAergic interneurons, with ~78% MET-type prediction accuracy from electrophysiology + morphology and a Patch-seq subthreshold-2 PC correlated with input resistance at r = 0.90 {cite:p}`Gouwens2020a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Integrated Morphoelectric and Transcriptomic Classification of Cortical GABAergic Cells
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract confirms 28 met-types and >4,200 neurons but does not mention ~78% prediction accuracy or r=0.90 correlation.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The Vip subclass partitions into five MET-types in mouse VISp (Vip-MET-1 through Vip-MET-5), all bipolar/bitufted but with distinct intrinsic-firing fingerprints — Vip-MET-1 fires regular sustained spikes (Npy+, L2/3–L4), Vip-MET-2 fires irregularly, and Vip-MET-4/5 show elevated sag {cite:p}`Gouwens2020a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Integrated Morphoelectric and Transcriptomic Classification of Cortical GABAergic Cells
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not detail Vip-MET subtypes, their number, firing patterns, or sag properties.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The combined picture — sharp subclass boundaries, fuzzy within-subclass partitions — is the modern reformulation of the Petilla taxonomy: subclass identity (VIP vs SST vs PV vs Lamp5/Sncg) is a real categorical variable; e-type identity within the VIP subclass is, at present, a continuous one {cite:p}`Gouwens2020a,Scala2021,Bugeon2022,Yao2021a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Integrated Morphoelectric and Transcriptomic Classification of Cortical GABAergic Cells
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract describes discrete and continuous variation but does not specifically argue VIP within-subclass is continuous.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Kim2023` then showed that a Patch-seq-trained classifier of human cortical subclass identity (PVALB vs non-PVALB) is dominated by AP height, sag, AP-upstroke adaptation ratio, and τ_{m} — features that {cite:t}`Gouwens2020a` and {cite:t}`Gouwens2019` independently identified in mouse — confirming convergence at the subclass-feature level even where within-subclass partitions diverge {cite:p}`Kim2023,Gouwens2020a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Integrated Morphoelectric and Transcriptomic Classification of Cortical GABAergic Cells
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not mention human Patch-seq classifier or features like AP height, sag, τ_m for subclass classification.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Kim2023` then showed that a Patch-seq-trained classifier of human cortical subclass identity (PVALB vs non-PVALB) is dominated by AP height, sag, AP-upstroke adaptation ratio, and τ_{m} — features that {cite:t}`Gouwens2020a` and {cite:t}`Gouwens2019` independently identified in mouse — confirming convergence at the subclass-feature level even where within-subclass partitions diverge {cite:p}`Kim2023,Gouwens2020a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Integrated Morphoelectric and Transcriptomic Classification of Cortical GABAergic Cells
insufficient_triples.note: Claim attributes human Patch-seq classifier results to this paper; abstract is mouse-only and silent on this.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The broader conclusion the Patch-seq literature now supports is that subclass-level e-type prediction is reproducibly accurate (~78% MET-type prediction in mouse VISp {cite:p}`Gouwens2020a`), but within-VIP biophysical heterogeneity is real and reflects a continuum of identities rather than discrete cell types {cite:p}`Scala2021,Bugeon2022,Lee2023a,Bakken2021a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Integrated Morphoelectric and Transcriptomic Classification of Cortical GABAergic Cells
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract confirms 28 met-types but does not specify ~78% accuracy or within-VIP continuum conclusion.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: **Candidate ion-channel substrates of irregular-spiking firing in VIP cells.** *Panel A:* Cartoon VIP-cell membrane with annotated channel complement (Na_{V}, Kv1, Kv4, HCN/I_{h}, KCNQ/M, SK) and qualitative voltage-clamp traces; channel inventory is consistent with the cortical VIP intrinsic-property literature {cite:p}`Tremblay2016,Pronneke2015,Vucurovic2010`. *Panel B:* Two competing mechanism schematics for irregular-spiking — *(i)* Kv1-dominant repolarisation kinetics (block by 4-AP / dendrotoxin converts to sustained firing) {cite:p}`Porter1998`; *(ii)* KCNQ-mediated M-current (block by linopirdine selectively converts IS to tonic in IS VIP cells) {cite:p}`Goff2019,Guetmccreight2020b` — with predicted current-clamp signatures. *Panel C:* Decision flow mapping intrinsic-feature combinations (high R_{in} + IS + low sag → cluster A; high R_{in} + adapting + moderate sag → cluster B) onto Patch-seq Vip-MET types {cite:p}`Gouwens2020a` and *Vip* t-type axes {cite:p}`Scala2021`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Integrated Morphoelectric and Transcriptomic Classification of Cortical GABAergic Cells
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss ion channels, VIP channel complement, or Vip-MET type mapping to firing mechanisms.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Within VIP, however, individual properties (resting V_{m}, IS-firing fraction, IS mechanism) vary substantially across studies — sometimes for biological reasons (layer-specific subtypes {cite:p}`Pronneke2015,Gouwens2020a`, species expansion {cite:p}`Bakken2021a,Chartrand2023`, region-specific I-S3 vs cortical IS biology {cite:p}`Guetmccreight2020b,Michaud2024`), sometimes for methodological ones (denominator definitions {cite:p}`Cauli1997,Cauli2000,Anastasiades2021a`, recording vintage {cite:p}`Bell2015,Michaud2024`).
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Integrated Morphoelectric and Transcriptomic Classification of Cortical GABAergic Cells
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss layer-specific VIP subtypes or within-VIP property variation across studies.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The receptor mediating this excitation is predominantly a non-α7, β2-containing nAChR with a slow desensitisation profile that can sustain VIP firing for many seconds after a brief cholinergic transient {cite:p}`Arroyo2012, Porter1999, Fu2014, Letzkus2011`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: A disinhibitory microcircuit for associative fear learning in the auditory cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract mentions cholinergic activation of L1 interneurons but no detail on non-α7/β2 nAChR subtype or desensitisation profile.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Noradrenergic recruitment is the least monolithic of the three: α-adrenergic stimulation excites a fraction of VIP/CR cells in slice {cite:p}`Kawaguchi1998, Cauli2014, Caputi2009`, while β-adrenergic and tonic LC-driven effects vary across area, behavioural state and recording configuration {cite:p}`Kawaguchi1998, Cauli2014, Letzkus2011, Szadai2022`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: A disinhibitory microcircuit for associative fear learning in the auditory cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract says nothing about noradrenergic or α/β-adrenergic effects on VIP cells.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The functional consequence is that VIP cells preferentially read *sustained or rhythmically-paced* inputs over transient ones — a property aligned with their behavioural recruitment by tonic state variables (locomotion, arousal, reinforcement) rather than by isolated transient events {cite:p}`Fu2014, Pakan2016, Sabri2024, Letzkus2011`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: A disinhibitory microcircuit for associative fear learning in the auditory cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss sustained vs transient input preference or short-term plasticity of VIP inputs.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The implication is that VIP cells are not only modulator-targeted but also, in part, *modulator-providing*: a fraction of the cholinergic recruitment described in the previous subsection is intracortical rather than purely subcortical in origin {cite:p}`Granger2020, Obermayer2019, Vonengelhardt2007, Dudai2020, Letzkus2011`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: A disinhibitory microcircuit for associative fear learning in the auditory cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss VIP cells as modulator-providing or intracortical cholinergic sources.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The synaptic-connectivity picture that emerges from 467 papers is a structured composite. **On the input side**, VIP interneurons are a preferential target of long-range cortical and higher-order thalamic glutamatergic input, of basal-forebrain cholinergic input via slow nicotinic receptors, of raphe serotonergic input via 5-HT3 receptors, and of mixed-sign noradrenergic input — while local pyramidal drive is comparable to that onto SST and PV cells {cite:p}`Wall2016, Lee2013, Zhang2014, Williams2019, Anastasiades2021a, Cruikshank2012, Audette2018, Stachniak2023, Bilash2023, Porter1999, Kawaguchi1997b, Kawaguchi1998, Vonengelhardt2007, Arroyo2012, Fu2014, Ferezou2002, Vucurovic2010, Frazer2017, Letzkus2011`. **On the output side**, VIP cells preferentially inhibit SST interneurons, but they also inhibit PV cells in deeper layers, NDNF/L1 interneurons, pyramidal cells in deep cortex and OLM cells in CA1, with substantial cell-to-cell heterogeneity that the canonical schematic flattens {cite:p}`Pfeffer2013, Pi2013, Lee2013, Karnani2016a, Karnani2016b, Walker2016, Yu2019, Zhou2017, Anastasiades2021a, Schuman2019, Hafner2021, Tyan2014, Turi2019, Francavilla2018a, Booker2018`. **On the behavioural side**, the consequence of this wiring is a deployable disinhibitory operation that is recruited by arousal and reinforcement signals across V1, A1, mPFC, BLA and CA1, but which is sign-dependent on visual context, source-area-specific in cross-modal attention, and layer-dependent in its non-SST outputs {cite:p}`Fu2014, Pi2013, Letzkus2011, Krabbe2019, Pakan2016, Dipoppa2018, Sabri2024, Kamigaki2017, Pinto2015, Szadai2022, Tamboli2024, Ibrahim2016, Kaneko2024, Anastasiades2021a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: A disinhibitory microcircuit for associative fear learning in the auditory cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract supports disinhibition in A1 but not the broad multi-area, multi-modulator synthesis claimed here.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The synaptic-connectivity picture that emerges from 467 papers is a structured composite. **On the input side**, VIP interneurons are a preferential target of long-range cortical and higher-order thalamic glutamatergic input, of basal-forebrain cholinergic input via slow nicotinic receptors, of raphe serotonergic input via 5-HT3 receptors, and of mixed-sign noradrenergic input — while local pyramidal drive is comparable to that onto SST and PV cells {cite:p}`Wall2016, Lee2013, Zhang2014, Williams2019, Anastasiades2021a, Cruikshank2012, Audette2018, Stachniak2023, Bilash2023, Porter1999, Kawaguchi1997b, Kawaguchi1998, Vonengelhardt2007, Arroyo2012, Fu2014, Ferezou2002, Vucurovic2010, Frazer2017, Letzkus2011`. **On the output side**, VIP cells preferentially inhibit SST interneurons, but they also inhibit PV cells in deeper layers, NDNF/L1 interneurons, pyramidal cells in deep cortex and OLM cells in CA1, with substantial cell-to-cell heterogeneity that the canonical schematic flattens {cite:p}`Pfeffer2013, Pi2013, Lee2013, Karnani2016a, Karnani2016b, Walker2016, Yu2019, Zhou2017, Anastasiades2021a, Schuman2019, Hafner2021, Tyan2014, Turi2019, Francavilla2018a, Booker2018`. **On the behavioural side**, the consequence of this wiring is a deployable disinhibitory operation that is recruited by arousal and reinforcement signals across V1, A1, mPFC, BLA and CA1, but which is sign-dependent on visual context, source-area-specific in cross-modal attention, and layer-dependent in its non-SST outputs {cite:p}`Fu2014, Pi2013, Letzkus2011, Krabbe2019, Pakan2016, Dipoppa2018, Sabri2024, Kamigaki2017, Pinto2015, Szadai2022, Tamboli2024, Ibrahim2016, Kaneko2024, Anastasiades2021a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: A disinhibitory microcircuit for associative fear learning in the auditory cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Same as above; abstract doesn't cover the detailed input/output/behavioural composite synthesis attributed.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Second, the *minimum sufficient circuit model* needed to explain disease-relevant phenotypes (autism, schizophrenia, anxiety, neonatal injury) cannot rely on canonical disinhibition alone; it must accommodate the layer-dependent direct VIP→Pyr/PV path, the area-tuned long-range asymmetries and the modulator-recruited gain control reviewed here {cite:p}`Yu2019, Zhou2017, Anastasiades2021a, Letzkus2011, Sabri2024, Krabbe2019`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: A disinhibitory microcircuit for associative fear learning in the auditory cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract says nothing about disease models, direct VIP→Pyr/PV path, or minimum sufficient circuit models.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: CA1 VIP+ cells partition into two coarse classes: VIP+/CR+ interneuron-specific type-3 (IS3) cells, which selectively innervate other interneurons, and a smaller VIP+/CCK+ basket-cell population, which targets pyramidal somata in the perisomatic domain {cite:p}`Tyan2014, Turi2019, Francavilla2018a, Booker2018`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Vasoactive Intestinal Polypeptide-Expressing Interneurons in the Hippocampus Support Goal-Oriented Spatial Learning
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract discusses VIP+ INs as disinhibitory but does not detail VIP+/CR+ IS3 vs VIP+/CCK+ basket-cell subtypes or their specific targets.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Detailed paired-recording, electron-microscopic and intersectional optogenetic dissection of the IS3 class shows that — unlike its cortical VIP counterpart — its principal output is not the SST cell but the *oriens-lacunosum moleculare* (OLM) interneuron, with strong, facilitating IPSCs that suppress OLM firing during sharp-wave ripples and during theta-rhythmic dendritic input from entorhinal cortex {cite:p}`Tyan2014, Francavilla2018a, Tamboli2024, Turi2019`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Vasoactive Intestinal Polypeptide-Expressing Interneurons in the Hippocampus Support Goal-Oriented Spatial Learning
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not mention IS3→OLM synapse, paired recordings, EM, facilitating IPSCs, or sharp-wave ripple suppression specifically.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The afferent picture mirrors the output one: lateral entorhinal cortex provides the dominant glutamatergic drive onto VIP/IS3 cells in stratum lacunosum-moleculare {cite:p}`Bilash2023, Turi2019, Tyan2014, Booker2018`, and arousal- or novelty-related signals robustly increase IS3 activity during free spatial exploration {cite:p}`Tamboli2024, Francavilla2018a, Turi2019`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Vasoactive Intestinal Polypeptide-Expressing Interneurons in the Hippocampus Support Goal-Oriented Spatial Learning
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract doesn't mention lateral entorhinal cortex driving VIP/IS3 cells in s.l.-m. specifically.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The CCK+/VIP+ basket subset, by contrast, deploys a perisomatic inhibition reminiscent of cortical PV cells but with the cannabinoid- and opioid-modulated short-term plasticity of CCK basket cells {cite:p}`Booker2018, Turi2019, Francavilla2018a, Caputi2009`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Vasoactive Intestinal Polypeptide-Expressing Interneurons in the Hippocampus Support Goal-Oriented Spatial Learning
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss CCK+/VIP+ basket cells, perisomatic inhibition, or cannabinoid/opioid modulation.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Cauli2014` documented that CR+/VIP+ bipolar interneurons produce facilitating IPSCs onto SOM Martinotti cells, and the IS3 VIP→OLM synapse in CA1 is similarly facilitating during theta-rhythmic input {cite:p}`Tyan2014, Francavilla2018a, Turi2019`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Vasoactive Intestinal Polypeptide-Expressing Interneurons in the Hippocampus Support Goal-Oriented Spatial Learning
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss facilitating IPSCs at IS3→OLM synapses or theta-rhythmic input specifically.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: In hippocampus, VIP cells implement a structurally distinct motif: rather than VIP→SST→Pyr disinhibition, CA1 VIP cells preferentially target SST OLM cells and PV basket cells, producing temporally precise theta-rhythmic disinhibition that gates input-specific plasticity {cite:p}`Turi2019,Francavilla2018a,Dudai2020`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Vasoactive Intestinal Polypeptide-Expressing Interneurons in the Hippocampus Support Goal-Oriented Spatial Learning
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract mentions VIP disinhibition in CA1 but not specific VIP→OLM or VIP→PV targeting, theta-rhythmic disinhibition, or input-specific plasticity gating.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: **Hippocampal VIP→OLM and VIP→basket-cell disinhibition.** In CA1 and dentate gyrus, VIP cells, including the calretinin-positive and CCK-positive subsets, form a structurally distinct motif: VIP/CR cells inhibit OLM cells (the SST analogue) and basket cells (the PV analogue) in a temporally precise, theta-rhythmic manner that gates Schaffer-collateral and entorhinal input streams {cite:p}`Turi2019,Francavilla2018a,Dudai2020,Tamboli2024,Ramosprats2022`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Vasoactive Intestinal Polypeptide-Expressing Interneurons in the Hippocampus Support Goal-Oriented Spatial Learning
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract doesn't detail VIP/CR→OLM or VIP→basket-cell targeting, theta-rhythmic gating, or Schaffer-collateral/entorhinal stream gating.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Conditional manipulations of intrinsic-excitability regulators establish causal links: deletion of Igf1 in VIP cells increases inhibitory drive onto VIP cells and decreases their firing {cite:p}`Mardinly2016`, and ErbB4 deletion in VIP-INs causes a long-term ~4-fold increase in pyramidal-cell spontaneous firing in adolescence and abolishes locomotion-induced state transitions {cite:p}`Batistabrito2017`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Developmental Dysfunction of VIP Interneurons Impairs Cortical Circuits
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract confirms ErbB4 deletion in VIP cells alters activity and cortical circuits, but does not mention a ~4-fold increase in pyramidal-cell spontaneous firing.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Batistabrito2017` showed that conditional ErbB4 deletion in VIP cells produces a long-term ~4-fold elevation in spontaneous pyramidal-cell firing that emerges in adolescence and abolishes locomotion-induced state transitions, implicating an adolescent maturation window for VIP intrinsic excitability {cite:p}`Batistabrito2017`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Developmental Dysfunction of VIP Interneurons Impairs Cortical Circuits
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract confirms alterations emerge in adolescence and state dependence is disrupted, but ~4-fold pyramidal firing increase and 'abolishes locomotion-induced state transitions' not in abstract.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Batistabrito2017` showed that conditional ErbB4 deletion in VIP cells produces a long-term ~4-fold elevation in spontaneous pyramidal-cell firing that emerges in adolescence and abolishes locomotion-induced state transitions, implicating an adolescent maturation window for VIP intrinsic excitability {cite:p}`Batistabrito2017`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Developmental Dysfunction of VIP Interneurons Impairs Cortical Circuits
insufficient_triples.note: Same as above; specific quantitative claim (~4-fold) and locomotion-state-transition abolishment not verifiable from abstract alone.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Batistabrito2017` further demonstrated that conditional ErbB4 deletion specifically in VIP interneurons, but not in PV or SST cells, disrupts cortical disinhibitory circuits and produces lasting changes in pyramidal cell excitability — a result that ties the molecular identity of VIP cells ({ref}`sec-development`) to the specific connectivity rules described here.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Developmental Dysfunction of VIP Interneurons Impairs Cortical Circuits
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract confirms ErbB4 deletion in VIP cells disrupts circuits and activity, but does not state that PV/SST-specific deletions were tested and showed no effect.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: PV cells contribute a smaller but non-negligible fraction of VIP-targeted inhibition, again compatible across visual, somatosensory and prefrontal slices {cite:p}`Pfeffer2013, Walker2016, Pronneke2019`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Neuromodulation Leads to a Burst-Tonic Switch in a Subset of VIP Neurons in Mouse Primary Somatosensory (Barrel) Cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract discusses VIP neuron firing and neuromodulation, not PV→VIP inhibitory connectivity.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The motif is not confined to mouse: pharmacological and optogenetic dissection in rat {cite:p}`Walker2016, Pronneke2019, Pronneke2015` and comparative meta-analytic syntheses across V1, A1 and S1 {cite:p}`Guetmccreight2020b, Pronneke2019, Karnani2016a` reach the same architectural conclusion.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Neuromodulation Leads to a Burst-Tonic Switch in a Subset of VIP Neurons in Mouse Primary Somatosensory (Barrel) Cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract is about VIP neuron firing modes in mouse barrel cortex, not cross-species or cross-area meta-analytic syntheses.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The motif is not confined to mouse: pharmacological and optogenetic dissection in rat {cite:p}`Walker2016, Pronneke2019, Pronneke2015` and comparative meta-analytic syntheses across V1, A1 and S1 {cite:p}`Guetmccreight2020b, Pronneke2019, Karnani2016a` reach the same architectural conclusion.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Neuromodulation Leads to a Burst-Tonic Switch in a Subset of VIP Neurons in Mouse Primary Somatosensory (Barrel) Cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Same as above; abstract does not address rat studies or meta-analytic comparisons across areas.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Two-photon photostimulation by {cite:t}`Karnani2016b`, paired-recording with multi-target post-synaptic sampling by {cite:t}`Walker2016` and rabies-based output mapping by {cite:t}`Wall2016` all converge on the conclusion that individual VIP cells are not uniformly biased to a single target type — there is substantial cell-to-cell variability in the relative weight of VIP→SST, VIP→PV and VIP→Pyr outputs, and the population mean is dominated by a subset of strongly-connected cells {cite:p}`Karnani2016b, Walker2016, Wall2016, Pronneke2019`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Neuromodulation Leads to a Burst-Tonic Switch in a Subset of VIP Neurons in Mouse Primary Somatosensory (Barrel) Cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract describes VIP firing heterogeneity, not single-cell connectivity variability in VIP→SST/PV/Pyr outputs.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Cauli2014` similarly described that CR/VIP bipolar interneurons receive predominantly depressing excitatory input from local pyramidal neurons {cite:p}`Karnani2016a, Cauli2014, Walker2016, Pronneke2019`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Neuromodulation Leads to a Burst-Tonic Switch in a Subset of VIP Neurons in Mouse Primary Somatosensory (Barrel) Cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss short-term dynamics of excitatory input onto VIP cells (depressing vs facilitating).

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Favuzzi2019` showed that the compartment specificity of the major interneuron classes — PV→soma/AIS, SST→dendrites, VIP→other interneurons — is determined by cell-type-specific cell-adhesion and wiring molecules whose expression patterns recapitulate the molecular taxonomy of {ref}`sec-development` {cite:p}`Tasic2018, Pronneke2019, Frazer2017, Favuzzi2019`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Neuromodulation Leads to a Burst-Tonic Switch in a Subset of VIP Neurons in Mouse Primary Somatosensory (Barrel) Cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss compartment specificity of inhibition or cell-adhesion/wiring molecules.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The connectivity diagram of {numref}`fig-vip-connectome` is, in this sense, a developmental construct supported by molecularly specified wiring rules — and small perturbations in those rules propagate to the network-level disinhibitory operation that subsequent sections will trace into behaviour and disease {cite:p}`Favuzzi2019, Batistabrito2017, Qiu2020, Tasic2018, Pronneke2019, Simacek2025a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Neuromodulation Leads to a Burst-Tonic Switch in a Subset of VIP Neurons in Mouse Primary Somatosensory (Barrel) Cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not address molecularly specified wiring rules or developmental construction of connectivity diagrams.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Once one accepts that VIP outputs include direct PV and pyramidal inhibition in some layers and areas, that long-range afferents are a structured asymmetry rather than a uniform "top-down→VIP" rule, and that neuromodulator pharmacology is mostly but not entirely excitatory, the apparent disagreements collapse to a smaller set of well-characterised quantitative gradients along axis variables (layer, area, source nucleus, behavioural state) that future work could in principle saturate {cite:p}`Wall2016, Pfeffer2013, Yu2019, Pi2013, Lee2013, Karnani2016a, Sabri2024, Anastasiades2021a, Pronneke2019, Tasic2018`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Neuromodulation Leads to a Burst-Tonic Switch in a Subset of VIP Neurons in Mouse Primary Somatosensory (Barrel) Cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract discusses neuromodulator pharmacology on VIP cells but not the broader circuit-motif synthesis claimed here.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: CA1 VIP+ cells partition into two coarse classes: VIP+/CR+ interneuron-specific type-3 (IS3) cells, which selectively innervate other interneurons, and a smaller VIP+/CCK+ basket-cell population, which targets pyramidal somata in the perisomatic domain {cite:p}`Tyan2014, Turi2019, Francavilla2018a, Booker2018`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Connectivity and network state-dependent recruitment of long-range VIP-GABAergic neurons in the mouse hippocampus
insufficient_triples.note: Paper focuses on VIP-LRPs projecting to subiculum; does not explicitly describe IS3 vs VIP+/CCK+ basket partition in abstract.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Detailed paired-recording, electron-microscopic and intersectional optogenetic dissection of the IS3 class shows that — unlike its cortical VIP counterpart — its principal output is not the SST cell but the *oriens-lacunosum moleculare* (OLM) interneuron, with strong, facilitating IPSCs that suppress OLM firing during sharp-wave ripples and during theta-rhythmic dendritic input from entorhinal cortex {cite:p}`Tyan2014, Francavilla2018a, Tamboli2024, Turi2019`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Connectivity and network state-dependent recruitment of long-range VIP-GABAergic neurons in the mouse hippocampus
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract mentions VIP-LRPs target interneurons in CA1 but does not detail IS3→OLM synapse properties or SWR suppression.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The CCK+/VIP+ basket subset, by contrast, deploys a perisomatic inhibition reminiscent of cortical PV cells but with the cannabinoid- and opioid-modulated short-term plasticity of CCK basket cells {cite:p}`Booker2018, Turi2019, Francavilla2018a, Caputi2009`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Connectivity and network state-dependent recruitment of long-range VIP-GABAergic neurons in the mouse hippocampus
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss CCK+/VIP+ basket cells or their perisomatic inhibition, cannabinoid, or opioid modulation.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Cauli2014` documented that CR+/VIP+ bipolar interneurons produce facilitating IPSCs onto SOM Martinotti cells, and the IS3 VIP→OLM synapse in CA1 is similarly facilitating during theta-rhythmic input {cite:p}`Tyan2014, Francavilla2018a, Turi2019`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Connectivity and network state-dependent recruitment of long-range VIP-GABAergic neurons in the mouse hippocampus
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not mention facilitating IPSCs or short-term plasticity of IS3→OLM synapses.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The synaptic-connectivity picture that emerges from 467 papers is a structured composite. **On the input side**, VIP interneurons are a preferential target of long-range cortical and higher-order thalamic glutamatergic input, of basal-forebrain cholinergic input via slow nicotinic receptors, of raphe serotonergic input via 5-HT3 receptors, and of mixed-sign noradrenergic input — while local pyramidal drive is comparable to that onto SST and PV cells {cite:p}`Wall2016, Lee2013, Zhang2014, Williams2019, Anastasiades2021a, Cruikshank2012, Audette2018, Stachniak2023, Bilash2023, Porter1999, Kawaguchi1997b, Kawaguchi1998, Vonengelhardt2007, Arroyo2012, Fu2014, Ferezou2002, Vucurovic2010, Frazer2017, Letzkus2011`. **On the output side**, VIP cells preferentially inhibit SST interneurons, but they also inhibit PV cells in deeper layers, NDNF/L1 interneurons, pyramidal cells in deep cortex and OLM cells in CA1, with substantial cell-to-cell heterogeneity that the canonical schematic flattens {cite:p}`Pfeffer2013, Pi2013, Lee2013, Karnani2016a, Karnani2016b, Walker2016, Yu2019, Zhou2017, Anastasiades2021a, Schuman2019, Hafner2021, Tyan2014, Turi2019, Francavilla2018a, Booker2018`. **On the behavioural side**, the consequence of this wiring is a deployable disinhibitory operation that is recruited by arousal and reinforcement signals across V1, A1, mPFC, BLA and CA1, but which is sign-dependent on visual context, source-area-specific in cross-modal attention, and layer-dependent in its non-SST outputs {cite:p}`Fu2014, Pi2013, Letzkus2011, Krabbe2019, Pakan2016, Dipoppa2018, Sabri2024, Kamigaki2017, Pinto2015, Szadai2022, Tamboli2024, Ibrahim2016, Kaneko2024, Anastasiades2021a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Connectivity and network state-dependent recruitment of long-range VIP-GABAergic neurons in the mouse hippocampus
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract discusses VIP-LRP connectivity and in vivo activity but does not address most specific claims in this synthesis paragraph.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The receptor mediating this excitation is predominantly a non-α7, β2-containing nAChR with a slow desensitisation profile that can sustain VIP firing for many seconds after a brief cholinergic transient {cite:p}`Arroyo2012, Porter1999, Fu2014, Letzkus2011`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Selective Excitation of Subtypes of Neocortical Interneurons by Nicotinic Receptors
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract confirms non-α7 β2-containing receptor but does not mention slow desensitisation profile or sustained firing for seconds.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Cells deliberately encode categories, not magnitudes. **(B)** Qualitative VIP output matrix across cortex L2/3, L5/6 and CA1; "n.t." = not tested in the cited preparations. **(C)** The single Phase-6-audited quantitative comparison: VIP→SST IPSQ = 4.6 ± 1.5 pC versus VIP→Pyr IPSQ = 0.6 ± 0.2 pC (and INC 0.42 ± 0.14 pC vs 0.06 ± 0.02 pC, scaled ×10 for visibility) from V1 L2/3 paired recordings (n = 11) {cite:p}`Pfeffer2013`. **(D)** Schematic of cholinergic recruitment of VIP / 5-HT3AR cells: nicotinic (slow, β2-containing) excitation and a smaller muscarinic inhibitory effect onto a subset of VIP cells, after {cite:t}`Porter1999`, {cite:t}`Arroyo2012`, {cite:t}`Fu2014`, {cite:t}`Obermayer2019` and {cite:t}`Granger2020`. **Caveat — qualitative.** All cells in panels A and B are categorical consensus; only panel C carries an audited numeric comparison. :::
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Prefrontal cortical ChAT-VIP interneurons provide local excitation by cholinergic synaptic transmission and control attention
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not mention IPSQ values, V1 L2/3 paired recordings, or the specific quantitative comparison described.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Granger2020` and {cite:t}`Obermayer2019` showed that cortical ChAT/VIP cells (~33% of VIP cells in mPFC) release ACh in addition to GABA, with target-specific GABA release that is robust onto interneurons and weaker onto pyramidal cells, and {cite:t}`Vonengelhardt2007` and {cite:t}`Dudai2020` demonstrated that the same cells provide a local cortical source of nicotinic excitation onto neighbouring fast-spiking and bipolar interneurons.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Prefrontal cortical ChAT-VIP interneurons provide local excitation by cholinergic synaptic transmission and control attention
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not specify ~33% proportion, target-specific GABA release differences, or nicotinic excitation onto fast-spiking interneurons specifically.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Cluster_13 of the cholinergic literature contains an explicit opposite-sign disagreement: {cite:t}`Arroyo2012` and convergent work establish that the dominant ACh effect on cortical VIP / 5-HT3AR cells is nicotinic excitation through slow, β2-containing nAChRs {cite:p}`Arroyo2012, Porter1999, Fu2014`, while {cite:t}`Poorthuis2018` and matched studies emphasise a muscarinic *inhibition* of a VIP subset {cite:p}`Poorthuis2018, Kawaguchi1997b, Obermayer2019, Granger2020`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Prefrontal cortical ChAT-VIP interneurons provide local excitation by cholinergic synaptic transmission and control attention
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss nicotinic excitation via slow β2-containing nAChRs on VIP cells or muscarinic inhibition of VIP cells.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Across visual, auditory, somatosensory, prefrontal, and motor cortex, optogenetic and chemogenetic manipulations of VIP cells have produced phenomena consistent with this motif {cite:p}`Pi2013,Lee2013,Fu2014,Zhang2014,Kuchibhotla2017,Cichon2017,Williams2019,Veit2023`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Cortical VIP neurons locally control the gain but globally control the coherence of gamma band rhythms
insufficient_triples.note: Paper only studies mouse V1, not auditory, somatosensory, prefrontal, or motor cortex.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Behavioural-state gain operates through several parallel inhibitory streams, of which the canonical motif is one; whether VIP disinhibition is the dominant stream depends on stimulus, area, and state {cite:p}`Pakan2016,Dipoppa2018,Veit2023`. :::
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Cortical VIP neurons locally control the gain but globally control the coherence of gamma band rhythms
insufficient_triples.note: Paper focuses on V1 gamma rhythms; doesn't broadly address multi-area/state dependence of VIP dominance.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The variability is attributable to (i) cortical area and layer, (ii) opsin dose and behavioural state during the perturbation, (iii) co-recruitment of VIP-mediated direct inhibition of pyramidal cells {cite:p}`Karnani2016b,Lee2013,Pi2013`, and (iv) co-recruitment of NDNF/Layer-1 interneurons whose top-down drive partially overlaps with that of VIP cells {cite:p}`Abs2018,Anastasiades2021a,Veit2023`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Cortical VIP neurons locally control the gain but globally control the coherence of gamma band rhythms
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract doesn't discuss variability causes, opsin dose, direct VIP→Pyr inhibition, or NDNF co-recruitment.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Pakan2016` reported, in the same cortical area but a broader behavioural range, that locomotion-evoked VIP and SST activity were not simple mirrors and that SST cells were not uniformly suppressed during locomotion. **Resolution:** the canonical motif holds as a *component* explanation in V1 superficial layers under top-down or cholinergic drive but does not generalise as a *sole* explanation across all behavioural contexts; cortical area, layer, and visual input together determine whether SST cells follow the canonical disinhibition trajectory or move independently {cite:p}`Dipoppa2018,Garrett2020,Stachniak2021,Veit2023`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Cortical VIP neurons locally control the gain but globally control the coherence of gamma band rhythms
insufficient_triples.note: Paper studies V1 not S1; doesn't report locomotion-evoked SST non-suppression or broader behavioural range.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The biological consequence is that the *net* sign of VIP perturbation on pyramidal firing reflects the balance between disinhibitory gain enhancement and direct inhibitory suppression, and can flip sign with task condition or stimulus drive {cite:p}`Garciadelmolino2017,Hertag2019,Veit2023`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Cortical VIP neurons locally control the gain but globally control the coherence of gamma band rhythms
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract doesn't discuss net sign flipping of VIP perturbation on pyramidal firing with task condition.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: **VIP→NDNF / VIP→layer-1 motifs.** Layer-1-resident interneurons expressing neuron-derived neurotrophic factor (NDNF) gate top-down input to apical pyramidal dendrites in a layer-specific manner {cite:p}`Abs2018,Anastasiades2021a,Veit2023`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Cortical VIP neurons locally control the gain but globally control the coherence of gamma band rhythms
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract doesn't mention NDNF cells or layer-1 interneurons.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: VIP cells contact and inhibit NDNF cells, providing an additional disinhibitory route that is engaged in fear learning, attention, and predictive processing tasks {cite:p}`Abs2018,Krabbe2019,Veit2023`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Cortical VIP neurons locally control the gain but globally control the coherence of gamma band rhythms

insufficient_triples.claim_text: **Candidate ion-channel substrates of irregular-spiking firing in VIP cells.** *Panel A:* Cartoon VIP-cell membrane with annotated channel complement (Na_{V}, Kv1, Kv4, HCN/I_{h}, KCNQ/M, SK) and qualitative voltage-clamp traces; channel inventory is consistent with the cortical VIP intrinsic-property literature {cite:p}`Tremblay2016,Pronneke2015,Vucurovic2010`. *Panel B:* Two competing mechanism schematics for irregular-spiking — *(i)* Kv1-dominant repolarisation kinetics (block by 4-AP / dendrotoxin converts to sustained firing) {cite:p}`Porter1998`; *(ii)* KCNQ-mediated M-current (block by linopirdine selectively converts IS to tonic in IS VIP cells) {cite:p}`Goff2019,Guetmccreight2020b` — with predicted current-clamp signatures. *Panel C:* Decision flow mapping intrinsic-feature combinations (high R_{in} + IS + low sag → cluster A; high R_{in} + adapting + moderate sag → cluster B) onto Patch-seq Vip-MET types {cite:p}`Gouwens2020a` and *Vip* t-type axes {cite:p}`Scala2021`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: GABAergic Interneurons in the Neocortex: From Cellular Properties to Circuits
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not detail specific channel inventories (Kv1, KCNQ, HCN, SK) for VIP cells.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Within VIP, however, individual properties (resting V_{m}, IS-firing fraction, IS mechanism) vary substantially across studies — sometimes for biological reasons (layer-specific subtypes {cite:p}`Pronneke2015,Gouwens2020a`, species expansion {cite:p}`Bakken2021a,Chartrand2023`, region-specific I-S3 vs cortical IS biology {cite:p}`Guetmccreight2020b,Michaud2024`), sometimes for methodological ones (denominator definitions {cite:p}`Cauli1997,Cauli2000,Anastasiades2021a`, recording vintage {cite:p}`Bell2015,Michaud2024`).
