insufficient_triples.paper_title: Dendritic Inhibition Provided by Interneuron-Specific Cells Controls the Firing Rate and Timing of the Hippocampal Feedback Inhibitory Circuitry
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract supports OLM targeting in CA1 but is silent on most other claims (thalamic input, nicotinic receptors, 5-HT3, noradrenergic input, etc.).

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Cell-type-specific connectivity rules — VIP cells preferentially targeting other interneurons, PV cells targeting soma and SST cells targeting dendrites — are themselves built during this developmental window by cell-type-specific recognition programs and activity-dependent refinement {cite:p}`Favuzzi2019, Batistabrito2017, Qiu2020, Simacek2025a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: microRNA Deficiency in VIP+ Interneurons Leads to Cortical Circuit Dysfunction
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract discusses miRNA loss effects on VIP cells but does not address cell-type-specific recognition programs or activity-dependent refinement of connectivity rules.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Disrupting this refinement — by conditional deletion of ErbB4 in VIP cells {cite:p}`Batistabrito2017`, by microRNA deletion {cite:p}`Qiu2020` or by neonatal hypoxic-ischaemic injury {cite:p}`Abbah2022` — produces persistent miswiring of the disinhibitory motif into adulthood.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: microRNA Deficiency in VIP+ Interneurons Leads to Cortical Circuit Dysfunction
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract shows miRNA deletion causes dysfunction and VIP cell loss but does not specifically describe 'persistent miswiring of the disinhibitory motif.'

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The connectivity rules described in earlier subsections are therefore not given but built; they are what an experience-tuned, modulator-targeted cell class looks like once the postnatal program has run to completion {cite:p}`Favuzzi2019, Batistabrito2017, Qiu2020, Simacek2025a, Abbah2022`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: microRNA Deficiency in VIP+ Interneurons Leads to Cortical Circuit Dysfunction
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss connectivity rules being 'built' through postnatal programs or experience-tuned development completion.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The minimal sufficient circuit model that {ref}`sec-in-vivo-behavior` will need — for autism, schizophrenia, neonatal injury and epilepsy — must accommodate developmental construction of VIP connectivity, and the comparative literature demands that quantitative rodent ratios be flagged as such when extrapolated to human cortex {cite:p}`Vormsteinschneider2020, Defelipe1999, Batistabrito2017, Qiu2020, Simacek2025a, Favuzzi2019`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: microRNA Deficiency in VIP+ Interneurons Leads to Cortical Circuit Dysfunction
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss autism, schizophrenia, or extrapolation of rodent data to human cortex.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: A useful operational summary is the following. *Treat the VIP→SST→Pyr disinhibitory motif as a layer- and area-specific computation that a cortical microcircuit can perform when modulator-targeted afferents are active, not as a fixed wiring rule that all VIP cells obey under all conditions*. This formulation accommodates the canonical landmark results {cite:p}`Pfeffer2013, Pi2013, Lee2013, Fu2014, Karnani2016a, Karnani2016b`, the long-range and thalamic asymmetries {cite:p}`Wall2016, Williams2019, Anastasiades2021a, Audette2018, Stachniak2023, Bilash2023, Cruikshank2012`, the modulator pharmacology {cite:p}`Porter1999, Kawaguchi1997b, Arroyo2012, Vonengelhardt2007, Granger2020, Obermayer2019, Letzkus2011, Ferezou2002, Vucurovic2010, Frazer2017`, the layer- and area-specific exceptions to canonical disinhibition {cite:p}`Yu2019, Zhou2017, Anastasiades2021a, Walker2016`, the developmental and comparative qualifications {cite:p}`Favuzzi2019, Batistabrito2017, Qiu2020, Simacek2025a, Vormsteinschneider2020, Defelipe1999`, and the hippocampal divergence {cite:p}`Tyan2014, Turi2019, Francavilla2018a, Booker2018, Bilash2023, Tamboli2024, Toth1993` within a single coherent picture.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: microRNA Deficiency in VIP+ Interneurons Leads to Cortical Circuit Dysfunction
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss developmental/comparative qualifications in the specific sense of qualifying the VIP→SST→Pyr disinhibitory motif formulation.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Symmetric synapses identifiable as VIP+ in immuno-EM target dendritic shafts and perisomatic compartments of CR+, CB+ and SOM+ interneurons in cat and rat visual cortex with substantially higher frequency than they target pyramidal somata {cite:p}`Hajos1996, Defelipe1999`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Chandelier cells and epilepsy
insufficient_triples.note: Paper discusses chandelier cells and epilepsy, not VIP+ immuno-EM targeting of interneurons in visual cortex.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The pattern dovetails with the light-microscopic paired-recording data: ultrastructurally, VIP outputs converge on interneuron dendrites and proximal compartments rather than on pyramidal somata, and the small fraction of pyramidal-targeting boutons preferentially contacts apical dendrites in deep layers {cite:p}`Hajos1996, Defelipe1999`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Chandelier cells and epilepsy
insufficient_triples.note: Paper is about chandelier cells in epilepsy; no mention of VIP outputs, paired recordings, or pyramidal apical dendrite targeting.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The convergence of three independent methodological lines — paired recording, optogenetic dissection and EM ultrastructure — on the same compartment-specific output rule strengthens the case that the canonical schematic is correct *as far as it goes*, while leaving open the layer- and area-specific exceptions documented in earlier subsections {cite:p}`Hajos1996, Defelipe1999, Pfeffer2013, Yu2019, Anastasiades2021a, Walker2016`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Chandelier cells and epilepsy
insufficient_triples.note: Paper discusses chandelier cell loss in epilepsy, not VIP compartment-specific output rules or EM ultrastructure convergence.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Human and macaque temporal-cortex VIP/CR cells are concentrated in supra-granular layers, with substantially higher fractional density and a distinctive "fan cell" anatomy in primate prefrontal layer 1 not observed in rodent {cite:p}`Defelipe1999, Vormsteinschneider2020`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Chandelier cells and epilepsy
insufficient_triples.note: Paper focuses on chandelier cells in epilepsy; no mention of VIP/CR cell density, fan cells, or primate vs rodent comparisons.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Vormsteinschneider2020` further demonstrate that intersectional viral tools developed in mouse can label CR/VIP cells in non-human primate and human cortex with conservation of the broad molecular scheme — but the density and laminar layout differences mean that rodent-derived connectivity ratios should not be transferred quantitatively to human cortex without species-specific replication {cite:p}`Vormsteinschneider2020, Defelipe1999`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Chandelier cells and epilepsy
insufficient_triples.note: Paper is about chandelier cells and epilepsy, not intersectional viral tools or CR/VIP cross-species labeling.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The minimal sufficient circuit model that {ref}`sec-in-vivo-behavior` will need — for autism, schizophrenia, neonatal injury and epilepsy — must accommodate developmental construction of VIP connectivity, and the comparative literature demands that quantitative rodent ratios be flagged as such when extrapolated to human cortex {cite:p}`Vormsteinschneider2020, Defelipe1999, Batistabrito2017, Qiu2020, Simacek2025a, Favuzzi2019`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Chandelier cells and epilepsy
insufficient_triples.note: Paper discusses chandelier cells in temporal lobe epilepsy, not VIP connectivity development or rodent-to-human extrapolation.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: A useful operational summary is the following. *Treat the VIP→SST→Pyr disinhibitory motif as a layer- and area-specific computation that a cortical microcircuit can perform when modulator-targeted afferents are active, not as a fixed wiring rule that all VIP cells obey under all conditions*. This formulation accommodates the canonical landmark results {cite:p}`Pfeffer2013, Pi2013, Lee2013, Fu2014, Karnani2016a, Karnani2016b`, the long-range and thalamic asymmetries {cite:p}`Wall2016, Williams2019, Anastasiades2021a, Audette2018, Stachniak2023, Bilash2023, Cruikshank2012`, the modulator pharmacology {cite:p}`Porter1999, Kawaguchi1997b, Arroyo2012, Vonengelhardt2007, Granger2020, Obermayer2019, Letzkus2011, Ferezou2002, Vucurovic2010, Frazer2017`, the layer- and area-specific exceptions to canonical disinhibition {cite:p}`Yu2019, Zhou2017, Anastasiades2021a, Walker2016`, the developmental and comparative qualifications {cite:p}`Favuzzi2019, Batistabrito2017, Qiu2020, Simacek2025a, Vormsteinschneider2020, Defelipe1999`, and the hippocampal divergence {cite:p}`Tyan2014, Turi2019, Francavilla2018a, Booker2018, Bilash2023, Tamboli2024, Toth1993` within a single coherent picture.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Chandelier cells and epilepsy
insufficient_triples.note: Paper is about chandelier cells and epilepsy; not about VIP→SST→Pyr disinhibitory motif or comparative qualifications.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: VIP cells fire fast, narrow APs (half-width ≈ 0.95 ms in juvenile S1 {cite:p}`Vucurovic2010`; AP amplitude 65.1 ± 9.1 mV in barrel cortex {cite:p}`Pronneke2015`) — narrower than pyramidal neurons but broader than PV fast-spiking cells, again consistent with the broader cortical interneuron taxonomy {cite:p}`Rudy2011,Karnani2016a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Three groups of interneurons account for nearly 100 of neocortical GABAergic neurons
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract describes broad interneuron taxonomy but provides no specific AP half-width or amplitude data for VIP cells.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: First, the *behavioural and developmental specificity* of the disinhibitory operation — which arousal axes, which task contingencies, which developmental windows actually engage VIP→SST→Pyr — must be related to the molecular subtypes catalogued in {ref}`sec-development` and the intrinsic firing patterns catalogued in {ref}`sec-electrophysiology` {cite:p}`Tasic2018, Pronneke2019, Pronneke2015, Frazer2017, Lee2010, Rudy2011`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Three groups of interneurons account for nearly 100 of neocortical GABAergic neurons
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract describes interneuron classification but does not discuss behavioural/developmental specificity of VIP→SST→Pyr disinhibition.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Vip t-types are distributed in a layer-stratified pattern (Vip Col15a1 Pde1a at the L1–L2/3 border, Vip Chat Htr1f spanning L2/3, Sncg Vip Itih5 across multiple layers), so laminar location is partially diagnostic of within-VIP type {cite:p}`Gouwens2020a,Tasic2018,Tasic2016,Yao2021a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Shared and distinct transcriptomic cell types across neocortical areas
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract mentions 133 transcriptomic types but does not detail specific Vip subtype laminar distributions.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Two-photon photostimulation by {cite:t}`Karnani2016b`, paired-recording with multi-target post-synaptic sampling by {cite:t}`Walker2016` and rabies-based output mapping by {cite:t}`Wall2016` all converge on the conclusion that individual VIP cells are not uniformly biased to a single target type — there is substantial cell-to-cell variability in the relative weight of VIP→SST, VIP→PV and VIP→Pyr outputs, and the population mean is dominated by a subset of strongly-connected cells {cite:p}`Karnani2016b, Walker2016, Wall2016, Pronneke2019`. This single-cell heterogeneity, which dovetails with the molecular subtype heterogeneity reviewed in {ref}`sec-development` {cite:p}`Tasic2018, Pronneke2019, Pronneke2015`, recasts the canonical motif as a *population-mean* property rather than a wiring rule that every VIP cell obeys.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Shared and distinct transcriptomic cell types across neocortical areas
insufficient_triples.note: Paper is about transcriptomic cell types, not single-cell connectivity or photostimulation experiments.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Favuzzi2019` showed that the compartment specificity of the major interneuron classes — PV→soma/AIS, SST→dendrites, VIP→other interneurons — is determined by cell-type-specific cell-adhesion and wiring molecules whose expression patterns recapitulate the molecular taxonomy of {ref}`sec-development` {cite:p}`Tasic2018, Pronneke2019, Frazer2017, Favuzzi2019`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Shared and distinct transcriptomic cell types across neocortical areas
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract describes transcriptomic taxonomy, not compartment-specific wiring molecules or cell-adhesion programs.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The connectivity diagram of {numref}`fig-vip-connectome` is, in this sense, a developmental construct supported by molecularly specified wiring rules — and small perturbations in those rules propagate to the network-level disinhibitory operation that subsequent sections will trace into behaviour and disease {cite:p}`Favuzzi2019, Batistabrito2017, Qiu2020, Tasic2018, Pronneke2019, Simacek2025a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Shared and distinct transcriptomic cell types across neocortical areas
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract establishes transcriptomic taxonomy but does not discuss molecularly specified wiring rules or connectivity diagrams.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Once one accepts that VIP outputs include direct PV and pyramidal inhibition in some layers and areas, that long-range afferents are a structured asymmetry rather than a uniform "top-down→VIP" rule, and that neuromodulator pharmacology is mostly but not entirely excitatory, the apparent disagreements collapse to a smaller set of well-characterised quantitative gradients along axis variables (layer, area, source nucleus, behavioural state) that future work could in principle saturate {cite:p}`Wall2016, Pfeffer2013, Yu2019, Pi2013, Lee2013, Karnani2016a, Sabri2024, Anastasiades2021a, Pronneke2019, Tasic2018`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Shared and distinct transcriptomic cell types across neocortical areas
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract is about transcriptomic cell-type taxonomy, not circuit motifs, neuromodulator pharmacology, or connectivity gradients.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: First, the *behavioural and developmental specificity* of the disinhibitory operation — which arousal axes, which task contingencies, which developmental windows actually engage VIP→SST→Pyr — must be related to the molecular subtypes catalogued in {ref}`sec-development` and the intrinsic firing patterns catalogued in {ref}`sec-electrophysiology` {cite:p}`Tasic2018, Pronneke2019, Pronneke2015, Frazer2017, Lee2010, Rudy2011`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Shared and distinct transcriptomic cell types across neocortical areas
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract catalogs transcriptomic types but does not discuss disinhibitory operations, arousal, or task contingencies.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The broader conclusion the Patch-seq literature now supports is that subclass-level e-type prediction is reproducibly accurate (~78% MET-type prediction in mouse VISp {cite:p}`Gouwens2020a`), but within-VIP biophysical heterogeneity is real and reflects a continuum of identities rather than discrete cell types {cite:p}`Scala2021,Bugeon2022,Lee2023a,Bakken2021a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: A transcriptomic axis predicts state modulation of cortical interneurons
insufficient_triples.note: The abstract does not mention ~78% MET-type prediction accuracy; that specific statistic likely comes from a different paper.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: First, the vM1→VIP/Pyr ratio of ~2.9× reported by {cite:t}`Lee2013` is independently reproduced in similar form for vS1→Cg, ACC→V1 and OFC→sensory pathways {cite:p}`Zhang2014, Bilash2023, Stachniak2023, Pi2013, Williams2019`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Lateral entorhinal cortex inputs modulate hippocampal dendritic excitability by recruiting a local disinhibitory microcircuit
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract describes LEC→CA1 VIP disinhibitory circuit in hippocampus, not vM1→VIP/Pyr ratio of ~2.9× in cortex.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: First, the vM1→VIP/Pyr ratio of ~2.9× reported by {cite:t}`Lee2013` is independently reproduced in similar form for vS1→Cg, ACC→V1 and OFC→sensory pathways {cite:p}`Zhang2014, Bilash2023, Stachniak2023, Pi2013, Williams2019`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Presynaptic Kainate Receptors onto Somatostatin Interneurons Are Recruited by Activity throughout Development and Contribute to Cortical Sensory Adaptation
insufficient_triples.note: Paper studies presynaptic KARs on SST interneurons in barrel cortex; no mention of vM1→VIP/Pyr ratios or long-range connectivity.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Top-down feedback from cingulate cortex drives a centre-surround disinhibitory architecture in V1 via Cg→VIP→SST {cite:p}`Zhang2014, Stachniak2023, Bastos2023a`, and in mPFC, mediodorsal-thalamic recruitment of VIP underlies disinhibitory control of pyramidal output during goal-directed behaviour {cite:p}`Anastasiades2021a, Kamigaki2017, Pinto2015`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Presynaptic Kainate Receptors onto Somatostatin Interneurons Are Recruited by Activity throughout Development and Contribute to Cortical Sensory Adaptation
insufficient_triples.note: Paper addresses GluK2-KARs on SST synapses in somatosensory cortex; no mention of Cg→VIP→SST disinhibition in V1 or mPFC.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: **(iii) Long-range source matters.** Cingulate→V1 recruits VIP {cite:p}`Zhang2014, Stachniak2023`; auditory→V1 suppresses VIP {cite:p}`Ibrahim2016`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Presynaptic Kainate Receptors onto Somatostatin Interneurons Are Recruited by Activity throughout Development and Contribute to Cortical Sensory Adaptation
insufficient_triples.note: Paper is about presynaptic kainate receptors on SST interneurons; no discussion of cingulate→V1 VIP recruitment.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Together these argue that "top-down recruitment of VIP" is not a single circuit operation but a family of source-specific operations, each with its own direction of effect {cite:p}`Zhang2014, Ibrahim2016, Anastasiades2021a, Stachniak2023`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Presynaptic Kainate Receptors onto Somatostatin Interneurons Are Recruited by Activity throughout Development and Contribute to Cortical Sensory Adaptation
insufficient_triples.note: Paper focuses on GluK2-KARs and sensory adaptation at SST synapses; does not address top-down VIP recruitment operations.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The synaptic-connectivity picture that emerges from 467 papers is a structured composite. **On the input side**, VIP interneurons are a preferential target of long-range cortical and higher-order thalamic glutamatergic input, of basal-forebrain cholinergic input via slow nicotinic receptors, of raphe serotonergic input via 5-HT3 receptors, and of mixed-sign noradrenergic input — while local pyramidal drive is comparable to that onto SST and PV cells {cite:p}`Wall2016, Lee2013, Zhang2014, Williams2019, Anastasiades2021a, Cruikshank2012, Audette2018, Stachniak2023, Bilash2023, Porter1999, Kawaguchi1997b, Kawaguchi1998, Vonengelhardt2007, Arroyo2012, Fu2014, Ferezou2002, Vucurovic2010, Frazer2017, Letzkus2011`. **On the output side**, VIP cells preferentially inhibit SST interneurons, but they also inhibit PV cells in deeper layers, NDNF/L1 interneurons, pyramidal cells in deep cortex and OLM cells in CA1, with substantial cell-to-cell heterogeneity that the canonical schematic flattens {cite:p}`Pfeffer2013, Pi2013, Lee2013, Karnani2016a, Karnani2016b, Walker2016, Yu2019, Zhou2017, Anastasiades2021a, Schuman2019, Hafner2021, Tyan2014, Turi2019, Francavilla2018a, Booker2018`. **On the behavioural side**, the consequence of this wiring is a deployable disinhibitory operation that is recruited by arousal and reinforcement signals across V1, A1, mPFC, BLA and CA1, but which is sign-dependent on visual context, source-area-specific in cross-modal attention, and layer-dependent in its non-SST outputs {cite:p}`Fu2014, Pi2013, Letzkus2011, Krabbe2019, Pakan2016, Dipoppa2018, Sabri2024, Kamigaki2017, Pinto2015, Szadai2022, Tamboli2024, Ibrahim2016, Kaneko2024, Anastasiades2021a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Presynaptic Kainate Receptors onto Somatostatin Interneurons Are Recruited by Activity throughout Development and Contribute to Cortical Sensory Adaptation
insufficient_triples.note: Paper is about presynaptic KARs/mGluR7 on SST inputs; does not address VIP input/output wiring or disinhibitory circuits.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: A useful operational summary is the following. *Treat the VIP→SST→Pyr disinhibitory motif as a layer- and area-specific computation that a cortical microcircuit can perform when modulator-targeted afferents are active, not as a fixed wiring rule that all VIP cells obey under all conditions*. This formulation accommodates the canonical landmark results {cite:p}`Pfeffer2013, Pi2013, Lee2013, Fu2014, Karnani2016a, Karnani2016b`, the long-range and thalamic asymmetries {cite:p}`Wall2016, Williams2019, Anastasiades2021a, Audette2018, Stachniak2023, Bilash2023, Cruikshank2012`, the modulator pharmacology {cite:p}`Porter1999, Kawaguchi1997b, Arroyo2012, Vonengelhardt2007, Granger2020, Obermayer2019, Letzkus2011, Ferezou2002, Vucurovic2010, Frazer2017`, the layer- and area-specific exceptions to canonical disinhibition {cite:p}`Yu2019, Zhou2017, Anastasiades2021a, Walker2016`, the developmental and comparative qualifications {cite:p}`Favuzzi2019, Batistabrito2017, Qiu2020, Simacek2025a, Vormsteinschneider2020, Defelipe1999`, and the hippocampal divergence {cite:p}`Tyan2014, Turi2019, Francavilla2018a, Booker2018, Bilash2023, Tamboli2024, Toth1993` within a single coherent picture.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Presynaptic Kainate Receptors onto Somatostatin Interneurons Are Recruited by Activity throughout Development and Contribute to Cortical Sensory Adaptation
insufficient_triples.note: Paper concerns SST synapse mechanisms and sensory adaptation; unrelated to VIP disinhibitory motif qualifications described.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Across V1, A1, mPFC, BLA and CA1, the same conjunction recurs: arousal- or reinforcer-related signals from basal forebrain or LC raise VIP activity, the rise is sufficient to suppress local SST output, and the SST suppression in turn opens a dendritic disinhibitory window onto pyramidal neurons {cite:p}`Fu2014, Letzkus2011, Krabbe2019, Pi2013, Pakan2016, Sabri2024, Szadai2022, Tamboli2024, Kamigaki2017`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Adaptive disinhibitory gating by VIP interneurons permits associative learning
insufficient_triples.note: Paper covers BLA only, not V1, A1, mPFC, or CA1. Abstract doesn't mention basal forebrain or LC inputs to VIP cells.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The synaptic-connectivity picture that emerges from 467 papers is a structured composite. **On the input side**, VIP interneurons are a preferential target of long-range cortical and higher-order thalamic glutamatergic input, of basal-forebrain cholinergic input via slow nicotinic receptors, of raphe serotonergic input via 5-HT3 receptors, and of mixed-sign noradrenergic input — while local pyramidal drive is comparable to that onto SST and PV cells {cite:p}`Wall2016, Lee2013, Zhang2014, Williams2019, Anastasiades2021a, Cruikshank2012, Audette2018, Stachniak2023, Bilash2023, Porter1999, Kawaguchi1997b, Kawaguchi1998, Vonengelhardt2007, Arroyo2012, Fu2014, Ferezou2002, Vucurovic2010, Frazer2017, Letzkus2011`. **On the output side**, VIP cells preferentially inhibit SST interneurons, but they also inhibit PV cells in deeper layers, NDNF/L1 interneurons, pyramidal cells in deep cortex and OLM cells in CA1, with substantial cell-to-cell heterogeneity that the canonical schematic flattens {cite:p}`Pfeffer2013, Pi2013, Lee2013, Karnani2016a, Karnani2016b, Walker2016, Yu2019, Zhou2017, Anastasiades2021a, Schuman2019, Hafner2021, Tyan2014, Turi2019, Francavilla2018a, Booker2018`. **On the behavioural side**, the consequence of this wiring is a deployable disinhibitory operation that is recruited by arousal and reinforcement signals across V1, A1, mPFC, BLA and CA1, but which is sign-dependent on visual context, source-area-specific in cross-modal attention, and layer-dependent in its non-SST outputs {cite:p}`Fu2014, Pi2013, Letzkus2011, Krabbe2019, Pakan2016, Dipoppa2018, Sabri2024, Kamigaki2017, Pinto2015, Szadai2022, Tamboli2024, Ibrahim2016, Kaneko2024, Anastasiades2021a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Adaptive disinhibitory gating by VIP interneurons permits associative learning
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract supports BLA disinhibitory learning but not the detailed input/output wiring claims about cortical layers, NDNF, nicotinic receptors, etc.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Second, the *minimum sufficient circuit model* needed to explain disease-relevant phenotypes (autism, schizophrenia, anxiety, neonatal injury) cannot rely on canonical disinhibition alone; it must accommodate the layer-dependent direct VIP→Pyr/PV path, the area-tuned long-range asymmetries and the modulator-recruited gain control reviewed here {cite:p}`Yu2019, Zhou2017, Anastasiades2021a, Letzkus2011, Sabri2024, Krabbe2019`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Adaptive disinhibitory gating by VIP interneurons permits associative learning
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss disease phenotypes, direct VIP→Pyr/PV paths, or minimum sufficient circuit models.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: VIP cells contact and inhibit NDNF cells, providing an additional disinhibitory route that is engaged in fear learning, attention, and predictive processing tasks {cite:p}`Abs2018,Krabbe2019,Veit2023`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Adaptive disinhibitory gating by VIP interneurons permits associative learning
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not mention NDNF cells or VIP→NDNF connections.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Cortical VIP and CCK interneurons are selectively depolarised by nicotinic agonists, whereas pyramidal cells, fast-spiking PV cells and SST cells are not — a result first established by {cite:t}`Porter1999` and {cite:t}`Kawaguchi1997b` and replicated across rodent neocortex with subtype-specific receptor profiling {cite:p}`Vonengelhardt2007, Arroyo2012, Fu2014`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Functional Characterization of Intrinsic Cholinergic Interneurons in the Cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract discusses ChAT+ interneurons modulating via nicotinic receptors but doesn't address selective depolarization of VIP/CCK vs PV/SST cells.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Layered on top is a smaller but reproducible muscarinic component: a subset of VIP cells is directly *inhibited* by mAChR activation in slice {cite:p}`Kawaguchi1997b, Obermayer2019, Granger2020`, and a further subset of VIP interneurons themselves co-release ACh and GABA — making them not just modulator targets but local cortical sources of ACh {cite:p}`Granger2020, Obermayer2019, Vonengelhardt2007, Dudai2020`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Functional Characterization of Intrinsic Cholinergic Interneurons in the Cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract shows ChAT/VIP cells release ACh locally but doesn't mention muscarinic inhibition of VIP cells or co-release of GABA.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The synaptic-connectivity picture that emerges from 467 papers is a structured composite. **On the input side**, VIP interneurons are a preferential target of long-range cortical and higher-order thalamic glutamatergic input, of basal-forebrain cholinergic input via slow nicotinic receptors, of raphe serotonergic input via 5-HT3 receptors, and of mixed-sign noradrenergic input — while local pyramidal drive is comparable to that onto SST and PV cells {cite:p}`Wall2016, Lee2013, Zhang2014, Williams2019, Anastasiades2021a, Cruikshank2012, Audette2018, Stachniak2023, Bilash2023, Porter1999, Kawaguchi1997b, Kawaguchi1998, Vonengelhardt2007, Arroyo2012, Fu2014, Ferezou2002, Vucurovic2010, Frazer2017, Letzkus2011`. **On the output side**, VIP cells preferentially inhibit SST interneurons, but they also inhibit PV cells in deeper layers, NDNF/L1 interneurons, pyramidal cells in deep cortex and OLM cells in CA1, with substantial cell-to-cell heterogeneity that the canonical schematic flattens {cite:p}`Pfeffer2013, Pi2013, Lee2013, Karnani2016a, Karnani2016b, Walker2016, Yu2019, Zhou2017, Anastasiades2021a, Schuman2019, Hafner2021, Tyan2014, Turi2019, Francavilla2018a, Booker2018`. **On the behavioural side**, the consequence of this wiring is a deployable disinhibitory operation that is recruited by arousal and reinforcement signals across V1, A1, mPFC, BLA and CA1, but which is sign-dependent on visual context, source-area-specific in cross-modal attention, and layer-dependent in its non-SST outputs {cite:p}`Fu2014, Pi2013, Letzkus2011, Krabbe2019, Pakan2016, Dipoppa2018, Sabri2024, Kamigaki2017, Pinto2015, Szadai2022, Tamboli2024, Ibrahim2016, Kaneko2024, Anastasiades2021a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Functional Characterization of Intrinsic Cholinergic Interneurons in the Cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract focuses on intrinsic ChAT+ interneuron properties; doesn't address the broad synthesis claims about VIP connectivity and behavior.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: A useful operational summary is the following. *Treat the VIP→SST→Pyr disinhibitory motif as a layer- and area-specific computation that a cortical microcircuit can perform when modulator-targeted afferents are active, not as a fixed wiring rule that all VIP cells obey under all conditions*. This formulation accommodates the canonical landmark results {cite:p}`Pfeffer2013, Pi2013, Lee2013, Fu2014, Karnani2016a, Karnani2016b`, the long-range and thalamic asymmetries {cite:p}`Wall2016, Williams2019, Anastasiades2021a, Audette2018, Stachniak2023, Bilash2023, Cruikshank2012`, the modulator pharmacology {cite:p}`Porter1999, Kawaguchi1997b, Arroyo2012, Vonengelhardt2007, Granger2020, Obermayer2019, Letzkus2011, Ferezou2002, Vucurovic2010, Frazer2017`, the layer- and area-specific exceptions to canonical disinhibition {cite:p}`Yu2019, Zhou2017, Anastasiades2021a, Walker2016`, the developmental and comparative qualifications {cite:p}`Favuzzi2019, Batistabrito2017, Qiu2020, Simacek2025a, Vormsteinschneider2020, Defelipe1999`, and the hippocampal divergence {cite:p}`Tyan2014, Turi2019, Francavilla2018a, Booker2018, Bilash2023, Tamboli2024, Toth1993` within a single coherent picture.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Functional Characterization of Intrinsic Cholinergic Interneurons in the Cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract doesn't discuss modulator pharmacology of VIP cells broadly or the operational summary framework described.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The connectivity diagram of {numref}`fig-vip-connectome` is, in this sense, a developmental construct supported by molecularly specified wiring rules — and small perturbations in those rules propagate to the network-level disinhibitory operation that subsequent sections will trace into behaviour and disease {cite:p}`Favuzzi2019, Batistabrito2017, Qiu2020, Tasic2018, Pronneke2019, Simacek2025a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Presynaptic maturation of inhibitory connections onto vasoactive intestinal polypeptide-expressing GABAergic interneurons in the mouse barrel field
insufficient_triples.note: Paper addresses presynaptic maturation of inhibitory inputs onto VIP cells, not molecularly specified wiring rules or network-level disinhibition propagation.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Cell-type-specific connectivity rules — VIP cells preferentially targeting other interneurons, PV cells targeting soma and SST cells targeting dendrites — are themselves built during this developmental window by cell-type-specific recognition programs and activity-dependent refinement {cite:p}`Favuzzi2019, Batistabrito2017, Qiu2020, Simacek2025a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Presynaptic maturation of inhibitory connections onto vasoactive intestinal polypeptide-expressing GABAergic interneurons in the mouse barrel field
insufficient_triples.note: Paper studies inhibitory inputs onto VIP cells, not cell-type-specific targeting rules (VIP→INs, PV→soma, SST→dendrites) or recognition programs.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The minimal sufficient circuit model that {ref}`sec-in-vivo-behavior` will need — for autism, schizophrenia, neonatal injury and epilepsy — must accommodate developmental construction of VIP connectivity, and the comparative literature demands that quantitative rodent ratios be flagged as such when extrapolated to human cortex {cite:p}`Vormsteinschneider2020, Defelipe1999, Batistabrito2017, Qiu2020, Simacek2025a, Favuzzi2019`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Presynaptic maturation of inhibitory connections onto vasoactive intestinal polypeptide-expressing GABAergic interneurons in the mouse barrel field
insufficient_triples.note: Paper addresses developmental maturation in mouse barrel cortex but says nothing about human extrapolation or disease models.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: A useful operational summary is the following. *Treat the VIP→SST→Pyr disinhibitory motif as a layer- and area-specific computation that a cortical microcircuit can perform when modulator-targeted afferents are active, not as a fixed wiring rule that all VIP cells obey under all conditions*. This formulation accommodates the canonical landmark results {cite:p}`Pfeffer2013, Pi2013, Lee2013, Fu2014, Karnani2016a, Karnani2016b`, the long-range and thalamic asymmetries {cite:p}`Wall2016, Williams2019, Anastasiades2021a, Audette2018, Stachniak2023, Bilash2023, Cruikshank2012`, the modulator pharmacology {cite:p}`Porter1999, Kawaguchi1997b, Arroyo2012, Vonengelhardt2007, Granger2020, Obermayer2019, Letzkus2011, Ferezou2002, Vucurovic2010, Frazer2017`, the layer- and area-specific exceptions to canonical disinhibition {cite:p}`Yu2019, Zhou2017, Anastasiades2021a, Walker2016`, the developmental and comparative qualifications {cite:p}`Favuzzi2019, Batistabrito2017, Qiu2020, Simacek2025a, Vormsteinschneider2020, Defelipe1999`, and the hippocampal divergence {cite:p}`Tyan2014, Turi2019, Francavilla2018a, Booker2018, Bilash2023, Tamboli2024, Toth1993` within a single coherent picture.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Presynaptic maturation of inhibitory connections onto vasoactive intestinal polypeptide-expressing GABAergic interneurons in the mouse barrel field
insufficient_triples.note: Paper covers presynaptic maturation of inhibitory inputs onto VIP cells; does not address the broad operational summary claimed here.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Yet the same body of work also exposes its limits: the same VIP perturbation yields different sign and magnitude of pyramidal modulation across area, layer, and behavioural state, and inhibition of SST cells is neither necessary nor sufficient to explain observed gain effects in several preparations {cite:p}`Pakan2016,Dipoppa2018,Garrett2020,Stachniak2021`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Experience shapes activity dynamics and stimulus coding of VIP inhibitory cells
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract shows VIP cells change modes with familiarity but doesn't address varying sign/magnitude of pyramidal modulation across areas or SST insufficiency.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: In higher visual areas, the locomotion-evoked VIP activation that is so reproducible in V1 is *not* uniformly disinhibitory: in mouse anterolateral and lateromedial areas, locomotion produces SST recruitment of comparable magnitude to VIP recruitment, complicating the simple disinhibition story {cite:p}`Pakan2016,Garrett2020,Dipoppa2018`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Experience shapes activity dynamics and stimulus coding of VIP inhibitory cells
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract doesn't mention locomotion effects in higher visual areas (AL, LM) or SST recruitment magnitude during locomotion.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Pakan2016` reported, in the same cortical area but a broader behavioural range, that locomotion-evoked VIP and SST activity were not simple mirrors and that SST cells were not uniformly suppressed during locomotion. **Resolution:** the canonical motif holds as a *component* explanation in V1 superficial layers under top-down or cholinergic drive but does not generalise as a *sole* explanation across all behavioural contexts; cortical area, layer, and visual input together determine whether SST cells follow the canonical disinhibition trajectory or move independently {cite:p}`Dipoppa2018,Garrett2020,Stachniak2021,Veit2023`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Experience shapes activity dynamics and stimulus coding of VIP inhibitory cells
insufficient_triples.note: Garrett2020 studied VIP cells in visual cortex under novel vs familiar image conditions. The abstract does not address SST cell suppression, disinhibition motif generality, or locomotion-related dynamics relevant to the claim.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: In addition to these four families, a number of motif fragments are documented but less developed in the literature: VIP→Martinotti subtype-specific connections in deep layers {cite:p}`Anastasiades2021a,Schneidermizell2025`, VIP→long-range projecting interneuron contacts, and VIP-cell mediated inhibition of other VIP cells through CCK-positive subtypes {cite:p}`Karnani2016a,Karnani2016b,Garrett2020`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Experience shapes activity dynamics and stimulus coding of VIP inhibitory cells
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract doesn't mention VIP→Martinotti connections, deep layers, or VIP-VIP inhibition via CCK subtypes.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Panel C aggregates the *in vivo* effect of VIP perturbation on pyramidal firing across V1 studies and shows that the canonical net-disinhibitory effect is reproducible in V1 superficial layers under top-down or running-coupled drive, but is reduced or absent in higher visual areas and in stationary visual paradigms {cite:p}`Pakan2016,Garrett2020,Dipoppa2018`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Experience shapes activity dynamics and stimulus coding of VIP inhibitory cells
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract doesn't report VIP perturbation effects on pyramidal firing or compare V1 vs higher visual areas for disinhibitory effects.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Consensus on these features is sufficiently robust that {cite:t}`Kim2023` could train a four-feature classifier (AP height, sag, AP-upstroke adaptation ratio, τ_{m}) that separates human PVALB from non-PVALB cortical interneurons with high accuracy, identifying the same axes that Petilla and {cite:t}`Gouwens2019` use to organise mouse VISp into 17 e-types.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Target cell-specific synaptic dynamics of excitatory to inhibitory neuron connections in supragranular layers of human neocortex
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract mentions Patch-seq classifiers and PVALB vs non-PVALB classification but does not specify the four features (AP height, sag, adaptation ratio, τ_m).

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Kim2023` then showed that a Patch-seq-trained classifier of human cortical subclass identity (PVALB vs non-PVALB) is dominated by AP height, sag, AP-upstroke adaptation ratio, and τ_{m} — features that {cite:t}`Gouwens2020a` and {cite:t}`Gouwens2019` independently identified in mouse — confirming convergence at the subclass-feature level even where within-subclass partitions diverge {cite:p}`Kim2023,Gouwens2020a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Target cell-specific synaptic dynamics of excitatory to inhibitory neuron connections in supragranular layers of human neocortex
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract confirms Patch-seq-based PVALB classification but does not specify the four dominant features claimed.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Kim2023` then showed that a Patch-seq-trained classifier of human cortical subclass identity (PVALB vs non-PVALB) is dominated by AP height, sag, AP-upstroke adaptation ratio, and τ_{m} — features that {cite:t}`Gouwens2020a` and {cite:t}`Gouwens2019` independently identified in mouse — confirming convergence at the subclass-feature level even where within-subclass partitions diverge {cite:p}`Kim2023,Gouwens2020a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Target cell-specific synaptic dynamics of excitatory to inhibitory neuron connections in supragranular layers of human neocortex
insufficient_triples.note: Same triple as above; abstract doesn't detail which features dominate the classifier.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Consensus on these features is sufficiently robust that {cite:t}`Kim2023` could train a four-feature classifier (AP height, sag, AP-upstroke adaptation ratio, τ_{m}) that separates human PVALB from non-PVALB cortical interneurons with high accuracy, identifying the same axes that Petilla and {cite:t}`Gouwens2019` use to organise mouse VISp into 17 e-types.

insufficient_triples.note: Abstract confirms 17 e-types in mouse VISp but says nothing about a four-feature classifier for human PVALB vs non-PVALB.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Kim2023` then showed that a Patch-seq-trained classifier of human cortical subclass identity (PVALB vs non-PVALB) is dominated by AP height, sag, AP-upstroke adaptation ratio, and τ_{m} — features that {cite:t}`Gouwens2020a` and {cite:t}`Gouwens2019` independently identified in mouse — confirming convergence at the subclass-feature level even where within-subclass partitions diverge {cite:p}`Kim2023,Gouwens2020a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Classification of electrophysiological and morphological neuron types in the mouse visual cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract describes mouse VISp e-types but says nothing about human cortical subclass classifiers or specific discriminating features.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: VIP cells are reliably distinguishable from PV/SST/Lamp5 by a small set of intrinsic features (high R_{in}, modest sag, fast narrow APs, adapting or irregular firing) — features that train accurate Patch-seq classifiers across mouse and human cortex {cite:p}`Gouwens2020a,Gouwens2019,Kim2023,Lee2023a,Ferrante2016`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Classification of electrophysiological and morphological neuron types in the mouse visual cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract confirms e-type taxonomy but does not specifically discuss VIP distinguishability via listed features or Patch-seq classifiers.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: A 13-mV shift in baseline straddles the activation threshold of M-current and the inactivation curve of low-threshold T-type Ca²⁺ channels, both of which have been implicated as substrates for VIP-cell intrinsic firing patterns {cite:p}`Goff2019,Porter1998`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Vasoactive intestinal peptide-expressing interneurons are impaired in a mouse model of Dravet syndrome
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract mentions KCNQ/M-current determines IS firing but does not discuss T-type Ca²⁺ channels or specific voltage shifts.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: **Candidate ion-channel substrates of irregular-spiking firing in VIP cells.** *Panel A:* Cartoon VIP-cell membrane with annotated channel complement (Na_{V}, Kv1, Kv4, HCN/I_{h}, KCNQ/M, SK) and qualitative voltage-clamp traces; channel inventory is consistent with the cortical VIP intrinsic-property literature {cite:p}`Tremblay2016,Pronneke2015,Vucurovic2010`. *Panel B:* Two competing mechanism schematics for irregular-spiking — *(i)* Kv1-dominant repolarisation kinetics (block by 4-AP / dendrotoxin converts to sustained firing) {cite:p}`Porter1998`; *(ii)* KCNQ-mediated M-current (block by linopirdine selectively converts IS to tonic in IS VIP cells) {cite:p}`Goff2019,Guetmccreight2020b` — with predicted current-clamp signatures. *Panel C:* Decision flow mapping intrinsic-feature combinations (high R_{in} + IS + low sag → cluster A; high R_{in} + adapting + moderate sag → cluster B) onto Patch-seq Vip-MET types {cite:p}`Gouwens2020a` and *Vip* t-type axes {cite:p}`Scala2021`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Vasoactive intestinal peptide-expressing interneurons are impaired in a mouse model of Dravet syndrome
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract mentions KCNQ/M-current role but does not detail full channel inventory (Kv4, HCN, SK) attributed here.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: A 13-mV shift in baseline straddles the activation threshold of M-current and the inactivation curve of low-threshold T-type Ca²⁺ channels, both of which have been implicated as substrates for VIP-cell intrinsic firing patterns {cite:p}`Goff2019,Porter1998`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Properties of bipolar VIPergic interneurons and their excitation by pyramidal neurons in the rat neocortex
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract mentions ID-like K+ current, not M-current or T-type Ca²⁺ channels specifically.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Lee2023a` demonstrated, in human neocortical Patch-seq (n=675; LAMP5/PAX6=75, VIP=99, SST=149, PVALB=352), that the four GABAergic subclasses are separable in UMAP of intrinsic features, with VIP cells displaying diverse morphologies (bipolar, multipolar, basket) — consistent with mouse but with greater within-class diversity {cite:p}`Lee2023a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Signature morphoelectric properties of diverse GABAergic interneurons in the human neocortex
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract doesn't report specific sample sizes (n=675, LAMP5/PAX6=75, VIP=99, etc.) or UMAP of intrinsic features for subclass separation.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Lee2023a` demonstrated, in human neocortical Patch-seq (n=675; LAMP5/PAX6=75, VIP=99, SST=149, PVALB=352), that the four GABAergic subclasses are separable in UMAP of intrinsic features, with VIP cells displaying diverse morphologies (bipolar, multipolar, basket) — consistent with mouse but with greater within-class diversity {cite:p}`Lee2023a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Signature morphoelectric properties of diverse GABAergic interneurons in the human neocortex
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract doesn't mention VIP morphological diversity (bipolar, multipolar, basket) or specific sample counts per subclass.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The broader conclusion the Patch-seq literature now supports is that subclass-level e-type prediction is reproducibly accurate (~78% MET-type prediction in mouse VISp {cite:p}`Gouwens2020a`), but within-VIP biophysical heterogeneity is real and reflects a continuum of identities rather than discrete cell types {cite:p}`Scala2021,Bugeon2022,Lee2023a,Bakken2021a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Signature morphoelectric properties of diverse GABAergic interneurons in the human neocortex
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract doesn't mention ~78% MET-type prediction accuracy or within-VIP biophysical continuum claims.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: By contrast, primary thalamic relays (VPM, LGN, MGv) excite VIP cells more weakly, and several reports place VPM-driven excitation of PV cells above that of VIP {cite:p}`Cruikshank2012, Ji2016, Anastasiades2021a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Thalamic Control of Layer 1 Circuits in Prefrontal Cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract discusses matrix thalamic projections to L1 interneurons in PFC, not VPM/LGN/MGv drive onto VIP vs PV cells.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The afferent picture that emerges is therefore neither uniformly "VIP receives top-down" nor "VIP receives thalamic" — it is a structured asymmetry in which long-range and higher-order modulatory inputs preferentially read VIP cells over their interneuron neighbours, and primary feedforward inputs do not {cite:p}`Wall2016, Lee2013, Williams2019, Cruikshank2012, Anastasiades2021a, Audette2018, Bastos2023a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Thalamic Control of Layer 1 Circuits in Prefrontal Cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract discusses matrix thalamic projections to L1 interneurons; doesn't address VIP preferential targeting by modulatory vs primary inputs.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The synaptic-connectivity picture that emerges from 467 papers is a structured composite. **On the input side**, VIP interneurons are a preferential target of long-range cortical and higher-order thalamic glutamatergic input, of basal-forebrain cholinergic input via slow nicotinic receptors, of raphe serotonergic input via 5-HT3 receptors, and of mixed-sign noradrenergic input — while local pyramidal drive is comparable to that onto SST and PV cells {cite:p}`Wall2016, Lee2013, Zhang2014, Williams2019, Anastasiades2021a, Cruikshank2012, Audette2018, Stachniak2023, Bilash2023, Porter1999, Kawaguchi1997b, Kawaguchi1998, Vonengelhardt2007, Arroyo2012, Fu2014, Ferezou2002, Vucurovic2010, Frazer2017, Letzkus2011`. **On the output side**, VIP cells preferentially inhibit SST interneurons, but they also inhibit PV cells in deeper layers, NDNF/L1 interneurons, pyramidal cells in deep cortex and OLM cells in CA1, with substantial cell-to-cell heterogeneity that the canonical schematic flattens {cite:p}`Pfeffer2013, Pi2013, Lee2013, Karnani2016a, Karnani2016b, Walker2016, Yu2019, Zhou2017, Anastasiades2021a, Schuman2019, Hafner2021, Tyan2014, Turi2019, Francavilla2018a, Booker2018`. **On the behavioural side**, the consequence of this wiring is a deployable disinhibitory operation that is recruited by arousal and reinforcement signals across V1, A1, mPFC, BLA and CA1, but which is sign-dependent on visual context, source-area-specific in cross-modal attention, and layer-dependent in its non-SST outputs {cite:p}`Fu2014, Pi2013, Letzkus2011, Krabbe2019, Pakan2016, Dipoppa2018, Sabri2024, Kamigaki2017, Pinto2015, Szadai2022, Tamboli2024, Ibrahim2016, Kaneko2024, Anastasiades2021a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Thalamic Control of Layer 1 Circuits in Prefrontal Cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract describes matrix TC→L1 interneuron circuits in PFC; doesn't address VIP-specific input/output wiring composite described in claim.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: A useful operational summary is the following. *Treat the VIP→SST→Pyr disinhibitory motif as a layer- and area-specific computation that a cortical microcircuit can perform when modulator-targeted afferents are active, not as a fixed wiring rule that all VIP cells obey under all conditions*. This formulation accommodates the canonical landmark results {cite:p}`Pfeffer2013, Pi2013, Lee2013, Fu2014, Karnani2016a, Karnani2016b`, the long-range and thalamic asymmetries {cite:p}`Wall2016, Williams2019, Anastasiades2021a, Audette2018, Stachniak2023, Bilash2023, Cruikshank2012`, the modulator pharmacology {cite:p}`Porter1999, Kawaguchi1997b, Arroyo2012, Vonengelhardt2007, Granger2020, Obermayer2019, Letzkus2011, Ferezou2002, Vucurovic2010, Frazer2017`, the layer- and area-specific exceptions to canonical disinhibition {cite:p}`Yu2019, Zhou2017, Anastasiades2021a, Walker2016`, the developmental and comparative qualifications {cite:p}`Favuzzi2019, Batistabrito2017, Qiu2020, Simacek2025a, Vormsteinschneider2020, Defelipe1999`, and the hippocampal divergence {cite:p}`Tyan2014, Turi2019, Francavilla2018a, Booker2018, Bilash2023, Tamboli2024, Toth1993` within a single coherent picture.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Thalamic Control of Layer 1 Circuits in Prefrontal Cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract reports thalamic matrix→L1 circuits in PFC; does not address long-range/thalamic asymmetries for VIP disinhibition specifically.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The synaptic-connectivity picture that emerges from 467 papers is a structured composite. **On the input side**, VIP interneurons are a preferential target of long-range cortical and higher-order thalamic glutamatergic input, of basal-forebrain cholinergic input via slow nicotinic receptors, of raphe serotonergic input via 5-HT3 receptors, and of mixed-sign noradrenergic input — while local pyramidal drive is comparable to that onto SST and PV cells {cite:p}`Wall2016, Lee2013, Zhang2014, Williams2019, Anastasiades2021a, Cruikshank2012, Audette2018, Stachniak2023, Bilash2023, Porter1999, Kawaguchi1997b, Kawaguchi1998, Vonengelhardt2007, Arroyo2012, Fu2014, Ferezou2002, Vucurovic2010, Frazer2017, Letzkus2011`. **On the output side**, VIP cells preferentially inhibit SST interneurons, but they also inhibit PV cells in deeper layers, NDNF/L1 interneurons, pyramidal cells in deep cortex and OLM cells in CA1, with substantial cell-to-cell heterogeneity that the canonical schematic flattens {cite:p}`Pfeffer2013, Pi2013, Lee2013, Karnani2016a, Karnani2016b, Walker2016, Yu2019, Zhou2017, Anastasiades2021a, Schuman2019, Hafner2021, Tyan2014, Turi2019, Francavilla2018a, Booker2018`. **On the behavioural side**, the consequence of this wiring is a deployable disinhibitory operation that is recruited by arousal and reinforcement signals across V1, A1, mPFC, BLA and CA1, but which is sign-dependent on visual context, source-area-specific in cross-modal attention, and layer-dependent in its non-SST outputs {cite:p}`Fu2014, Pi2013, Letzkus2011, Krabbe2019, Pakan2016, Dipoppa2018, Sabri2024, Kamigaki2017, Pinto2015, Szadai2022, Tamboli2024, Ibrahim2016, Kaneko2024, Anastasiades2021a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Selective Cholinergic Modulation of Cortical GABAergic Cell Subtypes
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract discusses muscarinic effects on GABAergic subtypes but not the broad synaptic-connectivity synthesis claimed here.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: A useful operational summary is the following. *Treat the VIP→SST→Pyr disinhibitory motif as a layer- and area-specific computation that a cortical microcircuit can perform when modulator-targeted afferents are active, not as a fixed wiring rule that all VIP cells obey under all conditions*. This formulation accommodates the canonical landmark results {cite:p}`Pfeffer2013, Pi2013, Lee2013, Fu2014, Karnani2016a, Karnani2016b`, the long-range and thalamic asymmetries {cite:p}`Wall2016, Williams2019, Anastasiades2021a, Audette2018, Stachniak2023, Bilash2023, Cruikshank2012`, the modulator pharmacology {cite:p}`Porter1999, Kawaguchi1997b, Arroyo2012, Vonengelhardt2007, Granger2020, Obermayer2019, Letzkus2011, Ferezou2002, Vucurovic2010, Frazer2017`, the layer- and area-specific exceptions to canonical disinhibition {cite:p}`Yu2019, Zhou2017, Anastasiades2021a, Walker2016`, the developmental and comparative qualifications {cite:p}`Favuzzi2019, Batistabrito2017, Qiu2020, Simacek2025a, Vormsteinschneider2020, Defelipe1999`, and the hippocampal divergence {cite:p}`Tyan2014, Turi2019, Francavilla2018a, Booker2018, Bilash2023, Tamboli2024, Toth1993` within a single coherent picture.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Selective Cholinergic Modulation of Cortical GABAergic Cell Subtypes
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract addresses muscarinic modulation of GABAergic subtypes, not the VIP→SST→Pyr disinhibitory motif or modulator pharmacology synthesis claimed.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Layered on top is a smaller but reproducible muscarinic component: a subset of VIP cells is directly *inhibited* by mAChR activation in slice {cite:p}`Kawaguchi1997b, Obermayer2019, Granger2020`, and a further subset of VIP interneurons themselves co-release ACh and GABA — making them not just modulator targets but local cortical sources of ACh {cite:p}`Granger2020, Obermayer2019, Vonengelhardt2007, Dudai2020`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Barrel cortex VIP/ChAT interneurons suppress sensory responses in vivo
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract confirms VChIs co-release ACh and GABA but says nothing about mAChR inhibition of VIP cells or muscarinic components.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Granger2020` and {cite:t}`Obermayer2019` showed that cortical ChAT/VIP cells (~33% of VIP cells in mPFC) release ACh in addition to GABA, with target-specific GABA release that is robust onto interneurons and weaker onto pyramidal cells, and {cite:t}`Vonengelhardt2007` and {cite:t}`Dudai2020` demonstrated that the same cells provide a local cortical source of nicotinic excitation onto neighbouring fast-spiking and bipolar interneurons.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Barrel cortex VIP/ChAT interneurons suppress sensory responses in vivo
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract states VChIs can release GABA and ACh but does not detail ~33% proportion, target-specific GABA release, or nicotinic excitation onto FS/bipolar interneurons.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Pharmacological and optogenetic isolation of cholinergic transmission has since shown that VIP cells across V1, A1, S1, and PFC respond rapidly to ACh release through α4β2 and α7 nicotinic receptors {cite:p}`Pinto2015,Kuchibhotla2017,Williams2019,Anastasiades2021a,Mcfarlan2024a,Mcfarlan2024b`, with response amplitudes that can rival those produced by direct optogenetic stimulation of long-range glutamatergic axons.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: The spike-timing-dependent plasticity of VIP interneurons in motor cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract discusses STDP at VIP synapses, not nicotinic receptor-mediated cholinergic activation of VIP cells across multiple areas.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Human and macaque temporal-cortex VIP/CR cells are concentrated in supra-granular layers, with substantially higher fractional density and a distinctive "fan cell" anatomy in primate prefrontal layer 1 not observed in rodent {cite:p}`Defelipe1999, Vormsteinschneider2020`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Viral manipulation of functionally distinct interneurons in mice, non-human primates and humans
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract discusses viral tools for PV and VIP interneurons across species but says nothing about laminar density, fan cell anatomy, or CR/VIP distribution differences.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Vormsteinschneider2020` further demonstrate that intersectional viral tools developed in mouse can label CR/VIP cells in non-human primate and human cortex with conservation of the broad molecular scheme — but the density and laminar layout differences mean that rodent-derived connectivity ratios should not be transferred quantitatively to human cortex without species-specific replication {cite:p}`Vormsteinschneider2020, Defelipe1999`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Viral manipulation of functionally distinct interneurons in mice, non-human primates and humans
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract confirms cross-species viral targeting of interneurons but does not discuss density/laminar differences or caution against transferring rodent connectivity ratios.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Vormsteinschneider2020` further demonstrate that intersectional viral tools developed in mouse can label CR/VIP cells in non-human primate and human cortex with conservation of the broad molecular scheme — but the density and laminar layout differences mean that rodent-derived connectivity ratios should not be transferred quantitatively to human cortex without species-specific replication {cite:p}`Vormsteinschneider2020, Defelipe1999`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Viral manipulation of functionally distinct interneurons in mice, non-human primates and humans
insufficient_triples.note: Same as above; abstract is silent on density differences and quantitative transferability caveats.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The minimal sufficient circuit model that {ref}`sec-in-vivo-behavior` will need — for autism, schizophrenia, neonatal injury and epilepsy — must accommodate developmental construction of VIP connectivity, and the comparative literature demands that quantitative rodent ratios be flagged as such when extrapolated to human cortex {cite:p}`Vormsteinschneider2020, Defelipe1999, Batistabrito2017, Qiu2020, Simacek2025a, Favuzzi2019`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Viral manipulation of functionally distinct interneurons in mice, non-human primates and humans
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss developmental construction of VIP connectivity or caution about extrapolating rodent ratios to human cortex.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: A useful operational summary is the following. *Treat the VIP→SST→Pyr disinhibitory motif as a layer- and area-specific computation that a cortical microcircuit can perform when modulator-targeted afferents are active, not as a fixed wiring rule that all VIP cells obey under all conditions*. This formulation accommodates the canonical landmark results {cite:p}`Pfeffer2013, Pi2013, Lee2013, Fu2014, Karnani2016a, Karnani2016b`, the long-range and thalamic asymmetries {cite:p}`Wall2016, Williams2019, Anastasiades2021a, Audette2018, Stachniak2023, Bilash2023, Cruikshank2012`, the modulator pharmacology {cite:p}`Porter1999, Kawaguchi1997b, Arroyo2012, Vonengelhardt2007, Granger2020, Obermayer2019, Letzkus2011, Ferezou2002, Vucurovic2010, Frazer2017`, the layer- and area-specific exceptions to canonical disinhibition {cite:p}`Yu2019, Zhou2017, Anastasiades2021a, Walker2016`, the developmental and comparative qualifications {cite:p}`Favuzzi2019, Batistabrito2017, Qiu2020, Simacek2025a, Vormsteinschneider2020, Defelipe1999`, and the hippocampal divergence {cite:p}`Tyan2014, Turi2019, Francavilla2018a, Booker2018, Bilash2023, Tamboli2024, Toth1993` within a single coherent picture.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Viral manipulation of functionally distinct interneurons in mice, non-human primates and humans
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract focuses on viral enhancer tools, not on VIP→SST→Pyr disinhibition motifs, comparative qualifications, or circuit-level wiring rules.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Computational reconciliation comes from the membrane-potential analysis of {cite:t}`Garciadelmolino2017` and {cite:t}`Hertag2019`, in which subthreshold cholinergic depolarisation gates the gain of VIP responses to top-down glutamatergic input rather than driving spikes on its own — an ‘AND’ rather than an ‘OR’ recruitment rule.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Paradoxical response reversal of top-down modulation in cortical circuits with three interneuron types
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract discusses nonlinear I/O and response reversal, but not membrane-potential gating, cholinergic depolarisation, or AND-gate recruitment rule.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The conflict largely dissolves once preparation and behavioural epoch are matched — top-down drive dominates during attentional or top-down sensory tasks, cholinergic drive during locomotion-coupled arousal — and joint manipulation experiments {cite:p}`Pinto2015,Kamigaki2017,Williams2019` show the two routes are concurrently active and at least partly multiplicative {cite:p}`Garciadelmolino2017,Hertag2019`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Paradoxical response reversal of top-down modulation in cortical circuits with three interneuron types
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss cholinergic vs top-down routes, joint manipulation, or multiplicative interactions between drive sources.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The numerical asymmetry is part of why the canonical motif works: a small VIP population can disinhibit a much larger pyramidal population if its synaptic targeting is sufficiently selective, but the same numerical asymmetry constrains how much absolute gain can be produced through any single motif and forces the engagement of multiple parallel motifs to scale gain with task demand {cite:p}`Hertag2019,Garciadelmolino2017,Litwinkumar2016`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Paradoxical response reversal of top-down modulation in cortical circuits with three interneuron types
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss numerical asymmetry of cell types, population ratios, or scaling of gain through parallel motifs.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Bakken2021a`, in the BICCN cross-species motor-cortex taxonomy, showed that *Vip* GABAergic subtypes are markedly more diversified between humans/marmosets and mice than between primates, indicating species-specific expansion of the VIP transcriptomic axis {cite:p}`Bakken2021a,Braininitiativecellcensusnetworkbiccn2021`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Comparative cellular analysis of motor cortex in human, marmoset and mouse
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract mentions species-dependent specializations and differences in cell-type proportions, but does not specifically discuss VIP subtype diversification or expansion.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Bakken2021a`, in the BICCN cross-species motor-cortex taxonomy, showed that *Vip* GABAergic subtypes are markedly more diversified between humans/marmosets and mice than between primates, indicating species-specific expansion of the VIP transcriptomic axis {cite:p}`Bakken2021a,Braininitiativecellcensusnetworkbiccn2021`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Comparative cellular analysis of motor cortex in human, marmoset and mouse
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract mentions species-dependent specializations but does not specifically address VIP GABAergic subtype diversification or species-specific VIP transcriptomic axis expansion.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The broader conclusion the Patch-seq literature now supports is that subclass-level e-type prediction is reproducibly accurate (~78% MET-type prediction in mouse VISp {cite:p}`Gouwens2020a`), but within-VIP biophysical heterogeneity is real and reflects a continuum of identities rather than discrete cell types {cite:p}`Scala2021,Bugeon2022,Lee2023a,Bakken2021a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Comparative cellular analysis of motor cortex in human, marmoset and mouse
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss ~78% MET-type prediction accuracy, VIP biophysical heterogeneity as a continuum, or Patch-seq classification accuracy in mouse VISp.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Within VIP, however, individual properties (resting V_{m}, IS-firing fraction, IS mechanism) vary substantially across studies — sometimes for biological reasons (layer-specific subtypes {cite:p}`Pronneke2015,Gouwens2020a`, species expansion {cite:p}`Bakken2021a,Chartrand2023`, region-specific I-S3 vs cortical IS biology {cite:p}`Guetmccreight2020b,Michaud2024`), sometimes for methodological ones (denominator definitions {cite:p}`Cauli1997,Cauli2000,Anastasiades2021a`, recording vintage {cite:p}`Bell2015,Michaud2024`).
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Comparative cellular analysis of motor cortex in human, marmoset and mouse
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract mentions species-dependent specializations broadly but does not specifically discuss species expansion of VIP electrophysiological properties.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Boldog2018` complicated this picture further with the human-specific 'rosehip' L1 interneuron — a CCK/LAMP5 type *distinct* from VIP cells — that fires stuttering/IS patterns at V_{rest} = −61.3 ± 5.8 mV (n=10) with β/γ-tuned subthreshold oscillations {cite:p}`Boldog2018`.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Boldog2018` complicated this picture further with the human-specific 'rosehip' L1 interneuron — a CCK/LAMP5 type *distinct* from VIP cells — that fires stuttering/IS patterns at V_{rest} = −61.3 ± 5.8 mV (n=10) with β/γ-tuned subthreshold oscillations {cite:p}`Boldog2018`.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The synaptic-connectivity picture that emerges from 467 papers is a structured composite. **On the input side**, VIP interneurons are a preferential target of long-range cortical and higher-order thalamic glutamatergic input, of basal-forebrain cholinergic input via slow nicotinic receptors, of raphe serotonergic input via 5-HT3 receptors, and of mixed-sign noradrenergic input — while local pyramidal drive is comparable to that onto SST and PV cells {cite:p}`Wall2016, Lee2013, Zhang2014, Williams2019, Anastasiades2021a, Cruikshank2012, Audette2018, Stachniak2023, Bilash2023, Porter1999, Kawaguchi1997b, Kawaguchi1998, Vonengelhardt2007, Arroyo2012, Fu2014, Ferezou2002, Vucurovic2010, Frazer2017, Letzkus2011`. **On the output side**, VIP cells preferentially inhibit SST interneurons, but they also inhibit PV cells in deeper layers, NDNF/L1 interneurons, pyramidal cells in deep cortex and OLM cells in CA1, with substantial cell-to-cell heterogeneity that the canonical schematic flattens {cite:p}`Pfeffer2013, Pi2013, Lee2013, Karnani2016a, Karnani2016b, Walker2016, Yu2019, Zhou2017, Anastasiades2021a, Schuman2019, Hafner2021, Tyan2014, Turi2019, Francavilla2018a, Booker2018`. **On the behavioural side**, the consequence of this wiring is a deployable disinhibitory operation that is recruited by arousal and reinforcement signals across V1, A1, mPFC, BLA and CA1, but which is sign-dependent on visual context, source-area-specific in cross-modal attention, and layer-dependent in its non-SST outputs {cite:p}`Fu2014, Pi2013, Letzkus2011, Krabbe2019, Pakan2016, Dipoppa2018, Sabri2024, Kamigaki2017, Pinto2015, Szadai2022, Tamboli2024, Ibrahim2016, Kaneko2024, Anastasiades2021a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Noradrenergic Excitation and Inhibition of GABAergic Cell Types in Rat Frontal Cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Paper shows differential NA effects on GABAergic subtypes but does not discuss VIP inputs/outputs or disinhibitory circuits as claimed.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: A subset of VIP/CR interneurons in CA1 projects out of the hippocampus to the medial septum {cite:p}`Toth1993, Francavilla2018a, Booker2018`, recapitulating the rare "GABAergic projection neuron" wiring described in earlier classical anatomy {cite:p}`Toth1993, Booker2018`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Postsynaptic targets of GABAergic hippocampal neurons in the medial septum-diagonal band of broca complex
insufficient_triples.note: Paper describes GABAergic hippocamposeptal projection from CA1 nonpyramidal cells but does not mention VIP/CR interneurons specifically.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The hippocampal evidence therefore argues for an *area-specific connectivity logic* in which the molecular identity is conserved but the wiring is repurposed: VIP cells are deployed wherever a cortical or hippocampal microcircuit needs a modulator-targeted, IN-targeting disinhibitor, but the *which-IN* and *which-pyramidal-population* are tuned to local computational requirements {cite:p}`Tyan2014, Turi2019, Francavilla2018a, Booker2018, Bilash2023, Tamboli2024, Toth1993`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Postsynaptic targets of GABAergic hippocampal neurons in the medial septum-diagonal band of broca complex
insufficient_triples.note: Paper does not discuss VIP cells, area-specific connectivity logic, or disinhibition; claim's scope far exceeds what paper addresses.

This formulation accommodates the canonical landmark results {cite:p}`Pfeffer2013, Pi2013, Lee2013, Fu2014, Karnani2016a, Karnani2016b`, the long-range and thalamic asymmetries {cite:p}`Wall2016, Williams2019, Anastasiades2021a, Audette2018, Stachniak2023, Bilash2023, Cruikshank2012`, the modulator pharmacology {cite:p}`Porter1999, Kawaguchi1997b, Arroyo2012, Vonengelhardt2007, Granger2020, Obermayer2019, Letzkus2011, Ferezou2002, Vucurovic2010, Frazer2017`, the layer- and area-specific exceptions to canonical disinhibition {cite:p}`Yu2019, Zhou2017, Anastasiades2021a, Walker2016`, the developmental and comparative qualifications {cite:p}`Favuzzi2019, Batistabrito2017, Qiu2020, Simacek2025a, Vormsteinschneider2020, Defelipe1999`, and the hippocampal divergence {cite:p}`Tyan2014, Turi2019, Francavilla2018a, Booker2018, Bilash2023, Tamboli2024, Toth1993` within a single coherent picture.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Sag/I_{h} is modest rather than absent: {cite:t}`Pronneke2015` measured a sag index of 11.2 ± 6.8% across cortical VIP cells; {cite:t}`Vucurovic2010` reported 12.1 ± 7.8% in juvenile S1; CA1 IS3 cells show pronounced sag in some recordings and minimal sag in others {cite:p}`Bell2015,Michaud2024`; and inferior-colliculus VIP-Cre stellate cells (which are *glutamatergic*, not GABAergic) show essentially no sag {cite:p}`Goyer2019` — flagging that VIP-Cre lines tag biophysically distinct cell classes outside the cortex.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Noradrenergic recruitment is the least monolithic of the three: α-adrenergic stimulation excites a fraction of VIP/CR cells in slice {cite:p}`Kawaguchi1998, Cauli2014, Caputi2009`, while β-adrenergic and tonic LC-driven effects vary across area, behavioural state and recording configuration {cite:p}`Kawaguchi1998, Cauli2014, Letzkus2011, Szadai2022`.

insufficient_triples.paper_title: Cortex-wide response mode of VIP-expressing inhibitory neurons by reward and punishment
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract shows cortex-wide VIP activation by reinforcers but does not address SST suppression, dendritic disinhibition, or activity in BLA/CA1/mPFC specifically.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The synaptic-connectivity picture that emerges from 467 papers is a structured composite. **On the input side**, VIP interneurons are a preferential target of long-range cortical and higher-order thalamic glutamatergic input, of basal-forebrain cholinergic input via slow nicotinic receptors, of raphe serotonergic input via 5-HT3 receptors, and of mixed-sign noradrenergic input — while local pyramidal drive is comparable to that onto SST and PV cells {cite:p}`Wall2016, Lee2013, Zhang2014, Williams2019, Anastasiades2021a, Cruikshank2012, Audette2018, Stachniak2023, Bilash2023, Porter1999, Kawaguchi1997b, Kawaguchi1998, Vonengelhardt2007, Arroyo2012, Fu2014, Ferezou2002, Vucurovic2010, Frazer2017, Letzkus2011`. **On the output side**, VIP cells preferentially inhibit SST interneurons, but they also inhibit PV cells in deeper layers, NDNF/L1 interneurons, pyramidal cells in deep cortex and OLM cells in CA1, with substantial cell-to-cell heterogeneity that the canonical schematic flattens {cite:p}`Pfeffer2013, Pi2013, Lee2013, Karnani2016a, Karnani2016b, Walker2016, Yu2019, Zhou2017, Anastasiades2021a, Schuman2019, Hafner2021, Tyan2014, Turi2019, Francavilla2018a, Booker2018`. **On the behavioural side**, the consequence of this wiring is a deployable disinhibitory operation that is recruited by arousal and reinforcement signals across V1, A1, mPFC, BLA and CA1, but which is sign-dependent on visual context, source-area-specific in cross-modal attention, and layer-dependent in its non-SST outputs {cite:p}`Fu2014, Pi2013, Letzkus2011, Krabbe2019, Pakan2016, Dipoppa2018, Sabri2024, Kamigaki2017, Pinto2015, Szadai2022, Tamboli2024, Ibrahim2016, Kaneko2024, Anastasiades2021a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Cortex-wide response mode of VIP-expressing inhibitory neurons by reward and punishment
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract supports cortex-wide VIP recruitment by reinforcers but does not address synaptic connectivity, modulator receptor subtypes, or SST/PV output specifics described in the claim.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The convergence of three independent methodological lines — paired recording, optogenetic dissection and EM ultrastructure — on the same compartment-specific output rule strengthens the case that the canonical schematic is correct *as far as it goes*, while leaving open the layer- and area-specific exceptions documented in earlier subsections {cite:p}`Hajos1996, Defelipe1999, Pfeffer2013, Yu2019, Anastasiades2021a, Walker2016`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Target Selectivity and Neurochemical Characteristics of VIP-immunoreactive Interneurons in the Rat Dentate Gyrus
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss convergence of paired recording, optogenetics, and EM or a canonical compartment-specific output rule.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Across visual, auditory, somatosensory, prefrontal, and motor cortex, optogenetic and chemogenetic manipulations of VIP cells have produced phenomena consistent with this motif {cite:p}`Pi2013,Lee2013,Fu2014,Zhang2014,Kuchibhotla2017,Cichon2017,Williams2019,Veit2023`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Activation of cortical somatostatin interneurons prevents the development of neuropathic pain
insufficient_triples.note: Paper studies somatosensory cortex neuropathic pain; no optogenetic/chemogenetic VIP manipulations across multiple cortical areas.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: In M1, learning-related cholinergic input to VIP cells correlates with dendritic plasticity in projection pyramidal neurons {cite:p}`Cichon2017`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Activation of cortical somatostatin interneurons prevents the development of neuropathic pain
insufficient_triples.note: Paper is about S1 neuropathic pain, not M1 motor learning or cholinergic input to VIP cells and dendritic plasticity.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: In M1, VIP recruitment is tightly coupled to cholinergic drive during motor learning, and the canonical motif appears to gate dendritic spine plasticity in projection pyramidal neurons {cite:p}`Cichon2017,Garciajuncoclemente2017`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Activation of cortical somatostatin interneurons prevents the development of neuropathic pain
insufficient_triples.note: Paper studies S1 in neuropathic pain model, not M1 motor learning, cholinergic drive, or dendritic spine plasticity.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: In S1, top-down feedback in object detection and texture discrimination tasks recruits VIP cells whose suppression reduces task performance {cite:p}`Williams2019,Sermet2019,Bigelow2019`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Pathway-, layer- and cell-type-specific thalamic input to mouse barrel cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Sermet2019 describes thalamic input pathways to barrel cortex cell types in vitro. The abstract says nothing about top-down feedback, object detection, texture discrimination tasks, VIP recruitment, or behavioral effects of VIP suppression.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: In S1, the motif holds in object-localisation and active touch tasks {cite:p}`Williams2019,Sermet2019`, but layer-specific variants have been described in which thalamic inputs to deep-layer VIP cells engage a different downstream target set {cite:p}`Munoz2017,Sermet2019,Garciajuncoclemente2017`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Pathway-, layer- and cell-type-specific thalamic input to mouse barrel cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Paper describes layer-specific thalamic inputs to VIP cells but not in behavioral tasks nor explicitly about different downstream target sets.
