insufficient_triples.claim_text: Active task engagement adds a further multiplicative layer: when an arousal-matched mouse switches from passive listening to active discrimination, cholinergic axon activation transiently re-organises the local interneuron network, with VIP cells participating differently than during passive locomotion {cite:p}`Kuchibhotla2017,Collins2023`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Cholinergic and noradrenergic axonal activity contains a behavioral-state signal that is coordinated across the dorsal cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Paper does not address active task engagement or passive vs active discrimination effects on VIP interneurons.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The closest in-set evidence comes from {cite:p}`Reimer2014,Garciajuncoclemente2017,Munoz2017,Collins2023`, which demonstrate cell-type-specific arousal coupling without a quantitative test of monotonicity.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Cholinergic and noradrenergic axonal activity contains a behavioral-state signal that is coordinated across the dorsal cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Paper shows state-dependent activity in cholinergic interneurons but does not specifically test cell-type-specific arousal coupling or monotonicity.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Cortical slow-oscillation Up-states recruit VIP cells unevenly across preparations and species {cite:p}`Tahvildari2012,Kawaguchi2001,Brecier2022,Sabri2024`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Vigilance and Behavioral State-Dependent Modulation of Cortical Neuronal Activity throughout the Sleep/Wake Cycle
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract discusses sleep states and delta oscillation modulation but does not specifically address VIP recruitment during cortical slow-oscillation Up-states.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: **The disinhibition motif and its alternatives.** **(A)** Canonical motif: VIP cells, recruited by long-range glutamatergic and ascending cholinergic inputs, preferentially inhibit SST cells, releasing pyramidal dendrites from inhibition; minor VIP→PV and VIP→pyramidal edges are drawn explicitly to flag that the canonical schematic is a tendency rather than an exclusive wiring rule {cite:p}`Pfeffer2013,Pi2013,Lee2013,Fu2014,Karnani2016a`. **(B)** Three alternative motifs documented in the same evidence base: direct VIP→PV control of perisomatic inhibition {cite:p}`Pi2013,Karnani2016b,Kuchibhotla2017`, direct VIP→pyramidal inhibition by bipolar/CR-positive VIP cells {cite:p}`Lee2013,Karnani2016a,Karnani2016b,Schneidermizell2025`, and a layer-1 VIP→NDNF disinhibitory motif gating apical dendritic input {cite:p}`Abs2018,Anastasiades2021a,Veit2023`; the hippocampal VIP→OLM/basket motif is a homologue with a distinct oscillatory context {cite:p}`Turi2019,Francavilla2018a,Dudai2020`. **(C)** Decision tree mapping behavioural context — locomotion, attentional top-down, reinforcement, fear/learning — to the motif most consistent with the empirical recruitment data and to the supporting cite-keys; the assignment is qualitative because the literature does not yet contain joint manipulations of multiple motifs under matched conditions {cite:p}`Pi2013,Lee2013,Fu2014,Pinto2015,Kuchibhotla2017,Cichon2017,Williams2019,Krabbe2019,Veit2023`. **(D)** Schematic legend distinguishing measured edges (solid) from inferred or context-dependent edges (dashed). *Caveat:* this figure is a schematic with no quantitative data substrate; assignment of behavioural context to dominant motif in Panel C is inferred from joint reading of the cited recruitment studies and is not the output of a meta-analytic weighting. :::
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Activation of cortical somatostatin interneurons prevents the development of neuropathic pain
insufficient_triples.note: Cichon2017 is about neuropathic pain in somatosensory cortex, not a recruitment study mapping behavioral context to disinhibitory motifs as described.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Fourth, the motif is not the *defining* function of the VIP class: VIP cells participate in oscillatory pacing {cite:p}`Turi2019,Bastos2023a`, plasticity gating {cite:p}`Cichon2017,Krabbe2019,Tamboli2024,Ramosprats2022`, developmental wiring {cite:p}`Batistabrito2017,Priya2018,Ferguson2023a,Ferguson2023b`, and direct pyramidal control {cite:p}`Karnani2016b,Lee2013,Schneidermizell2025`, none of which are captured by the canonical motif alone.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Activation of cortical somatostatin interneurons prevents the development of neuropathic pain
insufficient_triples.note: Paper shows VIP↑ during neuropathic pain development but does not demonstrate VIP cells gating plasticity; SST activation reverses allodynia but plasticity gating per se is not shown.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The canonical motif is a useful first hypothesis whenever a salient external event coincides with arousal in a cortical task; it is a misleading default when the task involves stationary visual processing in which locomotion is absent {cite:p}`Pakan2016,Dipoppa2018,Garrett2020`, when the cortical area engages a parallel cholinergic stream {cite:p}`Kuchibhotla2017,Williams2019`, when learning-related plasticity rather than acute gain is the readout {cite:p}`Cichon2017,Krabbe2019,Abs2018,Tamboli2024`, or when the behavioural context engages NDNF-mediated apical dendritic disinhibition that may operate on its own timescale {cite:p}`Abs2018,Veit2023,Anastasiades2021a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Activation of cortical somatostatin interneurons prevents the development of neuropathic pain
insufficient_triples.note: Paper shows altered interneuron activity in neuropathic pain, not learning-related plasticity gating as the manuscript claims. Context mismatch.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: It explains why salient external events combined with arousal produce gain enhancement of pyramidal stimulus responses in superficial cortex {cite:p}`Lee2013,Fu2014,Zhang2014,Pinto2015,Williams2019,Veit2023`. It does not explain why locomotion-coupled VIP activity in V1 fails to translate into uniform SST suppression across higher visual areas {cite:p}`Pakan2016,Garrett2020,Dipoppa2018`, why cholinergic re-routing of inhibition produces simultaneous engagement of canonical and direct PV-mediated streams {cite:p}`Kuchibhotla2017`, why VIP perturbation can produce subtractive rather than divisive changes in pyramidal firing in some preparations {cite:p}`Hertag2019,Garciadelmolino2017`, or why VIP cells are required for plasticity-gating in motor and amygdalar circuits whose connectivity does not strictly fit the canonical schematic {cite:p}`Cichon2017,Krabbe2019,Tamboli2024`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Activation of cortical somatostatin interneurons prevents the development of neuropathic pain
insufficient_triples.note: Paper shows VIP↑/SST↓ in neuropathic pain in S1, not plasticity-gating in motor/amygdalar circuits with non-canonical connectivity as claimed.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: This circuit-level reading also clarifies what the canonical motif explains and what it does not. It explains why salient external events combined with arousal produce gain enhancement of pyramidal stimulus responses in superficial cortex {cite:p}`Lee2013,Fu2014,Zhang2014,Pinto2015,Williams2019,Veit2023`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Higher-Order Thalamocortical Inputs Gate Synaptic Long-Term Potentiation via Disinhibition
insufficient_triples.note: Williams2019 shows VIP disinhibition gates LTP, but the study measures plasticity rather than acute gain enhancement of stimulus responses per se.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: ChAT-VIP overlap is partial and area-specific, and the cholinergic VIP subset is a subpopulation rather than the rule {cite:p}`Walker2016,Koukouli2017,Posuszny2020,Mcfarlan2024a,Mcfarlan2024b`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Nicotine reverses hypofrontality in animal models of addiction and schizophrenia
insufficient_triples.note: Paper focuses on α5-nAChR SNP effects on VIP interneurons, not ChAT-VIP overlap or cholinergic VIP subpopulation identity.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Cross-species and human-relevant work on VIP cell-type composition is taken up in detail in {ref}`sec-cross-areas`; here the relevant point is that the in-vivo phenomenology and modulator dependence of VIP cells generalise at least partially to primate and human cortex, supporting the relevance of the rodent literature to behavioural neurobiology beyond the mouse {cite:p}`Poorthuis2018,Koukouli2017,Lecrux2016,Collins2023`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Nicotine reverses hypofrontality in animal models of addiction and schizophrenia
insufficient_triples.note: Paper uses mouse models carrying human SNP but does not study primate or human cortex VIP cells directly.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Pathological oscillations — spike-and-wave seizures, Fragile-X gamma hypersynchrony, Rett PAC, Dravet IS-cell hypofunction, schizophrenia-associated VIP-mRNA reduction, and Alzheimer-disease gamma–clearance coupling — share a common mechanism in which VIP-cell perturbation alters the regulatory bandwidth of an otherwise PV/SST-driven rhythm {cite:p}`Hall2015,Goel2025,Kranz2025,Goff2019,Kiss2026,Murdock2024,Koukouli2017`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Nicotine reverses hypofrontality in animal models of addiction and schizophrenia
insufficient_triples.note: Paper addresses hypofrontality via VIP/SST circuit disruption but does not discuss oscillations, rhythms, or schizophrenia-associated VIP-mRNA reduction.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: In mPFC, optogenetic activation of VIP cells ameliorates fear-related stress-induced behavioural deficits, consistent with a permissive role for VIP-mediated disinhibition in flexible affective control {cite:p}`Li2022a,Lee2019`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: VIP Interneurons Contribute to Avoidance Behavior by Regulating Information Flow across Hippocampal-Prefrontal Networks
insufficient_triples.note: Lee2019 shows VIP gating of avoidance behavior, not amelioration of fear-related stress-induced deficits specifically.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Silverstein2025` documented that repeated ventral-hippocampus input persistently depresses mPFC VIP activity, contributing to spatial working-memory deficits, and {cite:t}`Malik2022` showed that long-range PFC GABAergic projections preferentially inhibit hippocampal VIP cells to enable top-down signal-to-noise control. These results indicate that frontal VIP function is bidirectional: it both broadcasts permissive state signals locally and is itself targeted by long-range inhibitory feedback from associated regions {cite:p}`Lee2019,Malik2022,Silverstein2025`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: VIP Interneurons Contribute to Avoidance Behavior by Regulating Information Flow across Hippocampal-Prefrontal Networks
insufficient_triples.note: Lee2019 shows VIP gating of hippocampal input but does not demonstrate VIP being targeted by long-range inhibitory feedback.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Munozmanchado2018` used single-cell RNA-seq of dorsal striatum to identify a previously unrecognised VIP/Calb2-positive interneuron type, distinct from canonical PV, SST, and cholinergic types, that is molecularly closer to cortical VIP than to other striatal interneurons — suggesting a CGE-derived migration into striatum {cite:p}`Munozmanchado2018,Miyoshi2010,Tricoire2011`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: A Blueprint for the Spatiotemporal Origins of Mouse Hippocampal Interneuron Diversity
insufficient_triples.note: Paper addresses hippocampal interneuron origins from CGE but does not discuss striatal VIP interneurons or CGE-derived migration into striatum.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The most extensively characterised cortical VIP population sits in mouse V1, where VIP+ small bipolar/multipolar cells with vertically descending axonal arbors target apical dendrites of L5 pyramidal neurons and innervate L2/3 SST cells {cite:p}`Kawaguchi1996,Gonchar2008,Kawaguchi1997a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Multiple distinct subtypes of GABAergic neurons in mouse visual cortex identified by triple immunostaining
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract describes chemical classification of interneuron subtypes via immunostaining, not morphology, axonal arbors, or synaptic targets of VIP cells.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Gonchar2008` documented that L2/3 small bipolar VIP cells display dense vertical axonal arbors descending to L5, consistent with apical-dendrite-targeting onto pyramidal neurons in addition to L2/3 SST cells, and {cite:t}`Kawaguchi1996` and {cite:t}`Kawaguchi1997a` established that the bipolar/double-bouquet morphology distinguishes VIP cells from PV multipolar baskets and SST Martinotti cells {cite:p}`Kawaguchi1996,Kawaguchi1997a,Gonchar2008`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Multiple distinct subtypes of GABAergic neurons in mouse visual cortex identified by triple immunostaining
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract covers immunochemical subtypes, not morphological descriptions of bipolar VIP cells or their axonal projections to L5.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Gonchar2008` documented that L2/3 small bipolar VIP cells display dense vertical axonal arbors descending to L5, consistent with apical-dendrite-targeting onto pyramidal neurons in addition to L2/3 SST cells, and {cite:t}`Kawaguchi1996` and {cite:t}`Kawaguchi1997a` established that the bipolar/double-bouquet morphology distinguishes VIP cells from PV multipolar baskets and SST Martinotti cells {cite:p}`Kawaguchi1996,Kawaguchi1997a,Gonchar2008`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Multiple distinct subtypes of GABAergic neurons in mouse visual cortex identified by triple immunostaining
insufficient_triples.note: Duplicate of above; abstract lacks morphological data on VIP bipolar cells or vertical axonal arbors.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The morphological substrate identified by {cite:t}`Kawaguchi1996` and {cite:t}`Gonchar2008` — bipolar VIP cells with vertical apical-targeting axons — provides the direct anatomical route from this top-down input onto deep-layer pyramidal output {cite:p}`Kawaguchi1996,Gonchar2008,Bastos2023a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Multiple distinct subtypes of GABAergic neurons in mouse visual cortex identified by triple immunostaining
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract describes chemical classification, not bipolar morphology or apical-targeting axons of VIP neurons.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The morphological substrate identified by {cite:t}`Kawaguchi1996` and {cite:t}`Gonchar2008` — bipolar VIP cells with vertical apical-targeting axons — provides the direct anatomical route from this top-down input onto deep-layer pyramidal output {cite:p}`Kawaguchi1996,Gonchar2008,Bastos2023a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Multiple distinct subtypes of GABAergic neurons in mouse visual cortex identified by triple immunostaining
insufficient_triples.note: Same as above; no morphological or connectivity data for VIP cells in abstract.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Hippocampal VIP/IS-3 motif distinct from neocortex (schematic). **Panel A**: CA1 lamellar cartoon with VIP/IS-3 cell soma in stratum oriens/pyramidale, axonal projections onto OLM and bistratified cells, and disinhibition of CA1 pyramidal cell distal-dendritic input by removal of OLM-mediated dendritic inhibition {cite:p}`Tyan2014,Gulyas1996`. **Panel B**: Comparison of cortical versus hippocampal VIP motifs — cortical VIP cells are bipolar with descending axons targeting L5 SST cells {cite:p}`Kawaguchi1996,Kawaguchi1997a,Gonchar2008`, whereas hippocampal IS-3 cells preferentially target other GABAergic interneurons rather than principal cells {cite:p}`Gulyas1996,Tyan2014`. **Panel C**: Subcortical VIP pathways summarised for cross-region completeness — BLA VIP cells implement a cortex-like disinhibitory motif {cite:p}`Rhomberg2018,Vereczki2021`, dorsal striatum contains a previously unrecognised CGE-derived VIP/Calb2 type {cite:p}`Munozmanchado2018`, and SCN VIP cells act as peptidergic synchronisers via VIP/VPAC2 signalling {cite:p}`Maywood2006,Cutler2003,Jones2018`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Multiple distinct subtypes of GABAergic neurons in mouse visual cortex identified by triple immunostaining
insufficient_triples.note: Paper identifies VIP co-expression subtypes in mouse V1 but abstract lacks morphological data on bipolar VIP cells or descending axons.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Scala2021` resolves the cellular substrate at the molecular level: single-cell transcriptomics of mouse M1 splits VIP cells into Vip-Mybpc1, Vip-Lect1 and other subtypes whose transcriptional profiles align with electrophysiologically defined fast-adapting and irregular-spiking subclasses, and whose homologues are conserved across species {cite:p}`Scala2021`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Phenotypic variation of transcriptomic cell types in mouse motor cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract confirms Patch-seq in M1 with VIP family but does not name Vip-Mybpc1/Vip-Lect1 subtypes or alignment with fast-adapting/irregular-spiking classes.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Scala2021` resolves the cellular substrate at the molecular level: single-cell transcriptomics of mouse M1 splits VIP cells into Vip-Mybpc1, Vip-Lect1 and other subtypes whose transcriptional profiles align with electrophysiologically defined fast-adapting and irregular-spiking subclasses, and whose homologues are conserved across species {cite:p}`Scala2021`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Phenotypic variation of transcriptomic cell types in mouse motor cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Same as above; abstract lacks specific VIP subtype names and electrophysiological subclass alignment details.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: CGE origin and 5HT3aR expression mark VIP+ cells from cortex, hippocampus, amygdala, and striatum {cite:p}`Miyoshi2010,Vucurovic2010,Tricoire2011,Munozmanchado2018`, and transcriptomic taxonomies reveal homologous Vip-Mybpc1 / Vip-Lect1 subtypes across mouse cortical areas {cite:p}`Scala2021`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Phenotypic variation of transcriptomic cell types in mouse motor cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract confirms VIP subtypes exist in M1 but does not name Vip-Mybpc1/Vip-Lect1 or discuss cross-area homology explicitly.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Cortical slow-oscillation Up-states recruit VIP cells unevenly across preparations and species {cite:p}`Tahvildari2012,Kawaguchi2001,Brecier2022,Sabri2024`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Vasoactive intestinal peptide-expressing interneurons modulate the effect of behavioral state on cortical activity
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract discusses VIP modulation of state-dependent activity but does not specifically mention Up-state recruitment of VIP cells.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Second, the motif is *not* exclusive: in the same preparations, VIP→PV, VIP→pyramidal, and VIP→NDNF connections are present, behaviourally engaged, and quantitatively non-trivial {cite:p}`Karnani2016a,Karnani2016b,Yu2019,Abs2018,Schneidermizell2025`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Learning-Related Plasticity in Dendrite-Targeting Layer 1 Interneurons
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract discusses Martinotti cell inhibition of NDNF-INs but does not explicitly mention VIP→NDNF connections.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The non-uniqueness is also real: VIP cells form measurable contacts on PV, pyramidal, NDNF, and CCK targets, all of which are behaviourally engaged in some condition documented in the literature reviewed here {cite:p}`Karnani2016a,Karnani2016b,Abs2018,Anastasiades2021a,Schneidermizell2025,Veit2023`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Learning-Related Plasticity in Dendrite-Targeting Layer 1 Interneurons
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract mentions Martinotti→NDNF-IN control but does not explicitly discuss VIP contacts on NDNF targets.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Fourth, the motif is not the *defining* function of the VIP class: VIP cells participate in oscillatory pacing {cite:p}`Turi2019,Bastos2023a`, plasticity gating {cite:p}`Cichon2017,Krabbe2019,Tamboli2024,Ramosprats2022`, developmental wiring {cite:p}`Batistabrito2017,Priya2018,Ferguson2023a,Ferguson2023b`, and direct pyramidal control {cite:p}`Karnani2016b,Lee2013,Schneidermizell2025`, none of which are captured by the canonical motif alone.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Inhibitory specificity from a connectomic census of mouse visual cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Paper focuses on connectivity rules, not direct pyramidal control by VIP cells specifically; abstract mentions disinhibitory specialists but not VIP direct pyramidal targeting explicitly.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: In layer 5 and layer 6, the motif is engaged differently: deep-layer VIP cells receive a higher proportion of thalamic input and contact a different distribution of postsynaptic targets, including projection-class pyramidal neurons that are themselves heterogeneous {cite:p}`Anastasiades2021a,Sermet2019,Munoz2017,Schneidermizell2025`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Inhibitory specificity from a connectomic census of mouse visual cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract describes layer-spanning inhibitory connectivity and differential targeting of subpopulations, but does not specifically address deep-layer VIP thalamic input or projection-class targeting.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The authors themselves note that this finding has not yet been independently replicated in other chronic pain models or laboratories, and we mark it as a single-paper claim awaiting confirmation {cite:p}`Li2022a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Activation of VIP interneurons in the prefrontal cortex ameliorates neuropathic pain aversiveness
insufficient_triples.note: The abstract does not state whether this finding has been independently replicated; the single-paper status is a meta-claim not verifiable from the abstract.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The natural conclusion is that the same molecular cell class participates in different cortical implementations of state-dependent gain — adding gain in V1 and subtracting gain in ACtx — depending on local synaptic weights and on the dominant neuromodulator engaged by the behaviour {cite:p}`Bigelow2019,Yavorska2021,Lecrux2016`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Neuronal networks and mediators of cortical neurovascular coupling responses in normal and altered brain states
insufficient_triples.note: Paper discusses pathway-specific interneuron recruitment for NVC, not gain modulation in V1 vs ACtx. Role as 'contradicts' is unclear from abstract.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The third axis is dominant neuromodulator: nicotinic ACh and 5-HT3A serotonin act fast and directly on VIP cells, while α-adrenergic noradrenaline acts more slowly and is selective for subtypes {cite:p}`Letzkus2011,Ferezou2002,Lee2010,Kawaguchi1998,Lecrux2016`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Neuronal networks and mediators of cortical neurovascular coupling responses in normal and altered brain states
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract mentions cholinergic and noradrenergic pathways recruit specific interneurons but does not detail receptor subtypes (nicotinic, α-adrenergic) or direct action on VIP cells.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Cross-species and human-relevant work on VIP cell-type composition is taken up in detail in {ref}`sec-cross-areas`; here the relevant point is that the in-vivo phenomenology and modulator dependence of VIP cells generalise at least partially to primate and human cortex, supporting the relevance of the rodent literature to behavioural neurobiology beyond the mouse {cite:p}`Poorthuis2018,Koukouli2017,Lecrux2016,Collins2023`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Neuronal networks and mediators of cortical neurovascular coupling responses in normal and altered brain states
insufficient_triples.note: Paper uses whisker-barrel cortex in rodents; abstract does not address cross-species or human relevance of VIP cells.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The within-hippocampus consensus that emerges from {cite:p}`Turi2019,Francavilla2018a,Luo2020,Tamboli2024,Neubrandt2025a,Lenkey2025` is that VIP recruitment is state-dependent but its sign and downstream effect differ between subregions and between IS-cell subtypes — consistent with the cortical reading but cautioning against a single "VIP enables learning" rule. :::
insufficient_triples.paper_title: VIP interneurons control hippocampal place cell remapping through transient disinhibition in novel environments.
insufficient_triples.note: Paper shows VIP recruitment is state-dependent in CA1 but doesn't discuss subregion differences or IS-cell subtypes cautioning against a single rule.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: BLA VIP cells implement a cortex-like disinhibitory motif during fear-conditioning circuitry {cite:p}`Rhomberg2018,Vereczki2021`, while striatal VIP/Calb2 cells — molecularly closer to cortical VIP than to other striatal types — sit in a network whose canonical PV/SST/cholinergic taxonomy does not predict where this fourth class fits behaviourally {cite:p}`Munozmanchado2018,Scala2021,Miyoshi2010`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Total Number and Ratio of GABAergic Neuron Types in the Mouse Lateral and Basal Amygdala
insufficient_triples.note: Paper characterizes VIP cell types/ratios in BLA but does not discuss disinhibitory motifs or fear-conditioning circuitry.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Hippocampal VIP/IS-3 motif distinct from neocortex (schematic). **Panel A**: CA1 lamellar cartoon with VIP/IS-3 cell soma in stratum oriens/pyramidale, axonal projections onto OLM and bistratified cells, and disinhibition of CA1 pyramidal cell distal-dendritic input by removal of OLM-mediated dendritic inhibition {cite:p}`Tyan2014,Gulyas1996`. **Panel B**: Comparison of cortical versus hippocampal VIP motifs — cortical VIP cells are bipolar with descending axons targeting L5 SST cells {cite:p}`Kawaguchi1996,Kawaguchi1997a,Gonchar2008`, whereas hippocampal IS-3 cells preferentially target other GABAergic interneurons rather than principal cells {cite:p}`Gulyas1996,Tyan2014`. **Panel C**: Subcortical VIP pathways summarised for cross-region completeness — BLA VIP cells implement a cortex-like disinhibitory motif {cite:p}`Rhomberg2018,Vereczki2021`, dorsal striatum contains a previously unrecognised CGE-derived VIP/Calb2 type {cite:p}`Munozmanchado2018`, and SCN VIP cells act as peptidergic synchronisers via VIP/VPAC2 signalling {cite:p}`Maywood2006,Cutler2003,Jones2018`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Total Number and Ratio of GABAergic Neuron Types in the Mouse Lateral and Basal Amygdala
insufficient_triples.note: Paper quantifies VIP/CR cell ratios in BLA but does not demonstrate a cortex-like disinhibitory motif per se.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Munozmanchado2018` used single-cell RNA-seq of dorsal striatum to identify a previously unrecognised VIP/Calb2-positive interneuron type, distinct from canonical PV, SST, and cholinergic types, that is molecularly closer to cortical VIP than to other striatal interneurons — suggesting a CGE-derived migration into striatum {cite:p}`Munozmanchado2018,Miyoshi2010,Tricoire2011`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Genetic Fate Mapping Reveals That the Caudal Ganglionic Eminence Produces a Large and Diverse Population of Superficial Cortical Interneurons
insufficient_triples.note: Paper characterizes CGE-derived cortical interneurons including VIP cells but does not discuss striatal migration or striatal VIP interneurons.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: BLA VIP cells implement a cortex-like disinhibitory motif during fear-conditioning circuitry {cite:p}`Rhomberg2018,Vereczki2021`, while striatal VIP/Calb2 cells — molecularly closer to cortical VIP than to other striatal types — sit in a network whose canonical PV/SST/cholinergic taxonomy does not predict where this fourth class fits behaviourally {cite:p}`Munozmanchado2018,Scala2021,Miyoshi2010`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Genetic Fate Mapping Reveals That the Caudal Ganglionic Eminence Produces a Large and Diverse Population of Superficial Cortical Interneurons
insufficient_triples.note: Paper focuses on cortical CGE-derived interneurons; does not address striatal VIP/Calb2 cells or striatal taxonomy.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Biophysical V1 layer-2/3 microcircuit models reproduce this geometry: PV and SST cells preferentially induce gamma (30–80 Hz) and beta (20–30 Hz) firing of pyramidal neurons respectively, while rapid VIP→SST inhibition is required for attentional modulation of low-gamma (30–50 Hz) power, with VIP→SST synaptic-weight reductions abolishing attentional gamma modulation entirely {cite:p}`Wagatsuma2023`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: A microcircuit model involving parvalbumin, somatostatin, and vasoactive intestinal polypeptide inhibitory interneurons for the modulation of neuronal oscillation during visual processing
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract confirms PV→gamma, SST→beta, VIP→SST for low-gamma attentional modulation, but does not mention VIP→SST synaptic-weight reduction abolishing gamma modulation entirely.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Closed-loop manipulations confirm that VIP recruitment is not merely correlated with running but is required for full-magnitude gain change, since chemogenetic VIP inhibition or developmental VIP silencing both blunt locomotion-evoked gain {cite:p}`Bastos2023a,Batistabrito2017`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Developmental Dysfunction of VIP Interneurons Impairs Cortical Circuits
insufficient_triples.note: Paper shows developmental VIP disruption impairs cortical state dependence, but abstract doesn't specifically address locomotion-evoked gain.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: A fourth gap is that human and primate evidence is currently anatomical and transcriptomic rather than physiological; whether the motif is functionally engaged outside mouse remains an open question {cite:p}`Pronneke2015,Vanderveer2021,Caulinorocha2022`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: A Role for Somatostatin-Positive Interneurons in Neuro-Oscillatory and Information Processing Deficits in Schizophrenia
insufficient_triples.note: Paper focuses on SST interneurons in schizophrenia in rodent models; does not address primate/human VIP physiology or the VIP disinhibitory motif.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Most VIP-Cre driver lines have small but non-zero off-target labelling — typically of CCK-positive interneurons and, in some preparations, of lateral inhibition-class CR-positive cells — and the proportion varies by line and laboratory {cite:p}`Pronneke2015,Vanderveer2021,Caulinorocha2022,Wei2021`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: A Role for Somatostatin-Positive Interneurons in Neuro-Oscillatory and Information Processing Deficits in Schizophrenia
insufficient_triples.note: Paper reviews SST interneuron roles in schizophrenia; does not discuss VIP-Cre driver line off-target labelling or CCK/CR contamination.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: In primate and human cortex, the absolute density of VIP cells is lower, the laminar distribution is shifted, and the molecular subtypes are partially non-homologous to mouse {cite:p}`Pronneke2015,Vanderveer2021,Caulinorocha2022`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: A Role for Somatostatin-Positive Interneurons in Neuro-Oscillatory and Information Processing Deficits in Schizophrenia
insufficient_triples.note: Paper focuses on SST interneurons in schizophrenia; does not address VIP cell density, laminar distribution, or molecular subtypes in primate/human cortex.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Whether the canonical motif operates with comparable behavioural weight in primate cortex is an open question that the present evidence base cannot answer; the conservative reading is that the connectivity asymmetry is preserved but the functional weighting may not be {cite:p}`Caulinorocha2022,Vanderveer2021`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: A Role for Somatostatin-Positive Interneurons in Neuro-Oscillatory and Information Processing Deficits in Schizophrenia
insufficient_triples.note: Paper reviews SST dysfunction in schizophrenia; does not address whether the VIP canonical disinhibitory motif operates in primate cortex.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The motif is therefore best understood as the adult endpoint of a developmental trajectory whose failure modes are themselves informative about the motif's function {cite:p}`Takesian2018,Naskar2021,Malik2022,Furutachi2024`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Top-down control of hippocampal signal-to-noise by prefrontal long-range inhibition
insufficient_triples.note: Paper is about PFC-to-hippocampus long-range inhibition of VIP cells, not about developmental trajectory or failure modes of a developmental motif.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Hangya2015` showed that optogenetically identified basal-forebrain cholinergic neurons broadcast a fast (~18 ms), precisely timed reinforcement signal that scales with the unexpectedness of reward and punishment, providing the neuromodulatory drive that recruits VIP interneurons cortex-wide.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Central Cholinergic Neurons Are Rapidly Recruited by Reinforcement Feedback
insufficient_triples.note: Paper confirms fast ~18 ms reinforcement signal scaling with unexpectedness, but does not show it recruits VIP interneurons cortex-wide.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: In barrel cortex, {cite:t}`Krabbe2019` demonstrated that VIP-mediated disinhibitory gating is required for associative whisker-trace conditioning, and {cite:t}`Sachidhanandam2016` showed that the VIP response to whisker-cued reward is itself modulated by task structure.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Parvalbumin-Expressing GABAergic Neurons in Mouse Barrel Cortex Contribute to Gating a Goal-Directed Sensorimotor Transformation
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract discusses PV gating; VIP response modulation by task structure not explicitly detailed in abstract.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Silverstein2025` reported that repeated ventral-hippocampus input persistently depresses mPFC VIP activity, contributing to working-memory deficits — a cumulative-stress phenotype.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Hippocampal input-driven plasticity of prefrontal interneurons reveals a circuit basis for impaired spatial working memory
insufficient_triples.note: Paper shows repeated vHPC stimulation depresses VIP activity and impairs SWM, but does not frame this as a 'cumulative-stress phenotype.'

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The VIP-Cre driver line labels not just classical bipolar VIP/CR cells but also basket-cell-like VIP/CCK populations and the small ChAT-VIP subset {cite:p}`Obermayer2019,Dudai2020,Granger2020,Porter1999`, and the proportion of ChAT-VIP cells captured varies across reports.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Selective Excitation of Subtypes of Neocortical Interneurons by Nicotinic Receptors
insufficient_triples.note: Paper identifies VIP/CCK interneurons but does not discuss VIP-Cre driver lines, ChAT-VIP subsets, or basket-cell-like morphology in that context.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The third axis is dominant neuromodulator: nicotinic ACh and 5-HT3A serotonin act fast and directly on VIP cells, while α-adrenergic noradrenaline acts more slowly and is selective for subtypes {cite:p}`Letzkus2011,Ferezou2002,Lee2010,Kawaguchi1998,Lecrux2016`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Noradrenergic Excitation and Inhibition of GABAergic Cell Types in Rat Frontal Cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Paper shows α-adrenergic effects on GABAergic subtypes but does not specifically address VIP cells; CCK+ cells (partial VIP overlap) showed heterogeneous, not selectively excitatory, responses.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Their unique fast-modulator coupling (5-HT3, non-α7 nAChR, α-adrenergic, D1, MOR/DOR, VPAC1/2) makes them the cortical cell class most directly coupled to behavioural state {cite:p}`Lee2010,Ferezou2002,Porter1999,Kawaguchi1997b,Kawaguchi1998,Anastasiades2019,Cole2025,Harmar2012`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Noradrenergic Excitation and Inhibition of GABAergic Cell Types in Rat Frontal Cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Paper demonstrates α-adrenergic modulation of cortical GABAergic subtypes but does not specifically identify or test VIP interneurons.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Combined with the optogenetic causal evidence that SCN VIP activity is necessary and sufficient for photic-like phase resetting {cite:p}`Jones2018,Todd2020,Webb2009`, the SCN VIP population is best read as a *peptidergic projection node* whose role bears no microcircuit homology to the cortical disinhibitory motif.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Suprachiasmatic VIP neurons are required for normal circadian rhythmicity and comprised of molecularly distinct subpopulations
insufficient_triples.note: Paper shows necessity of SCN VIP neurons for rhythmicity, but does not demonstrate optogenetic sufficiency for photic-like phase resetting.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The cells are also causally implicated in pathological synchrony — spike-and-wave seizures, Fragile-X gamma hypersynchrony, Rett-syndrome phase–amplitude coupling, and Dravet-syndrome interictal activity — though the direction of the effect depends sharply on perturbation polarity, brain area, and disease model {cite:p}`Hall2015,Goel2025,Kranz2025,Goff2019`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Dysfunctional neural dynamics associated with sensory phenotypes in Fragile X syndrome: insights from mouse models
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract discusses FXS sensory dysfunction broadly but does not mention VIP cells, gamma hypersynchrony causality, or perturbation polarity effects.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The framing extends to disease and translational gamma {cite:p}`Goel2025,Kranz2025`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Dysfunctional neural dynamics associated with sensory phenotypes in Fragile X syndrome: insights from mouse models
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract discusses FXS sensory processing but does not specifically discuss gamma oscillations or translational gamma frameworks.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Goel2025` summarised Fragile-X dysfunction as elevated broadband gamma EEG power and abnormal phase-locking to gamma-modulated acoustic stimuli in *Fmr1*-KO mice, paralleling human FXS phenotypes, with dysfunctional VIP cells correlating with elevated susceptibility to irrelevant stimuli.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Dysfunctional neural dynamics associated with sensory phenotypes in Fragile X syndrome: insights from mouse models
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract discusses atypical sensory processing broadly but lacks specific mentions of broadband gamma, phase-locking, or VIP cells to verify claims.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Pathological oscillations — spike-and-wave seizures, Fragile-X gamma hypersynchrony, Rett PAC, Dravet IS-cell hypofunction, schizophrenia-associated VIP-mRNA reduction, and Alzheimer-disease gamma–clearance coupling — share a common mechanism in which VIP-cell perturbation alters the regulatory bandwidth of an otherwise PV/SST-driven rhythm {cite:p}`Hall2015,Goel2025,Kranz2025,Goff2019,Kiss2026,Murdock2024,Koukouli2017`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Dysfunctional neural dynamics associated with sensory phenotypes in Fragile X syndrome: insights from mouse models
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract discusses FXS circuit dysfunction broadly but does not mention VIP cells, PV/SST-driven rhythms, or gamma hypersynchrony mechanisms.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Second, the motif is *not* exclusive: in the same preparations, VIP→PV, VIP→pyramidal, and VIP→NDNF connections are present, behaviourally engaged, and quantitatively non-trivial {cite:p}`Karnani2016a,Karnani2016b,Yu2019,Abs2018,Schneidermizell2025`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Cooperative Subnetworks of Molecularly Similar Interneurons in Mouse Neocortex
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract discusses VIP co-activation and cooperative mechanisms but does not detail VIP→PV, VIP→pyramidal, or VIP→NDNF connectivity.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The privilege is real: of the documented VIP outputs, the SST contact carries the largest mean charge per spike and the longest decay constant {cite:p}`Pfeffer2013,Pi2013,Lee2013`, the SST cell is the inhibitory class whose dendritic targeting most directly limits pyramidal stimulus-evoked gain {cite:p}`Pfeffer2013,Karnani2016a,Veit2023`, and the recruitment routes that drive VIP cells (top-down glutamatergic and ascending cholinergic) overlap closely with the routes that signal behavioural state {cite:p}`Lee2013,Fu2014,Hangya2015,Pinto2015,Kamigaki2017,Williams2019`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Cooperative Subnetworks of Molecularly Similar Interneurons in Mouse Neocortex
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not address SST dendritic targeting limiting pyramidal gain; focuses on cooperative IN population dynamics.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The non-uniqueness is also real: VIP cells form measurable contacts on PV, pyramidal, NDNF, and CCK targets, all of which are behaviourally engaged in some condition documented in the literature reviewed here {cite:p}`Karnani2016a,Karnani2016b,Abs2018,Anastasiades2021a,Schneidermizell2025,Veit2023`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Cooperative Subnetworks of Molecularly Similar Interneurons in Mouse Neocortex
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not detail VIP contacts onto PV, pyramidal, NDNF, or CCK targets specifically.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The targeting bias of VIP cells onto SST interneurons is acquired during postnatal development through activity-dependent and Bax-regulated programmed cell death of CGE-derived interneurons {cite:p}`Priya2018,Wu2022,Naskar2021,Furutachi2024,Ferguson2023a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Activity Regulates Cell Death within Cortical Interneurons through a Calcineurin-Dependent Mechanism
insufficient_triples.note: Paper shows activity-dependent programmed cell death of CGE interneurons via Calcineurin, but VIP interneurons are explicitly excepted from activity-dependence; no mention of Bax or targeting bias onto SST.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Disrupting this developmental program alters not only the absolute number of VIP cells in adult cortex {cite:p}`Priya2018` but also the strength of the canonical disinhibition motif: animals with delayed or imbalanced CGE-derived interneuron maturation show altered cortical gain modulation and impaired top-down task performance {cite:p}`Batistabrito2017,Ferguson2023a,Ferguson2023b,Vanvelze2024`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: VIP interneurons regulate cortical size tuning and visual perception
insufficient_triples.note: Paper shows VIP-IN loss alters state-dependent modulation and size tuning, but abstract doesn't address developmental programs or CGE maturation.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: After cortical photothrombotic stroke, {cite:t}`Motaharinia2021` showed that chemogenetic augmentation of VIP excitability promotes recovery of forelimb function. These causal data sharpen the interpretation of correlated VIP activity by separating cell-class-specific from class-redundant components of the in-vivo response {cite:p}`Chen2015a,Khan2018a,Goff2023,Liebergall2024,Motaharinia2021`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Ndnf interneuron excitability is spared in a mouse model of Dravet syndrome
insufficient_triples.note: Paper shows NDNF cells are spared in Dravet model but does not address separating cell-class-specific vs redundant components of in-vivo response broadly.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The third axis is dominant neuromodulator: nicotinic ACh and 5-HT3A serotonin act fast and directly on VIP cells, while α-adrenergic noradrenaline acts more slowly and is selective for subtypes {cite:p}`Letzkus2011,Ferezou2002,Lee2010,Kawaguchi1998,Lecrux2016`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: A disinhibitory microcircuit for associative fear learning in the auditory cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Paper focuses on L1 interneurons receiving cholinergic input, not specifically on VIP cells or 5-HT3A/adrenergic axes. Partial support at best.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Their unique fast-modulator coupling (5-HT3, non-α7 nAChR, α-adrenergic, D1, MOR/DOR, VPAC1/2) makes them the cortical cell class most directly coupled to behavioural state {cite:p}`Lee2010,Ferezou2002,Porter1999,Kawaguchi1997b,Kawaguchi1998,Anastasiades2019,Cole2025,Harmar2012`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Selective Cholinergic Modulation of Cortical GABAergic Cell Subtypes
insufficient_triples.note: Paper shows muscarinic modulation of VIP cells but does not address nicotinic, 5-HT3, adrenergic, D1, opioid, or VPAC receptors.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The cells are also causally implicated in pathological synchrony — spike-and-wave seizures, Fragile-X gamma hypersynchrony, Rett-syndrome phase–amplitude coupling, and Dravet-syndrome interictal activity — though the direction of the effect depends sharply on perturbation polarity, brain area, and disease model {cite:p}`Hall2015,Goel2025,Kranz2025,Goff2019`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Vasoactive intestinal peptide-expressing interneurons are impaired in a mouse model of Dravet syndrome
insufficient_triples.note: Paper shows VIP-IN dysfunction in Dravet but doesn't directly address pathological synchrony or interictal activity direction.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Pathological oscillations — spike-and-wave seizures, Fragile-X gamma hypersynchrony, Rett PAC, Dravet IS-cell hypofunction, schizophrenia-associated VIP-mRNA reduction, and Alzheimer-disease gamma–clearance coupling — share a common mechanism in which VIP-cell perturbation alters the regulatory bandwidth of an otherwise PV/SST-driven rhythm {cite:p}`Hall2015,Goel2025,Kranz2025,Goff2019,Kiss2026,Murdock2024,Koukouli2017`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Vasoactive intestinal peptide-expressing interneurons are impaired in a mouse model of Dravet syndrome
insufficient_triples.note: Paper shows VIP dysfunction in Dravet but does not discuss altered PV/SST-driven rhythm bandwidth or pathological oscillation mechanisms.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The unifying observation is that bidirectional perturbation of VIP cells reshapes oscillation *power, coherence, and phase coupling* far more reliably than it abolishes or generates the rhythm itself, with two consequences: (i) most rhythms continue when VIP cells are silenced, but their amplitude, inter-areal synchrony, and state dependence are altered {cite:p}`Veit2023,Bastos2023a,Sabri2024,Lee2025`; and (ii) causal attribution remains contested — bidirectional perturbation studies disagree on whether VIP cells are necessary, sufficient, or merely permissive for oscillatory state changes, with conflicts in particular over locomotion polarity across sensory cortices {cite:p}`Fu2014,Pakan2016`, seizure susceptibility {cite:p}`Hall2015`, Up-state generation {cite:p}`Tahvildari2012,Kawaguchi2001`, and the VIP-versus-SST locus of cholinergic state changes {cite:p}`Chen2015a,Szadai2022,Kuchibhotla2017`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Cortical networks with multiple interneuron types generate oscillatory patterns during predictive coding
insufficient_triples.note: Paper is a computational model; abstract mentions VIP inactivation alters oscillatory dynamics but doesn't clearly show rhythms continue with altered properties vs. being abolished.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The unifying observation is that bidirectional perturbation of VIP cells reshapes oscillation *power, coherence, and phase coupling* far more reliably than it abolishes or generates the rhythm itself, with two consequences: (i) most rhythms continue when VIP cells are silenced, but their amplitude, inter-areal synchrony, and state dependence are altered {cite:p}`Veit2023,Bastos2023a,Sabri2024,Lee2025`; and (ii) causal attribution remains contested — bidirectional perturbation studies disagree on whether VIP cells are necessary, sufficient, or merely permissive for oscillatory state changes, with conflicts in particular over locomotion polarity across sensory cortices {cite:p}`Fu2014,Pakan2016`, seizure susceptibility {cite:p}`Hall2015`, Up-state generation {cite:p}`Tahvildari2012,Kawaguchi2001`, and the VIP-versus-SST locus of cholinergic state changes {cite:p}`Chen2015a,Szadai2022,Kuchibhotla2017`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Distinct Firing Patterns of Neuronal Subtypes in Cortical Synchronized Activities
insufficient_triples.note: Paper shows VIP cell firing during Up-state-like events but doesn't directly address whether VIP cells generate or are necessary for Up-states.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Anaesthetic-induced burst suppression provides a counterpoint that bounds the VIP role {cite:p}`Yin2025,Bohannon2018,Veit2023`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Optogenetic dissection of roles of specific cortical interneuron subtypes in GABAergic network synchronization
insufficient_triples.note: Paper studies GABAergic synchrony via 4-AP, not anaesthetic-induced burst suppression. Abstract doesn't address burst suppression, but may inform VIP role indirectly.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: PV–pyramidal interactions set gamma frequency, OLM and septal inputs set hippocampal theta, and PV cells dominate burst-suppression synchrony — VIP cells modulate the *power, coherence, and phase coupling* of these rhythms via SST/PV control {cite:p}`Veit2023,Wagatsuma2023,Tyan2014,Bell2021,Yin2025,Bohannon2018`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Optogenetic dissection of roles of specific cortical interneuron subtypes in GABAergic network synchronization
insufficient_triples.note: Paper shows PV cells dominate GABAergic LLD initiation, partially consistent, but does not address burst-suppression synchrony, gamma, theta, or VIP modulation of power/coherence/phase.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Direct support comes from {cite:t}`Murdock2024`: chemogenetic inhibition of cortical VIP interneurons attenuates 40-Hz multisensory-stimulation–induced amyloid clearance in 5XFAD mice without changing baseline 40-Hz LFP power, identifying VIP cells as a coupling node between gamma activity and glymphatic peptide release.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Multisensory gamma stimulation promotes glymphatic clearance of amyloid
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract confirms VIP interneurons facilitate glymphatic clearance and amyloid removal, but does not mention whether baseline 40-Hz LFP power was unchanged by chemogenetic inhibition.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Murdock2024` linked therapeutic gamma to VIP function: chemogenetic inhibition of cortical VIP interneurons in 5XFAD mice attenuated 40-Hz multisensory gamma stimulation–induced amyloid clearance without affecting baseline 40-Hz LFP power, indicating that VIP cells couple gamma activity to glymphatic peptide release.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Multisensory gamma stimulation promotes glymphatic clearance of amyloid
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract supports VIP interneuron role in glymphatic clearance and amyloid removal via chemogenetics, but does not address baseline 40-Hz LFP power specifics.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Fourth, the motif is not the *defining* function of the VIP class: VIP cells participate in oscillatory pacing {cite:p}`Turi2019,Bastos2023a`, plasticity gating {cite:p}`Cichon2017,Krabbe2019,Tamboli2024,Ramosprats2022`, developmental wiring {cite:p}`Batistabrito2017,Priya2018,Ferguson2023a,Ferguson2023b`, and direct pyramidal control {cite:p}`Karnani2016b,Lee2013,Schneidermizell2025`, none of which are captured by the canonical motif alone.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: VIP interneurons regulate cortical size tuning and visual perception
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract focuses on VIP-IN roles in state modulation and sensory processing, not developmental wiring.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Disrupting this developmental program alters not only the absolute number of VIP cells in adult cortex {cite:p}`Priya2018` but also the strength of the canonical disinhibition motif: animals with delayed or imbalanced CGE-derived interneuron maturation show altered cortical gain modulation and impaired top-down task performance {cite:p}`Batistabrito2017,Ferguson2023a,Ferguson2023b,Vanvelze2024`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: VIP interneurons regulate cortical size tuning and visual perception
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss developmental programs, CGE maturation, or altered cortical gain from developmental disruption.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: It explains why salient external events combined with arousal produce gain enhancement of pyramidal stimulus responses in superficial cortex {cite:p}`Lee2013,Fu2014,Zhang2014,Pinto2015,Williams2019,Veit2023`. It does not explain why locomotion-coupled VIP activity in V1 fails to translate into uniform SST suppression across higher visual areas {cite:p}`Pakan2016,Garrett2020,Dipoppa2018`, why cholinergic re-routing of inhibition produces simultaneous engagement of canonical and direct PV-mediated streams {cite:p}`Kuchibhotla2017`, why VIP perturbation can produce subtractive rather than divisive changes in pyramidal firing in some preparations {cite:p}`Hertag2019,Garciadelmolino2017`, or why VIP cells are required for plasticity-gating in motor and amygdalar circuits whose connectivity does not strictly fit the canonical schematic {cite:p}`Cichon2017,Krabbe2019,Tamboli2024`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Amplifying the redistribution of somato-dendritic inhibition by the interplay of three interneuron types
insufficient_triples.note: The paper models somato-dendritic inhibition redistribution but the abstract doesn't explicitly address subtractive vs divisive changes in pyramidal firing from VIP perturbation.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The empirical reading developed here feeds forward into the *in vivo* analysis of {ref}`sec-in-vivo-behavior`, which asks whether the canonical motif predicts observed VIP activity during behaviour and where it fails to do so; into the cross-area and cross-species comparisons of {ref}`sec-cross-areas`; into the oscillatory and rhythmic-disinhibition reading of {ref}`sec-oscillatory-dynamics`, where the hippocampal homologue and theta-coupled VIP activity become central; into the computational models of {ref}`sec-computational-models`, where the assumption that VIP cells are pure disinhibitors generally underperforms models that include direct VIP→pyramidal and VIP→PV edges {cite:p}`Hertag2019,Garciadelmolino2017,Litwinkumar2016,Tzilivaki2023`; and into the synthesis of the concluding synthesis, where the canonical motif is recast as a privileged but non-exclusive channel within a small family of parallel VIP-mediated circuits.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Paradoxical response reversal of top-down modulation in cortical circuits with three interneuron types
insufficient_triples.note: Paper models canonical microcircuit dynamics and response reversal but abstract doesn't explicitly show that including direct VIP→Pyr/PV edges outperforms pure disinhibition models.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: It explains why salient external events combined with arousal produce gain enhancement of pyramidal stimulus responses in superficial cortex {cite:p}`Lee2013,Fu2014,Zhang2014,Pinto2015,Williams2019,Veit2023`. It does not explain why locomotion-coupled VIP activity in V1 fails to translate into uniform SST suppression across higher visual areas {cite:p}`Pakan2016,Garrett2020,Dipoppa2018`, why cholinergic re-routing of inhibition produces simultaneous engagement of canonical and direct PV-mediated streams {cite:p}`Kuchibhotla2017`, why VIP perturbation can produce subtractive rather than divisive changes in pyramidal firing in some preparations {cite:p}`Hertag2019,Garciadelmolino2017`, or why VIP cells are required for plasticity-gating in motor and amygdalar circuits whose connectivity does not strictly fit the canonical schematic {cite:p}`Cichon2017,Krabbe2019,Tamboli2024`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Paradoxical response reversal of top-down modulation in cortical circuits with three interneuron types
insufficient_triples.note: Paper discusses counterintuitive dynamics (response reversal) in circuits with nonlinearities, but abstract does not specifically address subtractive vs divisive effects of VIP perturbation.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The motif is therefore best understood as the adult endpoint of a developmental trajectory whose failure modes are themselves informative about the motif's function {cite:p}`Takesian2018,Naskar2021,Malik2022,Furutachi2024`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Cooperative thalamocortical circuit mechanism for sensory prediction errors
insufficient_triples.note: The paper describes adult VIP→SST circuit function but does not address developmental trajectory or failure modes informing motif function.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The picture from these and related studies {cite:p}`Tamboli2024,Ramosprats2022,Veit2023,Mcfarlan2024a,Mcfarlan2024b,Garciajuncoclemente2017` is that the canonical motif's *behavioural* contribution is largely about gating plasticity windows and sustaining attentional or learning-related disinhibition, not about producing transient gain on a millisecond-to-second timescale.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: The spike-timing-dependent plasticity of VIP interneurons in motor cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Paper characterizes STDP at VIP synapses; does not directly address gating plasticity windows or attentional/learning-related disinhibition behaviorally.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: ChAT-VIP overlap is partial and area-specific, and the cholinergic VIP subset is a subpopulation rather than the rule {cite:p}`Walker2016,Koukouli2017,Posuszny2020,Mcfarlan2024a,Mcfarlan2024b`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: The spike-timing-dependent plasticity of VIP interneurons in motor cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract discusses VIP IN plasticity in motor cortex; no mention of ChAT-VIP overlap or cholinergic VIP subpopulations.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The picture from these and related studies {cite:p}`Tamboli2024,Ramosprats2022,Veit2023,Mcfarlan2024a,Mcfarlan2024b,Garciajuncoclemente2017` is that the canonical motif's *behavioural* contribution is largely about gating plasticity windows and sustaining attentional or learning-related disinhibition, not about producing transient gain on a millisecond-to-second timescale.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: The short-term plasticity of VIP interneurons in motor cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Paper focuses on short-term plasticity at VIP synapses, not on behavioral contributions like gating plasticity or attentional disinhibition.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: ChAT-VIP overlap is partial and area-specific, and the cholinergic VIP subset is a subpopulation rather than the rule {cite:p}`Walker2016,Koukouli2017,Posuszny2020,Mcfarlan2024a,Mcfarlan2024b`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: The short-term plasticity of VIP interneurons in motor cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract discusses short-term plasticity of VIP INs in motor cortex; no mention of ChAT-VIP overlap or cholinergic VIP subsets.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Arroyo2012` confirmed that basal-forebrain cholinergic axons preferentially activate CGE-derived VIP-class cells, and {cite:t}`Alitto2013` demonstrated that basal-forebrain electrical stimulation activates VIP+ interneurons via nicotinic receptors during cortical state transitions.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Prolonged Disynaptic Inhibition in the Cortex Mediated by Slow, Non-7 Nicotinic Excitation of a Specific Subset of Cortical Interneurons
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract mentions 'specific subset of cortical interneurons' but does not specify CGE-derived or VIP-class identity.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Auditory critical-period plasticity is gated by L1 nicotinic input via *Lynx1*-controlled developmental closure {cite:p}`Takesian2018`, and {cite:t}`Alitto2013` formalised cell-type-specific basal-forebrain modulation as the canonical framework for cholinergic disinhibition.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Cell-type-specific modulation of neocortical activity by basal forebrain input
insufficient_triples.note: Paper describes cell-type-specific BF modulation but abstract doesn't explicitly formalize a 'canonical framework for cholinergic disinhibition.'

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The proportional rebalancing across the cortical hierarchy reported by {cite:t}`Torresgomez2020` is informative as a starting point: VIP/PV ratios increase along the sensory-to-executive axis, with VIP cells roughly 2–3× more abundant relative to PV in PFC than in V1, suggesting an architectural shift rather than a simple scaling of the same circuit {cite:p}`Torresgomez2020`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Changes in the Proportion of Inhibitory Interneuron Types from Sensory to Executive Areas of the Primate Neocortex: Implications for the Origins of Working Memory Representations
insufficient_triples.note: Paper reports CR↑ and PV↓ from MT/MST to LPFC in monkey, but uses CR as VIP proxy; specific 2–3× VIP/PV ratio and V1 comparison not in abstract.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The proportional rebalancing across the cortical hierarchy reported by {cite:t}`Torresgomez2020` is informative as a starting point: VIP/PV ratios increase along the sensory-to-executive axis, with VIP cells roughly 2–3× more abundant relative to PV in PFC than in V1, suggesting an architectural shift rather than a simple scaling of the same circuit {cite:p}`Torresgomez2020`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Changes in the Proportion of Inhibitory Interneuron Types from Sensory to Executive Areas of the Primate Neocortex: Implications for the Origins of Working Memory Representations
insufficient_triples.note: Same issue: paper discusses CR/PV proportions in monkey cortex, not direct VIP/PV ratios; V1 not studied; 2–3× claim not verifiable from abstract.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Across mouse cortex, hippocampus, and amygdala, VIP recruitment biases gamma power and inter-areal gamma coherence {cite:p}`Veit2023,Wagatsuma2023,Knoblich2019`, gates theta-band coordination through hippocampal interneuron-specific circuits {cite:p}`Tyan2014,Luo2020,Lee2019,Bastos2023a`, and is recruited differentially across Up-states, REM sleep, and arousal {cite:p}`Tahvildari2012,Brecier2022,Rolle2025,Sabri2024`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Neuronal cell-subtype specificity of neural synchronization in mouse primary visual cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Paper examines neuron-network coupling in V1 but does not specifically address gamma power/coherence biasing by VIP cells.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: PV–pyramidal interactions set gamma frequency, OLM and septal inputs set hippocampal theta, and PV cells dominate burst-suppression synchrony — VIP cells modulate the *power, coherence, and phase coupling* of these rhythms via SST/PV control {cite:p}`Veit2023,Wagatsuma2023,Tyan2014,Bell2021,Yin2025,Bohannon2018`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: The Entorhinal Cortical Alvear Pathway Differentially Excites Pyramidal Cells and Interneuron Subtypes in Hippocampal CA1
insufficient_triples.note: Paper shows PV dominates feedforward inhibition via alvear pathway, but does not address VIP modulating power/coherence/phase coupling of rhythms via SST/PV control.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Pathological oscillations — spike-and-wave seizures, Fragile-X gamma hypersynchrony, Rett PAC, Dravet IS-cell hypofunction, schizophrenia-associated VIP-mRNA reduction, and Alzheimer-disease gamma–clearance coupling — share a common mechanism in which VIP-cell perturbation alters the regulatory bandwidth of an otherwise PV/SST-driven rhythm {cite:p}`Hall2015,Goel2025,Kranz2025,Goff2019,Kiss2026,Murdock2024,Koukouli2017`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Cortical GABAergic Neuron Dysregulation in Schizophrenia Is Age Dependent
insufficient_triples.note: Paper reports reduced per-cell VIP mRNA in SCZ but does not discuss oscillatory mechanisms, PV/SST-driven rhythms, or VIP-cell perturbation altering rhythm bandwidth.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The empirical reading developed here feeds forward into the *in vivo* analysis of {ref}`sec-in-vivo-behavior`, which asks whether the canonical motif predicts observed VIP activity during behaviour and where it fails to do so; into the cross-area and cross-species comparisons of {ref}`sec-cross-areas`; into the oscillatory and rhythmic-disinhibition reading of {ref}`sec-oscillatory-dynamics`, where the hippocampal homologue and theta-coupled VIP activity become central; into the computational models of {ref}`sec-computational-models`, where the assumption that VIP cells are pure disinhibitors generally underperforms models that include direct VIP→pyramidal and VIP→PV edges {cite:p}`Hertag2019,Garciadelmolino2017,Litwinkumar2016,Tzilivaki2023`; and into the synthesis of the concluding synthesis, where the canonical motif is recast as a privileged but non-exclusive channel within a small family of parallel VIP-mediated circuits.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Hippocampal GABAergic interneurons and memory
insufficient_triples.note: Paper reviews hippocampal interneuron diversity/memory but abstract doesn't address computational models comparing pure disinhibition vs. direct VIP→pyramidal/PV edges.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The targeting bias of VIP cells onto SST interneurons is acquired during postnatal development through activity-dependent and Bax-regulated programmed cell death of CGE-derived interneurons {cite:p}`Priya2018,Wu2022,Naskar2021,Furutachi2024,Ferguson2023a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Cortical VIP+ Interneurons in the Upper and Deeper Layers Are Transcriptionally Distinct
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract discusses transcriptomic laminar differences in VIP interneurons, not postnatal development, cell death, or targeting bias onto SST cells.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Disrupting this developmental program alters not only the absolute number of VIP cells in adult cortex {cite:p}`Priya2018` but also the strength of the canonical disinhibition motif: animals with delayed or imbalanced CGE-derived interneuron maturation show altered cortical gain modulation and impaired top-down task performance {cite:p}`Batistabrito2017,Ferguson2023a,Ferguson2023b,Vanvelze2024`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Feedforward and disinhibitory circuits differentially control activity of cortical somatostatin-positive interneurons during behavioral state transitions
insufficient_triples.note: Paper focuses on SST/VIP activity during locomotion in S1/V1, not on CGE developmental maturation, gain modulation from imbalanced interneuron development, or top-down task performance.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Most VIP-Cre driver lines have small but non-zero off-target labelling — typically of CCK-positive interneurons and, in some preparations, of lateral inhibition-class CR-positive cells — and the proportion varies by line and laboratory {cite:p}`Pronneke2015,Vanderveer2021,Caulinorocha2022,Wei2021`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Morpho-physiological properties and connectivity of vasoactive intestinal polypeptide-expressing interneurons in the mouse hippocampal dentate gyrus
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract discusses VIP+ IN properties in DG but does not address off-target labeling in VIP-Cre driver lines.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: ChAT-VIP overlap is partial and area-specific, and the cholinergic VIP subset is a subpopulation rather than the rule {cite:p}`Walker2016,Koukouli2017,Posuszny2020,Mcfarlan2024a,Mcfarlan2024b`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Updating the picture of layer 2/3 VIP-expressing interneuron function in the mouse cerebral cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract discusses VIP interneuron subtypes but does not specifically mention ChAT-VIP overlap or cholinergic VIP subpopulations.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Lebedeva2025` used dual-population two-photon imaging to dissociate VIP and GABA-receptor-defined responses to specific sensory features, {cite:t}`Khan2018a` provides an instructive complement: during visual learning, pyramidal/PV/SST cells but not V1 VIP cells increased selectivity for the task-relevant stimulus, suggesting that VIP carries a state/context-aligned (rather than learned-stimulus) signal in this paradigm.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: GABAergic signaling by VIP interneurons gates running-dependent visual recovery in the adult brain
insufficient_triples.note: Paper studies MD plasticity/recovery and GABA vs VIP signaling, not dual-population imaging dissociating VIP and GABA-receptor-defined responses to sensory features.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Synaptic-plasticity-equipped V1 column models of multiple inhibitory types show that plasticity facilitates oscillations across the gamma band, with VIP→SST plasticity tuning the band edges {cite:p}`Moreni2025b`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Synaptic plasticity facilitates oscillations in a V1 cortical column model with multiple interneuron types
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract confirms plasticity facilitates broad-band oscillations involving all cell types, but does not specifically mention VIP→SST plasticity tuning band edges.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Dopaminergic and other modulatory layers add further specificity: D1 dopamine receptors are enriched in superficial-layer VIP interneurons that co-express calretinin and D1 agonists strongly enhance firing of these VIP cells while sparing PV and SOM cells {cite:p}`Anastasiades2019`; cortical D2 receptors are also expressed in VIP-class cells {cite:p}`Khlghatyan2019`; mu and delta opioid receptors differentially regulate GABA release from PV, SST, CCK, and VIP cells in prelimbic PFC {cite:p}`Cole2025`; and goal-oriented spatial learning requires VIP-disinhibition in CA1 with VIP silencing impairing both learning and place-cell representations {cite:p}`Turi2019`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: High Sensitivity Mapping of Cortical Dopamine D2 Receptor Expressing Neurons
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract mentions D2 in 'various populations of interneurons' but does not specifically mention VIP interneurons.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: **Schematic mechanism: VIP→SST and VIP→PV motifs differentially shape gamma versus theta rhythms.** Schematic with no quantitative data substrate. **(A)** PV-driven gamma rhythm with VIP-mediated SST suppression: VIP activation predicted to scale local gamma power {cite:p}`Veit2023,Wagatsuma2023` and tune long-range gamma coherence {cite:p}`Veit2023`. **(B)** Hippocampal theta-rhythm circuit with VIP/IS3 cell phase-coupled to OLM disinhibition; CR/IS3 cells fire on the rising phase and peak of theta and selectively innervate OLM dendrites {cite:p}`Tyan2014,Luo2020,Chamberland2010`. **(C)** Cortical Up-state schematic with VIP cells as a permissive (slice-silent, awake-recruited) versus causal gate, capturing the {cite:t}`Tahvildari2012` versus {cite:t}`Szadai2022` disagreement about Up-state generation. **Caveat:** Schematic only — no audited quantitative substrate. :::
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Cortex-wide response mode of VIP-expressing inhibitory neurons by reward and punishment
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract discusses reinforcer responses of VIP neurons cortex-wide; no mention of Up-states or slice-silent/awake-recruited disagreement.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The *VIP*–*ChAT* cholinergic co-expressing type identified in mouse V1 by {cite:t}`Tasic2016` and formalized by {cite:t}`Tasic2018` has plausible homology in human upper layers {cite:p}`Hodge2019,Lake2018,Lee2023a`, although direct functional comparison remains incomplete.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Integrative single-cell analysis of transcriptional and epigenetic states in the human adult brain
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract doesn't specifically mention VIP-ChAT co-expressing type or upper-layer homology.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The *VIP*–*ChAT* cholinergic co-expressing type identified in mouse V1 by {cite:t}`Tasic2016` and formalized by {cite:t}`Tasic2018` has plausible homology in human upper layers {cite:p}`Hodge2019,Lake2018,Lee2023a`, although direct functional comparison remains incomplete.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The contemporary atlas literature has gravitated toward the second practice for VIP specifically {cite:p}`Hodge2019,Bakken2021a,Lee2023a,Chartrand2023`. :::

insufficient_triples.note: Claim is about naming practice for VIP; abstract doesn't specify nomenclature conventions used.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: For *SCN1A*, {cite:t}`Goff2023` showed that VIP-INs from *Scn1a* +/− mice "fired at lower frequencies before application of carbachol (42 ± 2.9 vs. 34 ± 2.5 Hz, WT vs.)" and that selective conditional deletion of *Scn1a* in VIP-INs (paraphrased) reproduces autism-like features without overt seizures, dissociating the autism and epilepsy phenotypes of Dravet syndrome {cite:p}`Goff2023,Vormsteinschneider2020,Gil2024`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Postweaning Development Influences Endogenous VPAC1 Modulation of LTP Induced by Theta-Burst Stimulation: A Link to Maturation of the Hippocampal GABAergic System
insufficient_triples.note: Gil2024 abstract discusses VIP/VPAC1 and epileptogenesis but provides no data on SCN1A or Scn1a+/− mice firing rates.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Cross-cutting quantification by {cite:t}`Hanno2026` reported that "VIP-INs strikingly decreased in both ASD models by 38% and 49% relative to controls, ... meanwhile, other subtypes, such as Parvalbumin, SST, and RELN-INs, showed no significant changes," consistent with a selective vulnerability of the VIP class in two distinct ASD models.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Targeting notch signaling to restore neural development and behavior in mouse models of ASD
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract mentions loss of VIP-INs but does not provide specific 38%/49% figures; cannot verify exact percentages.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Gil2024` framed the clinical synthesis: "VIP interneuron dysfunction is also implicated in three prominent neurodevelopmental disorders, Rett syndrome, Dravet Syndrome, and Down's syndrome … and may contribute to enhanced seizure susceptibility." The reduced VIP-IN baseline firing reported by {cite:t}`Goff2023` (34 vs 42 Hz, *Scn1a* +/− vs WT) is the prototypical quantitative anchor for this view.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Postweaning Development Influences Endogenous VPAC1 Modulation of LTP Induced by Theta-Burst Stimulation: A Link to Maturation of the Hippocampal GABAergic System
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract mentions neurodevelopmental disorders and epilepsy but does not contain the quoted text about Rett, Dravet, and Down's syndrome.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Sixth, the developmental window in which VIP-INs are sampled differs across species: rodent characterizations frequently use juvenile (P14–P28) animals {cite:p}`Ouellet2014,Mossner2020,Bhandari2024,Pakan2016,Mcfarlan2024a`, human samples are typically adult or fetal {cite:p}`Teymornejad2024a,Lattke2026,Hodge2019,Lake2018`, and disease penetrance is itself developmental {cite:p}`Mossner2020,Chen2023b,Lattke2026,Vormsteinschneider2020,Simacek2025b`.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Sixth, the developmental window in which VIP-INs are sampled differs across species: rodent characterizations frequently use juvenile (P14–P28) animals {cite:p}`Ouellet2014,Mossner2020,Bhandari2024,Pakan2016,Mcfarlan2024a`, human samples are typically adult or fetal {cite:p}`Teymornejad2024a,Lattke2026,Hodge2019,Lake2018`, and disease penetrance is itself developmental {cite:p}`Mossner2020,Chen2023b,Lattke2026,Vormsteinschneider2020,Simacek2025b`.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Sixth, the developmental window in which VIP-INs are sampled differs across species: rodent characterizations frequently use juvenile (P14–P28) animals {cite:p}`Ouellet2014,Mossner2020,Bhandari2024,Pakan2016,Mcfarlan2024a`, human samples are typically adult or fetal {cite:p}`Teymornejad2024a,Lattke2026,Hodge2019,Lake2018`, and disease penetrance is itself developmental {cite:p}`Mossner2020,Chen2023b,Lattke2026,Vormsteinschneider2020,Simacek2025b`.
