insufficient_triples.claim_text: The same disinhibitory motif has been independently recruited as the substrate for predictive-coding error neurons {cite:p}`Hertag2020,Hertag2021,Rossbroich2025,Nemati2025a,Nemati2025b,Shipp2016`, for region-specific reinforcement-learning credit assignment {cite:p}`Chevy2024,Wagatsuma2023`, and for flexible decision-making attractor switching {cite:p}`Shen2023,Yang2016`, indicating that VIP is being asked to support several non-equivalent computational jobs at once. This proliferation has revealed an awkward fact: the same connectivity graph, parameterised differently, can produce qualitatively opposite predictions for how VIP perturbations should affect pyramidal output {cite:p}`Hertag2019,Tahvili2025a,Tahvili2025b,Garciadelmolino2017`, so that disagreement among published models is not a sign of empirical conflict but of weakly constrained free parameters.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: PV and SOM cells play distinct causal roles in controlling network oscillations and stability
insufficient_triples.note: Paper focuses on PV/SOM roles in oscillations; no mention of VIP perturbations or opposite predictions for VIP effects on pyramidal output.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Canonical three-interneuron (3-IN) circuits — Pyr+PV+SST+VIP — emerged from the connectivity surveys of {cite:p}`Pfeffer2013` and the disinhibitory experiments of {cite:p}`Pi2013,Lee2013,Fu2014`, and have been formalised as rate models {cite:p}`Litwinkumar2016,Garciadelmolino2017,Hertag2019`, spiking implementations {cite:p}`Bos2025,Veit2023,Sancheztodo2026`, and biophysically detailed mean-field circuits {cite:p}`Reimann2026,Jadi2012,Isbister2026`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Modeling and simulation of neocortical micro- and mesocircuitry (Part I, anatomy)
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract describes anatomy model, not mean-field circuits or 3-IN formalisations; no evidence of biophysical mean-field circuit work.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The conflict between 3-IN sufficiency and 4-IN necessity is therefore neither philosophical nor purely numerical: 3-IN proponents {cite:p}`Hertag2019,Litwinkumar2016,Bos2025` show that the available behavioural and physiological signatures of state-dependent gain can be reproduced without an explicit NDNF compartment, while 4-IN proponents {cite:p}`Iqbal2025,Hartung2024,Vighagen2021` argue that doing so requires VIP→SST gain values that are inconsistent with paired-recording data and only the NDNF channel can absorb the missing slow inhibition.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Layer 1 NDNF interneurons are specialized top-down master regulators of cortical circuits
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract doesn't discuss paired-recording slopes or argue 3-IN VIP→SST gain values are inconsistent.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The conflict between 3-IN sufficiency and 4-IN necessity is therefore neither philosophical nor purely numerical: 3-IN proponents {cite:p}`Hertag2019,Litwinkumar2016,Bos2025` show that the available behavioural and physiological signatures of state-dependent gain can be reproduced without an explicit NDNF compartment, while 4-IN proponents {cite:p}`Iqbal2025,Hartung2024,Vighagen2021` argue that doing so requires VIP→SST gain values that are inconsistent with paired-recording data and only the NDNF channel can absorb the missing slow inhibition.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Layer 1 NDNF <sup>+</sup> Interneurons Control Bilateral Sensory Processing in a Layer-dependent Manner
insufficient_triples.note: Paper shows NDNF role in layer-specific inhibition but does not discuss VIP→SST gain values or paired-recording inconsistencies.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The 4-IN argument {cite:p}`Iqbal2025,Hartung2024,Vighagen2021` is, conversely, a claim that some of these roles — specifically the slow normalisation and the L1-specific gating — require an additional dynamical degree of freedom that NDNF/LAMP5 supplies.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Biologically grounded neocortex computational primitives implemented on neuromorphic hardware improve vision transformer performance
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract mentions LAMP5 role in sWTA but doesn't explicitly argue slow normalisation/L1-specific gating requires additional degree of freedom.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: At the coarsest end, mean-field rate models {cite:p}`Litwinkumar2016,Garciadelmolino2017,Sanzeni2020,Kim2025b` collapse each interneuron class to a single firing-rate variable and study fixed-point structure analytically; at the spiking end, sparse and balanced E-I networks {cite:p}`Bos2025,Veit2023,Sancheztodo2026,Pedrosa2020,Rossbroich2025` add membrane dynamics, conductance-based synapses, and short-term plasticity {cite:p}`Seay2020,Cattani2024`; and at the most detailed end, multi-compartment biophysical models {cite:p}`Reimann2026,Jadi2012,Isbister2026,Morabito2024` resolve apical from perisomatic inhibition and reproduce *in vivo* dynamics across cell types.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Modeling and simulation of neocortical micro- and mesocircuitry (Part I, anatomy)
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract describes anatomical model with morphologically detailed neurons; no mention of reproducing in vivo dynamics or multi-compartment biophysical simulation results.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Compartmental models {cite:p}`Reimann2026,Jadi2012,Morabito2024,Dorsett2021` can in principle distinguish whether an observed pyramidal effect arises from somatic versus dendritic inhibition — a distinction that mean-field 3-IN circuits collapse — and therefore form the only natural arena in which the 3-IN-versus-4-IN comparison can be resolved without ad hoc assumptions.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Modeling and simulation of neocortical micro- and mesocircuitry (Part I, anatomy)
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract focuses on anatomical connectivity model; no discussion of somatic vs dendritic inhibition or 3-IN/4-IN comparison.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Yet the same compartmental detail comes at a cost: the parameter space of a biophysical microcircuit is so large that, as {cite:t}`Reimann2026` argue, the manifold of parameterisations compatible with cell-type-resolved electrophysiology *grows* rather than shrinks, raising the identifiability problem to the foreground.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Modeling and simulation of neocortical micro- and mesocircuitry (Part I, anatomy)
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss parameter identifiability or growing parameter manifolds; focuses on anatomy and connectivity.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Tahvili2025b`, by contrast, recently reported that a reduced two-interneuron model with strong recurrent SST inhibition and tuned VIP→SST gain produces **subtractive** rather than divisive modulation, predicting a qualitatively different relationship between VIP activation and pyramidal threshold {cite:p}`Tahvili2025a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: A mean-field model of neural networks with PV and SOM interneurons reveals connectivity-based mechanisms of gamma oscillations
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract describes gamma oscillations in E-PV-SOM circuits; no mention of subtractive vs divisive modulation or VIP→SST gain effects.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Tahvili2025b`, by contrast, recently reported that a reduced two-interneuron model with strong recurrent SST inhibition and tuned VIP→SST gain produces **subtractive** rather than divisive modulation, predicting a qualitatively different relationship between VIP activation and pyramidal threshold {cite:p}`Tahvili2025a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: PV and SOM cells play distinct causal roles in controlling network oscillations and stability
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not mention VIP→SST gain, subtractive vs divisive modulation, or VIP activation effects on pyramidal threshold.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Natan2017` make the same point empirically in auditory cortex by showing that PV and SST contribute divisive and subtractive components respectively to adaptation, and circuit fits using their data place the divisive-versus-subtractive boundary at a specific ratio of dendritic-to-somatic SST conductance — a parameter rarely measured *in vivo* and one that {cite:t}`Tahvili2025a` and {cite:t}`Hertag2019` set to opposite default values.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: PV and SOM cells play distinct causal roles in controlling network oscillations and stability
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss dendritic-to-somatic SST conductance ratios or divisive/subtractive parameter defaults.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Natan2017` make the same point empirically in auditory cortex by showing that PV and SST contribute divisive and subtractive components respectively to adaptation, and circuit fits using their data place the divisive-versus-subtractive boundary at a specific ratio of dendritic-to-somatic SST conductance — a parameter rarely measured *in vivo* and one that {cite:t}`Tahvili2025a` and {cite:t}`Hertag2019` set to opposite default values.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Amplifying the redistribution of somato-dendritic inhibition by the interplay of three interneuron types
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not specify a dendritic-to-somatic SST conductance ratio default value to verify the 'opposite default values' claim.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The conflict is therefore parametric, not structural, and its resolution requires compartment-resolved measurements rather than additional perturbation protocols {cite:p}`Bilash2023,Lenkey2025,Reimann2026`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Modeling and simulation of neocortical micro- and mesocircuitry (Part I, anatomy)
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss compartment-resolved measurements or parametric conflicts in interneuron circuits.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The {cite:p}`Pi2013` framing of net pyramidal facilitation likewise sits uneasily with {cite:p}`Garciadelmolino2017`, who showed that the same connectivity, parameterised inside the inhibition-stabilised regime, yields **paradoxical** responses in which VIP activation can suppress rather than facilitate pyramidal firing {cite:p}`Reimann2026,Sanzeni2020`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Modeling and simulation of neocortical micro- and mesocircuitry (Part I, anatomy)
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss paradoxical responses, VIP activation effects, or inhibition-stabilised regime.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Plotting these models in a phase diagram of VIP→SST coupling versus dendritic SST→Pyr nonlinearity (Figure 23B; Figure 24A) makes the disagreement structural rather than empirical: {cite:p}`Hertag2019,Litwinkumar2016,Bos2025,Veit2023` cluster in a divisive-gain corner, {cite:p}`Tahvili2025a,Tahvili2025b` occupy the subtractive corner, and {cite:p}`Garciadelmolino2017,Reimann2026,Sanzeni2020` sit on the paradoxical boundary, with {cite:p}`Iqbal2025,Hartung2024,Vighagen2021` displaced into a fourth quadrant where NDNF input recasts the dendritic operating point.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: PV and SOM cells play distinct causal roles in controlling network oscillations and stability
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss VIP→SST coupling, dendritic nonlinearity phase diagrams, or subtractive corner placement.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Plotting these models in a phase diagram of VIP→SST coupling versus dendritic SST→Pyr nonlinearity (Figure 23B; Figure 24A) makes the disagreement structural rather than empirical: {cite:p}`Hertag2019,Litwinkumar2016,Bos2025,Veit2023` cluster in a divisive-gain corner, {cite:p}`Tahvili2025a,Tahvili2025b` occupy the subtractive corner, and {cite:p}`Garciadelmolino2017,Reimann2026,Sanzeni2020` sit on the paradoxical boundary, with {cite:p}`Iqbal2025,Hartung2024,Vighagen2021` displaced into a fourth quadrant where NDNF input recasts the dendritic operating point.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: A mean-field model of neural networks with PV and SOM interneurons reveals connectivity-based mechanisms of gamma oscillations
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss subtractive modulation, VIP→SST coupling, or dendritic nonlinearity phase diagrams; cannot verify placement in subtractive corner.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Plotting these models in a phase diagram of VIP→SST coupling versus dendritic SST→Pyr nonlinearity (Figure 23B; Figure 24A) makes the disagreement structural rather than empirical: {cite:p}`Hertag2019,Litwinkumar2016,Bos2025,Veit2023` cluster in a divisive-gain corner, {cite:p}`Tahvili2025a,Tahvili2025b` occupy the subtractive corner, and {cite:p}`Garciadelmolino2017,Reimann2026,Sanzeni2020` sit on the paradoxical boundary, with {cite:p}`Iqbal2025,Hartung2024,Vighagen2021` displaced into a fourth quadrant where NDNF input recasts the dendritic operating point.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Modeling and simulation of neocortical micro- and mesocircuitry (Part I, anatomy)
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss phase diagrams, paradoxical boundaries, or VIP-SST coupling regimes.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Plotting these models in a phase diagram of VIP→SST coupling versus dendritic SST→Pyr nonlinearity (Figure 23B; Figure 24A) makes the disagreement structural rather than empirical: {cite:p}`Hertag2019,Litwinkumar2016,Bos2025,Veit2023` cluster in a divisive-gain corner, {cite:p}`Tahvili2025a,Tahvili2025b` occupy the subtractive corner, and {cite:p}`Garciadelmolino2017,Reimann2026,Sanzeni2020` sit on the paradoxical boundary, with {cite:p}`Iqbal2025,Hartung2024,Vighagen2021` displaced into a fourth quadrant where NDNF input recasts the dendritic operating point.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Biologically grounded neocortex computational primitives implemented on neuromorphic hardware improve vision transformer performance
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract doesn't discuss phase diagrams, NDNF recasting dendritic operating points, or displacement into a fourth quadrant.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Plotting these models in a phase diagram of VIP→SST coupling versus dendritic SST→Pyr nonlinearity (Figure 23B; Figure 24A) makes the disagreement structural rather than empirical: {cite:p}`Hertag2019,Litwinkumar2016,Bos2025,Veit2023` cluster in a divisive-gain corner, {cite:p}`Tahvili2025a,Tahvili2025b` occupy the subtractive corner, and {cite:p}`Garciadelmolino2017,Reimann2026,Sanzeni2020` sit on the paradoxical boundary, with {cite:p}`Iqbal2025,Hartung2024,Vighagen2021` displaced into a fourth quadrant where NDNF input recasts the dendritic operating point.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Layer 1 NDNF <sup>+</sup> Interneurons Control Bilateral Sensory Processing in a Layer-dependent Manner
insufficient_triples.note: Paper does not discuss phase diagrams, VIP→SST coupling, or dendritic operating points in the claimed framework.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Spiking and population models built around these regimes {cite:p}`Bos2025,Sancheztodo2026,Tahvili2025a,Pedrosa2020,Rossbroich2025` show that all three primary outcomes — net facilitation, divisive gain, paradoxical suppression — are reachable within a single 3-IN graph by retuning two or three weights, a sensitivity that any inference scheme must confront {cite:p}`Litwinkumar2016,Garciadelmolino2017,Dellal2025`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: PV and SOM cells play distinct causal roles in controlling network oscillations and stability
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract discusses PV/SOM roles in oscillations, not VIP-mediated facilitation, divisive gain, or paradoxical suppression regimes.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Spiking and population models built around these regimes {cite:p}`Bos2025,Sancheztodo2026,Tahvili2025a,Pedrosa2020,Rossbroich2025` show that all three primary outcomes — net facilitation, divisive gain, paradoxical suppression — are reachable within a single 3-IN graph by retuning two or three weights, a sensitivity that any inference scheme must confront {cite:p}`Litwinkumar2016,Garciadelmolino2017,Dellal2025`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Breaking Balance: Encoding local error signals in perturbations of excitation-inhibition balance
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract focuses on E/I balance for error-driven learning, not on showing multiple outcomes (facilitation, gain, paradoxical suppression) from weight retuning.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Models of state-dependent attention {cite:p}`Garciadelmolino2017,Dipoppa2018,Hahn2022,Waitzmann2024,Poort2022,Wagatsuma2022` and of fear-conditioning credit assignment {cite:p}`Krabbe2019,Wagatsuma2023,Dellal2025` further suggest that the operating regime is itself dynamic, switching between subtractive and divisive operation as a function of cholinergic and noradrenergic drive {cite:p}`Fu2014,Pakan2016,Anastasiades2021a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Mediodorsal and Ventromedial Thalamus Engage Distinct L1 Circuits in the Prefrontal Cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Paper does not address cholinergic/noradrenergic switching between subtractive and divisive operation.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: LAMP5 and additional layer-1 cell types {cite:p}`Anastasiades2021a,Vanderveer2021,Emmenegger2018` raise the same identifiability question for top-down inputs that NDNF raises for dendrites: a 3-IN circuit with strong VIP→SST gain and a 4-IN circuit with weaker VIP→SST gain plus NDNF inhibition can produce indistinguishable pyramidal observables {cite:p}`Iqbal2025,Hartung2024,Vighagen2021,Reimann2026`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Biologically grounded neocortex computational primitives implemented on neuromorphic hardware improve vision transformer performance
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract doesn't discuss indistinguishable pyramidal observables from 3-IN vs 4-IN circuits or identifiability issues.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The 3-IN sufficiency proponents {cite:p}`Hertag2019,Litwinkumar2016,Bos2025` reply that the additional degrees of freedom are model-internal and not yet tied to compartment-specific data, while the 4-IN necessity proponents {cite:p}`Iqbal2025,Hartung2024,Vighagen2021,Griesius2025` reply that 3-IN fits to L1-resolved recordings require VIP→SST values inconsistent with paired-recording slopes.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Compartmental models that resolve apical from perisomatic inhibition {cite:p}`Jadi2012,Sancheztodo2026,Reimann2026,Morabito2024,Dorsett2021` partly relieve this degeneracy by predicting compartment-specific signatures of each architecture, but the necessary recordings — dual-compartment imaging during VIP, SST, and NDNF perturbation — are rare {cite:p}`Bilash2023,Lenkey2025,Anastasiades2021a`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Modeling and simulation of neocortical micro- and mesocircuitry (Part I, anatomy)
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss apical vs perisomatic inhibition or compartment-specific signature predictions.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The empirical signature that would distinguish 3-IN sufficiency from 4-IN necessity is therefore concrete: 4-IN architectures predict a slow, layer-1-localised inhibition that survives complete SST silencing and tracks behavioural state on second-to-tens-of-seconds timescales {cite:p}`Hartung2024,Vighagen2021,Iqbal2025`; 3-IN architectures predict that the same slow inhibition collapses with SST silencing and emerges instead from short-term plasticity at SST→Pyr synapses {cite:p}`Hertag2019,Litwinkumar2016,Seay2020`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Layer 1 NDNF <sup>+</sup> Interneurons Control Bilateral Sensory Processing in a Layer-dependent Manner
insufficient_triples.note: Paper does not test inhibition surviving SST silencing or measure slow inhibition on second-to-tens-of-seconds timescales.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The empirical signature that would distinguish 3-IN sufficiency from 4-IN necessity is therefore concrete: 4-IN architectures predict a slow, layer-1-localised inhibition that survives complete SST silencing and tracks behavioural state on second-to-tens-of-seconds timescales {cite:p}`Hartung2024,Vighagen2021,Iqbal2025`; 3-IN architectures predict that the same slow inhibition collapses with SST silencing and emerges instead from short-term plasticity at SST→Pyr synapses {cite:p}`Hertag2019,Litwinkumar2016,Seay2020`.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Recent work attempting to fit either formulation to multi-cell perturbation data {cite:p}`Dellal2025,Moreni2025a,Moreni2025b,Reimann2026` recovers narrow posteriors only when one of the two formulations is enforced *a priori*, suggesting that the field's apparent disagreement about VIP gain may reduce, in part, to a disagreement about which causal arrows in the connectivity graph should be treated as exogenous.

insufficient_triples.note: Abstract doesn't discuss circuit degeneracy producing identical pyramidal traces under VIP optogenetic activation.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Dellal2025` make this point explicitly by fitting alternative parameterisations to the same VIP-perturbation dataset and showing that several recover the data with comparable likelihood, while {cite:t}`Reimann2026` argue from a large-scale biophysical model that the addition of dendritic compartments and conductance-based synapses *increases* rather than reduces the parameter manifold compatible with cell-type-resolved electrophysiology.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Modeling and simulation of neocortical micro- and mesocircuitry (Part I, anatomy)
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not argue that dendritic compartments increase the compatible parameter manifold.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Litwinkumar2016` and {cite:t}`Moreni2025a` argue that the VIP→SST weight is identifiable from population data once SST→Pyr is independently constrained, but the §6 audit of paired-recording slopes shows that the available SST→Pyr connectivity values have wide confidence intervals — wide enough that the VIP→SST estimate inherits the uncertainty and inflates substantially, which the {cite:p}`Litwinkumar2016` proof only partly mitigates.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Inhibitory stabilization and visual coding in cortical circuits with multiple interneuron subtypes
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract doesn't discuss identifiability of VIP→SST weight from population data or paired-recording constraints.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Litwinkumar2016` and {cite:t}`Moreni2025a` argue that the VIP→SST weight is identifiable from population data once SST→Pyr is independently constrained, but the §6 audit of paired-recording slopes shows that the available SST→Pyr connectivity values have wide confidence intervals — wide enough that the VIP→SST estimate inherits the uncertainty and inflates substantially, which the {cite:p}`Litwinkumar2016` proof only partly mitigates.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Constraint thus has to come from designs that pry the regimes apart: simultaneous PV, SST, and VIP perturbation with all-optical readout {cite:p}`Veit2023,Lenkey2025,Phillips2016`; compartment-resolved imaging during VIP manipulation {cite:p}`Bilash2023,Pakan2016,Anastasiades2021a`; combined imaging+modeling that exploits learning-induced changes as additional constraints {cite:p}`Poort2022,Wagatsuma2023,Lee2025`; and joint fitting against connectivity priors from molecular taxonomies {cite:p}`Yao2023,Rudy2011`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Behavioral-state modulation of inhibition is context-dependent and cell type specific in mouse visual cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract doesn't mention compartment-resolved imaging during VIP manipulation.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Recent attempts in this direction {cite:p}`Moreni2025a,Moreni2025b,Jiang2024b,Terwal2021,Huang2025a,Chou2021` couple inference frameworks to multi-cell perturbation data and recover narrower posterior regions, but the conflicts of Figure 24A persist within each posterior, and no single dataset has yet adjudicated between the {cite:p}`Hertag2019` divisive and {cite:p}`Tahvili2025b` subtractive accounts.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Cell-type-specific firing patterns in a V1 cortical column model depend on feedforward and feedback-driven states
insufficient_triples.note: Paper couples perturbation data to a spiking model, topically relevant, but abstract says nothing about inference posteriors or divisive vs subtractive accounts.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Recent attempts in this direction {cite:p}`Moreni2025a,Moreni2025b,Jiang2024b,Terwal2021,Huang2025a,Chou2021` couple inference frameworks to multi-cell perturbation data and recover narrower posterior regions, but the conflicts of Figure 24A persist within each posterior, and no single dataset has yet adjudicated between the {cite:p}`Hertag2019` divisive and {cite:p}`Tahvili2025b` subtractive accounts.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: A mean-field model of neural networks with PV and SOM interneurons reveals connectivity-based mechanisms of gamma oscillations
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not mention subtractive accounts or VIP perturbation effects; cannot verify the specific claim attributed to this paper.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Hertag2020`, {cite:t}`Hertag2021`, {cite:t}`Wilmes2019`, and {cite:t}`Wagatsuma2023` show that prediction-error and credit-assignment models produce their distinctive signatures in the *temporal* structure of pyramidal responses — phase-locked to mismatch events, ramping across trials with learning, or selectively gated by behavioural context — and these are signatures that scalar readouts cannot resolve.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Inhibitory microcircuits for top-down plasticity of sensory representations
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract mentions translation invariance and representation changes but not temporal signatures like phase-locking or ramping across trials.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The identifiability problem is therefore not only a problem of high-dimensional fitting; it is also a problem of designing experiments whose outputs occupy the directions in parameter space along which competing models actually differ {cite:p}`Veit2023,Lenkey2025,Dellal2025,Reimann2026,Rademacher2025`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Modeling and simulation of neocortical micro- and mesocircuitry (Part I, anatomy)
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss identifiability, experiment design, or parameter space directions.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The path forward is therefore not "the next better model" but coordinated empirical–computational design: pre-registered architectures whose distinguishing predictions are tested with cell-type-, layer-, and compartment-specific perturbations, and inference pipelines that report the full set of compatible parameterisations rather than a single best fit {cite:p}`Dellal2025,Reimann2026,Sancheztodo2026,Rademacher2025,Moreni2025a,Moreni2025b`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Modeling and simulation of neocortical micro- and mesocircuitry (Part I, anatomy)
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss inference pipelines, pre-registered architectures, or reporting compatible parameterisations.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The path forward is therefore not "the next better model" but coordinated empirical–computational design: pre-registered architectures whose distinguishing predictions are tested with cell-type-, layer-, and compartment-specific perturbations, and inference pipelines that report the full set of compatible parameterisations rather than a single best fit {cite:p}`Dellal2025,Reimann2026,Sancheztodo2026,Rademacher2025,Moreni2025a,Moreni2025b`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Fast Interneuron Dysfunction in Laminar Neural Mass Model Reproduces Alzheimer's Oscillatory Biomarkers
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not mention posterior-resolved fits, inference pipelines, or reporting full parameterisation sets.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The empirical signatures that would adjudicate the regimes are concrete: compartment-specific imaging during VIP perturbation to separate divisive from subtractive operation {cite:p}`Bilash2023,Lenkey2025,Reimann2026`; SST-silenced VIP perturbations to test 4-IN necessity {cite:p}`Iqbal2025,Hartung2024,Vighagen2021`; perturbation-amplitude curves to localise the ISN versus non-ISN regime {cite:p}`Garciadelmolino2017,Sanzeni2020,Phillips2016`; and trial-resolved, learning-coupled readouts to separate gain-knob from credit-signal interpretations {cite:p}`Wagatsuma2023,Lee2025,Hertag2020,Hertag2021,Chevy2024`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Modeling and simulation of neocortical micro- and mesocircuitry (Part I, anatomy)
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss compartment-specific imaging during VIP perturbation or divisive vs subtractive operation.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The empirical signatures that would adjudicate the regimes are concrete: compartment-specific imaging during VIP perturbation to separate divisive from subtractive operation {cite:p}`Bilash2023,Lenkey2025,Reimann2026`; SST-silenced VIP perturbations to test 4-IN necessity {cite:p}`Iqbal2025,Hartung2024,Vighagen2021`; perturbation-amplitude curves to localise the ISN versus non-ISN regime {cite:p}`Garciadelmolino2017,Sanzeni2020,Phillips2016`; and trial-resolved, learning-coupled readouts to separate gain-knob from credit-signal interpretations {cite:p}`Wagatsuma2023,Lee2025,Hertag2020,Hertag2021,Chevy2024`.

insufficient_triples.note: Paper does not perform SST-silenced VIP perturbations to test 4-IN necessity.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Veit2023` and {cite:t}`Bos2025` present spiking-circuit fits that recover canonical VIP-perturbation phenomenology, but the fits use the same VIP-activation dataset that the model was conceptually motivated by, so that the agreement does not constrain the parameterisation against the alternative subtractive {cite:p}`Tahvili2025a,Tahvili2025b` or paradoxical {cite:p}`Garciadelmolino2017,Reimann2026,Sanzeni2020` regimes.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: PV and SOM cells play distinct causal roles in controlling network oscillations and stability
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss VIP perturbation phenomenology or alternative subtractive regimes.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Veit2023` and {cite:t}`Bos2025` present spiking-circuit fits that recover canonical VIP-perturbation phenomenology, but the fits use the same VIP-activation dataset that the model was conceptually motivated by, so that the agreement does not constrain the parameterisation against the alternative subtractive {cite:p}`Tahvili2025a,Tahvili2025b` or paradoxical {cite:p}`Garciadelmolino2017,Reimann2026,Sanzeni2020` regimes.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: A mean-field model of neural networks with PV and SOM interneurons reveals connectivity-based mechanisms of gamma oscillations
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss subtractive regimes, VIP perturbations, or alternative parameterisations in the sense claimed.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Dipoppa2018` and {cite:t}`Pakan2016` are similarly compatible with multiple architectures: their state-dependent VIP modulation could be implemented by 3-IN parameter retuning, by 4-IN NDNF channel recruitment {cite:p}`Iqbal2025,Hartung2024,Vighagen2021`, or by an upstream cholinergic gating signal {cite:p}`Fu2014,Anastasiades2021a`, and the data do not arbitrate.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Mediodorsal and Ventromedial Thalamus Engage Distinct L1 Circuits in the Prefrontal Cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Paper does not address upstream cholinergic gating signals; focuses on thalamic inputs to L1 circuits.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The pattern is that experimental confirmations of "the disinhibitory motif" are abundant {cite:p}`Pi2013,Lee2013,Fu2014,Pfeffer2013,Karnani2016a,Pakan2016,Krabbe2019,Dipoppa2018,Myersjoseph2024,Veit2023`, while experimental confirmations of any *specific parameterisation* of that motif are rare, and the claims that population-level fits identify the VIP→SST weight {cite:p}`Litwinkumar2016,Moreni2025a` rest on prior assumptions about SST→Pyr that paired-recording studies do not yet justify.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Cell-type-specific firing patterns in a V1 cortical column model depend on feedforward and feedback-driven states
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract doesn't claim population-level fits identify VIP→SST weight or discuss prior assumptions about SST→Pyr.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Moreni2025a` and {cite:t}`Moreni2025b` demonstrate that simulation-based inference applied to multi-cell perturbation recordings can recover narrower posterior regions in the VIP→SST × SST→Pyr plane than single-perturbation fits, but the recovered posteriors still straddle the divisive/subtractive boundary in several datasets.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Cell-type-specific firing patterns in a V1 cortical column model depend on feedforward and feedback-driven states
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract describes perturbation effects in a spiking model but does not mention simulation-based inference, posteriors, or divisive/subtractive boundary.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Jiang2024b`, {cite:t}`Huang2025a`, and {cite:t}`Terwal2021` couple perturbation experiments to spiking models and recover parameter ranges that are consistent across replicates within a behavioural paradigm but inconsistent across paradigms — a pattern that itself argues for state-dependent operating regimes.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: A layered microcircuit model of somatosensory cortex with three interneuron types and cell-type-specific short-term plasticity
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract doesn't discuss cross-paradigm inconsistency or state-dependent operating regimes explicitly.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Jiang2024b`, {cite:t}`Huang2025a`, and {cite:t}`Terwal2021` couple perturbation experiments to spiking models and recover parameter ranges that are consistent across replicates within a behavioural paradigm but inconsistent across paradigms — a pattern that itself argues for state-dependent operating regimes.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Feature selective inhibitory mechanisms enable expectation suppression in cortical microcircuits
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract doesn't mention cross-paradigm inconsistency or state-dependent operating regimes; claim is specific.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: {cite:t}`Chou2021` similarly recover cross-cell-type parameter posteriors that exclude the most extreme regions of parameter space without selecting a single regime.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: AIM: A network model of attention in auditory cortex
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract describes a mechanistic network model, not Bayesian parameter posterior recovery; no mention of parameter posteriors or excluding extreme parameter regions.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The {cite:p}`Litwinkumar2016` claim that VIP→SST is identifiable from population data is therefore best interpreted as a local-identifiability claim under strong priors, not as a global-identifiability claim from data alone, and is consistent with the §6 audit observation that paired-recording weights have wide confidence intervals.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Inhibitory stabilization and visual coding in cortical circuits with multiple interneuron subtypes
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract doesn't discuss identifiability of VIP→SST weight or prior assumptions explicitly.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Connectomic reconstructions of cortical microcircuits {cite:p}`Hua2022,Talapka2025` provide weight-distribution priors that can in principle pin down the SST→Pyr connectivity that {cite:p}`Litwinkumar2016` argues is the limiting factor in VIP→SST identifiability.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Inhibitory stabilization and visual coding in cortical circuits with multiple interneuron subtypes
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract doesn't discuss SST→Pyr as a limiting factor for VIP→SST identifiability.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Recent work in this direction {cite:p}`Sancheztodo2026,Rademacher2025,Moreni2025a,Moreni2025b` is beginning to publish posterior-resolved fits, suggesting that the discipline is correctable; but the publication norm of reporting a single best-fit parameter set still dominates and continues to obscure the conflicts the field is attempting to resolve.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Fast Interneuron Dysfunction in Laminar Neural Mass Model Reproduces Alzheimer's Oscillatory Biomarkers
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not mention posterior-resolved fits or publishing full parameter distributions.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: If the VIP→SST weight is identifiable from population data only under strong priors on SST→Pyr {cite:p}`Litwinkumar2016`, then the wide confidence intervals reported by the §6 audit are not noise to be averaged away but are propagated directly into the posterior over VIP→SST.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Inhibitory stabilization and visual coding in cortical circuits with multiple interneuron subtypes
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract doesn't discuss identifiability conditioned on priors over SST→Pyr connectivity.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: **Empirical conflicts mapped to model parameter regimes.** **(A)** Conflict pairs Hertäg 2019 vs Tahvili 2025b (3-IN divisive vs 2-IN subtractive) and Pi 2013 vs García del Molino 2017 (net disinhibition vs paradoxical inhibition) sit in distinct regions of the same parameter plane; NDNF-channel models {cite:p}`Iqbal2025,Hartung2024` displace the operating point further. **(B)** Architectural-choice tree: which conflicts each architecture (2-IN, 3-IN, 4-IN; rate, spiking, predictive-coding) can in principle address. **(C)** Identifiability problem — three different parameterisations of the same observable: pyramidal firing-rate response to VIP optogenetic activation can be reproduced by strong VIP→SST + weak SST→Pyr, weak VIP→SST + strong SST→Pyr, or a 3-IN+NDNF circuit, illustrating why VIP-perturbation experiments alone cannot constrain architecture {cite:p}`Dellal2025,Reimann2026`. :::
insufficient_triples.paper_title: Modeling and simulation of neocortical micro- and mesocircuitry (Part I, anatomy)
insufficient_triples.note: Paper is about anatomy/connectivity modeling, not about parameter-plane conflicts or identifiability of VIP models.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The subtractive-versus-divisive gain ambiguity reduces to operating regime: VIP perturbation is divisive when SST recruitment is concurrent and dendritic inhibition is dominant, subtractive when the disinhibitory release falls on perisomatic compartments, and approximately mixed when both are engaged, with the rate-model literature reproducing each of these outcomes from the same wiring under different parameter draws {cite:p}`Kuchibhotla2017,Hertag2019,Litwinkumar2016,Garciadelmolino2017,Veit2023,Bos2025,Tahvili2025a,Tahvili2025b`.
insufficient_triples.paper_title: PV and SOM cells play distinct causal roles in controlling network oscillations and stability
insufficient_triples.note: Abstract does not discuss VIP perturbation, subtractive vs divisive gain, or perisomatic/dendritic compartment distinctions.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The subtractive-versus-divisive gain ambiguity reduces to operating regime: VIP perturbation is divisive when SST recruitment is concurrent and dendritic inhibition is dominant, subtractive when the disinhibitory release falls on perisomatic compartments, and approximately mixed when both are engaged, with the rate-model literature reproducing each of these outcomes from the same wiring under different parameter draws {cite:p}`Kuchibhotla2017,Hertag2019,Litwinkumar2016,Garciadelmolino2017,Veit2023,Bos2025,Tahvili2025a,Tahvili2025b`.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: The net-disinhibition versus paradoxical-effect conflict reduces to whether the local circuit is in the inhibition-stabilised regime: outside it, VIP activation produces the textbook disinhibitory gain; inside it, the same wiring produces paradoxical pyramidal suppression on VIP activation, and the same connectomic prior is consistent with both behaviours {cite:p}`Garciadelmolino2017,Sanzeni2020,Reimann2026,Hertag2019,Tahvili2025a,Tahvili2025b`.

insufficient_triples.claim_text: Within that triple, primary visual cortex VIP cells implement contrast-dependent, locomotion-gated gain enhancement {cite:p}`Fu2014,Dipoppa2018,Pakan2016,Millman2020`; auditory cortex deploys them for reinforcement-linked disinhibition and critical-period plasticity, with a polarity puzzle around movement-driven SST activation {cite:p}`Pi2013,Krabbe2019,Takesian2018,Yavorska2021,Bigelow2019`; somatosensory cortex recruits them via motor copy during active sensing {cite:p}`Lee2013,Sermet2019,Kuchibhotla2017`; medial prefrontal and anterior cingulate cortex implement top-down control of attention, working memory, and pain {cite:p}`Bastos2023a,Anastasiades2021a,Kamigaki2017,Li2022a`; and hippocampal IS-3 cells assemble a circuit motif that targets other interneurons rather than principal cells, breaking the cortical disinhibitory assumption at the wiring level {cite:p}`Gulyas1996,Tyan2014,Tricoire2011,Kawaguchi1996,Francavilla2018a`.

calibration_audit.worker_stringency_observed: Worker 1 (B0053–B0105) reported 521/954 INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE (54.6%) vs Worker 0 (10.1%), Worker 2 (18.4%), Worker 3 (9.2%). Elevation is uniform across roles, including 'supports' (W1: 50.7% INSUFFICIENT vs W0: 8.6%, W2: 18.9%, W3: 6.2%), so it is not driven by a particular role-tag class. Sample notes from W1 are coherent and well-reasoned (e.g. 'Abstract does not report specific firing-type breakdowns', 'Paper studies MD/VM thalamus→PFC, not POm/pulvinar'), consistent with a stricter abstract-must-contain-the-specific-detail bar rather than a parser/LLM bug.
calibration_audit.conclusion: Methodological calibration drift, not pathological. Worker 1 applied a stricter rubric where INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE = 'abstract does not state the specific factual/quantitative claim' (closer to a body-text-required bar), while W0/W2/W3 used 'topically/directionally consistent with the claimed role' (W0's explicit definition). This conservative bias also under-reports NEEDS_FIX: several W1 notes describe genuine misattributions (e.g. 'Claim attributes rabies survey to wrong paper') yet were filed as INSUFFICIENT. No parser anomaly: schema, batch coverage, and triple_id round-trip are clean. Calibration delta is a property of the LLM prompt/temperature for that worker, not the pipeline.
calibration_audit.recommendations: (1) Treat W1 INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE as 'abstract-only could not confirm — needs body-text re-read', not as evidence the citation is wrong. (2) For Phase 17, prioritise body-text re-verification of W1 INSUFFICIENT triples on cite_keys that also appear in NEEDS_FIX from any worker (likely true misattributions). (3) For future runs, fix the verdict rubric in the worker prompt and add a calibration sentinel batch (~20 triples) shared by all workers so cross-worker drift is detected before completion.
